name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf55i88rv5ha4ghi91b19unhpon1sb6vlceiic78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clim2p74c1h2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs054egj6p595v9rhna79d4is6kk2elc0krmvu8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clim2p74c1h2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkb5p5pucqm70ofeq4ai4b32nclu60gg7tlg2t9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clim2p74c1h2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztmbktf03rs78g58qtl3e6ocehbhc34icd3jp98g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clim2p74c1h2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---

name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From Team Scalise]
subject: Breaking: Special Election to fill MATT GAETZ’Sseat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s official – Matt Gaetz’s seat is about to be filled in a special election!

| |
---
| | | ***** SPECIAL ELECTION FOR MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT *** **

It's official - the special election in Florida's First Congressional District was just declared and voting starts in January!

Every House race is critical but with our Conservative House Majority hanging on by a THREAD, this might be the most important special election of the century.

**Our Pro-Trump Republican trifecta could be COMPLETELY DESTROYED if Democrats manage to win key races like this.**

That's why we are PLEADING for your help right now.

Majority Leader Scalise set a goal of raising one million dollars to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with an America First Patriot, win every other special election, AND deliver President Trump's agenda. | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9hl29dk11jv0rl5af5crf810af92v6ijt0inc5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW")
---
Remember:

**Democrats were just humiliated in a national election. They are desperate to ruin our Republican trifecta. And they know winning this special election would change everything. **

That's why this race must be a top priority for Conservatives everywhere.

_The first votes will be cast in January so time is of the essence! _

Whatever happens between now and then could seal the fate of our fragile House Majority - and our entire Republican trifecta. So can you help? We're desperate!
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2c13b5hh209ap0fjlsoskgf17hfqs67bdup7088_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW")
---
Thanks for all you do. Your support means everything to us.

- House Republicans

subject: Radical Attorneys General plot to SABOTAGE Trump’s America First Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
They’re all readying their defenses to bring LEGAL ACTION against the Trump Administration the second he takes the Oval Office!

| |
---
| | | If you thought President Trump's OVERWHELMING victory would end the lawfare against him...

THINK AGAIN!

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp1li6tf82c8qn5ung5ils1qm3rt43v756id5rdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs "State Watch: Democratic AGs rush to form line of defense against Trump")
---
**The Hill | November 17, 2024**
- Andrea Campbell (Attorney General, Massachusetts)
- Bob Ferguson (Attorney General/Governor-elect, Washington)
- Letitia James (Attorney General, New York)
- Matthew Platkin (Attorney General, New Jersey)
- Rob Bonta (Attorney General, California)

They're all mobilizing their offices to bring LEGAL ACTION against the Trump Administration the second he retakes the Oval Office! They're already preparing lawsuits to sabotage his agenda.

**Don 't forget:**

We're going up against the same Radical AGs who launched 130+ multistate lawsuits during President Trump's first term and hamstringed his agenda at every turn.

That's why we're rushing to you before they put their plot into motion.

The Radical Democrats are scrambling after losing the House, Senate, and White House. They're grasping at straws to sabotage Trump and Republicans. So we're searching the nation for America First Patriots to make their plot completely BACKFIRE!

**_[If we can get 500,000 Patriots to stand with us before the end of the month, we'll have what it takes to help pass Trump's strong agenda.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ue2rb3t7revsvuk7mmvi7qhd9f0h4jblqg5dsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs "If we can get 500,000 Patriots to stand with us before the end of the month, we’ll have what it takes to help force Trump’s strong agenda past their firewall.")_**

_Are you with us?_ **[**YES >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zem8a8l0uf3n7r8of5nibdob4v32052agmtkn4l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknftkjnuflur72rj3abk91elf97jdkbg4bsp5og_rp22sh2s8i6epj2climeor2clh2bs)**We hope so.

Thanks for all you do.

- House Republicans
_(Sent from Team Scalise)_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuuqjnihaqgb4ntv97b1rp2bnjbudg64dalthfq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clim1pb6chh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---

body:
Please don’t click away.
---
️ ⛅ To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️We know you may be tired and disappointed, but please don’t click away from this message. We’ll get straight to the point.
As you read this, Trump and his allies are working on the agenda they will roll out as soon as they’re sworn in. If their proposed cabinet nominees and Project 2025 agenda are any indication, we know we are in for disastrous policies that will move this country backward. We cannot sit back and let Trump and a Republican Congress do whatever they want without a fight.
We’ll need a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under Trump’s control. Unfortunately, the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.

As you read this, Trump and his allies are working on the agenda they will roll out as soon as they’re sworn in. We cannot sit back and let Trump and a Republican Congress do whatever they want without a fight. Hi Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw this message.

**This past year, we were thrilled to support 80 pro-choice women candidates from 23 states + 1 U.S. territory against their extremist, anti-choice opponents.**

Despite the results at the top of the ticket, we shattered glass ceilings and delivered important wins from Texas to Nebraska, Georgia, Arizona, and beyond. Plus, 44% of our winners were women of color, and 47% came from abortion ban states. Our candidates shattered glass ceilings across the country, including the FIRST democratic female sheriff in the entire state of Michigan and the FIRST openly trans City Councilmember in Kentucky!

**Now, our work has never been more important. Trump has elected deeply misogynistic men to powerful positions across Washington. We have every reason to believe their policy will threaten the well-being of women in America. That’s why we will need women in the rooms where ALL decisions are being made – over the next four years and beyond. We are prepared to get back up and fight, and we want you to join us.**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

Hi Peter,

Throughout 2024, we supported 80 pro-choice women candidates from 23 states + 1 U.S. territory against their extremist, anti-choice opponents. While we are quite concerned by the results of the presidential election, **we wanted to share the good news of exciting – and important – wins from the 2024 election cycle.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97619992/514042375/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241125shattered_N_CD_90DO_11_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4MTc4ZGEwLTM1YWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RrZ1UxpQ-OCcfLMEA6KtekFeop0M1dQqnkQ11JsxlDs=)
---
Across the country, many Her Bold Move candidates won their elections, including:

🗳️ Molly Cook for Texas State Senate

🗳️ Maggie Douglas for Nebraska State Board of Education

🗳️ Ruwa Romman for the Georgia State House

🗳️ Quantá Crews for Arizona House of Representatives

_...and so many more!!_

🗳️ 44% of our _winners_ were women of color

🗳️ 47% of our _winners_ came from abortion ban states

🗳️ Almost ALL of our winners shattered a glass ceiling with their victory, including Emma Curtis, who will serve as the first openly trans City Councilmember in the entire state of Kentucky!

Additionally, abortion rights won in Missouri, Nevada, New York, Colorado, Maryland, Arizona, and Montana. **This election proves once again that most Americans believe abortion should be accessible and legal. Any legislators passing abortion bans are doing so against the will of the majority of their constituents.**

Our candidates dealt with sexism, misogyny, sexual harassment, and even death threats on the campaign trail. They stayed in the fight because they knew how desperately the women and girls of our country need their representation in government. At Her Bold Move, we believe that the fight must continue.

**We hope you’ll join us in that fight. With Trump re-elected and a GOP trifecta in Washington, it has never been more important that we have pro-choice women in these powerful rooms. name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From Team Scalise]
subject: Breaking: Special Election to fill MATT GAETZ’Sseat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s official – Matt Gaetz’s seat is about to be filled in a special election!

| |
---
| | | ***** SPECIAL ELECTION FOR MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT *** **

It's official - the special election in Florida's First Congressional District was just declared and voting starts in January!

Every House race is critical but with our Conservative House Majority hanging on by a THREAD, this might be the most important special election of the century.

**Our Pro-Trump Republican trifecta could be COMPLETELY DESTROYED if Democrats manage to win key races like this.**

That's why we are PLEADING for your help right now.

Majority Leader Scalise set a goal of raising one million dollars to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with an America First Patriot, win every other special election, AND deliver President Trump's agenda. | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpsf777a5vffac9l5nnkogvcvvgljn77419hihfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm4p32cjh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW")
---
Remember:

**Democrats were just humiliated in a national election. They are desperate to ruin our Republican trifecta. And they know winning this special election would change everything. **

That's why this race must be a top priority for Conservatives everywhere.

_The first votes will be cast in January so time is of the essence! _

Whatever happens between now and then could seal the fate of our fragile House Majority - and our entire Republican trifecta. So can you help? We're desperate!
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5g9a973n12e7dr558j34npqu7radtvfahaclon0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm4p32cjh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW")
---
Thanks for all you do. Your support means everything to us.

- House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh5sbm3nv05k71h0h5locgsvgsj3vouf3vnjjl2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm4p32cjh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0lm6c43q6qi2i6g3vt52ssg16mf8kbpihj4cfg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm4p32cjh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.
It's a voice America needs

| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84e9e374524647eb997c9fa94470cb0a&_e=5hQunQIH64yvT_44KWDnKgQoSIVhdI8SAuajboMjyBK2-dG_D1lH1bct8d8bE_g_yPFodL2Ngd1xiZiLBAdgBg7BT8pQlMi3DZnZL6ybbBSVUAg8cw3bP5JT4XU2FiIxh6eA5x3tAGlYA7jU_EqTM7pVdPHVqKSIJ89qDPM6DvLgjeOeoyD6vgDLcwkRLIfAnWOSQ2dgXpb22ckFoVwZcyK7XMW3bkqJF5fJ-HIAL5kKSq_5SwXdXhLNUXPjjEw06fghunH5U0QxZ4suovyWnojVU_-L68LO4DvsaMeYdyVQC-uTp9Zgi1L4ZQubBUeQCTwf6v82w48QsuS73QnLlRCwctvFXD33Z_Msr-2otrcGKqXtevj-3I9E8V0ENSRF)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84e9e374524647eb997c9fa94470cb0a&_e=5hQunQIH64yvT_44KWDnKgQoSIVhdI8SAuajboMjyBK2-dG_D1lH1bct8d8bE_g_yPFodL2Ngd1xiZiLBAdgBg7BT8pQlMi3DZnZL6ybbBSVUAg8cw3bP5JT4XU2FiIxh6eA5x3tAGlYA7jU_EqTM7pVdPHVqKSIJ89qDPM6DvLgjeOeoyD6vgDLcwkRLIfAnWOSQ2dgXpb22ckFoVwZcyK7XMW3bkqJF5fJ-HIAL5kHCX3J0BV5MjDvRDOq1AD5ZE5empIPI7okXn0qxjz2NtOryKf-CwlTk4Pkrsq_4mGaDPcMP68YK6bPnXO_mR7F6pm3RRI9tDQqu5oJ_pwoac0y6NSfCXHd3Uaxc8UvNOgZ0Rg-nh3wa3pxJOvv_dkn)
---

---

clean_body: As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Nov. 25th: Support Trump’s Agenda to Put America First
body:
Read the poll results, sign up, and show your support today!
| | | |

|

| Patriot-

---
| **** Your vote for Donald Trump sent a _**loud and clear**_ message to the left and to the entrenched politicians and bureaucrats: The American people are ready to be first--not last--in their own country. November 5th wasn't just an election; it was a mandate to restore common sense and accountability in government.
We recently commissioned a post-election survey, and the results are crystal clear: **Americans overwhelmingly back President Trump 's agenda** and the bold initiatives he plans to roll out after January 20, 2025\. One standout idea is the **Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)** --an initiative that could save billions, potentially trillions, in wasted tax dollars by cutting unnecessary spending and bloated bureaucracy.
Here's how you can help support President Trump's agenda and help him get it done: ___
_**CALL TO ACTION** **********[Go to our survey page,](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a733310b/1edb9794a7325be4 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/government-efficiency-poll")** read through our poll results so you can understand the mandate President Trump has to implement his agenda, and then sign up using the form at the bottom of the page to learn more about how you can help President Trump fix America. **__** **** ************
---

| **** ******** The left and entrenched establishment will stop at nothing to undermine the clear choice the American people made, but together, we can ensure the Trump administration can deliver on its promises. **Let 's keep up the momentum, stand strong, and make sure they hear us loud and clear.****
**Thank you for being part of this incredible movement!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin

name: BREAKING FROM THE HILL [From House GOP]
subject: Radical Attorneys General plot to SABOTAGE Trump’s America First Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
They’re all readying their defenses to bring LEGAL ACTION against the Trump Administration the second he takes the Oval Office!

| |
---
| | | If you thought President Trump's OVERWHELMING victory would end the lawfare against him...

THINK AGAIN!

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn36qeo12qga4fkfvd43q0dqog3il9bg5noiqspg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs "State Watch: Democratic AGs rush to form line of defense against Trump")
---
**The Hill | November 17, 2024**
- Andrea Campbell (Attorney General, Massachusetts)
- Bob Ferguson (Attorney General/Governor-elect, Washington)
- Letitia James (Attorney General, New York)
- Matthew Platkin (Attorney General, New Jersey)
- Rob Bonta (Attorney General, California)

They're all mobilizing their offices to bring LEGAL ACTION against the Trump Administration the second he retakes the Oval Office! They're already preparing lawsuits to sabotage his agenda.

**Don 't forget:**

We're going up against the same Radical AGs who launched 130+ multistate lawsuits during President Trump's first term and hamstringed his agenda at every turn.

That's why we're rushing to you before they put their plot into motion.

The Radical Democrats are scrambling after losing the House, Senate, and White House. They're grasping at straws to sabotage Trump and Republicans. So we're searching the nation for America First Patriots to make their plot completely BACKFIRE!

**_[If we can get 500,000 Patriots to stand with us before the end of the month, we'll have what it takes to help pass Trump's strong agenda.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhckmu3r1k3mvceqqlh78qo7472ruqdjeia527po_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs "If we can get 500,000 Patriots to stand with us before the end of the month, we’ll have what it takes to help force Trump’s strong agenda past their firewall.")_**

_Are you with us?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi0ajlpn4bad1dvok9vvdnjt1dvfmu82prpuj2l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5kbmenmkuotgi79dvdpo43uu5vfvdk95fm6bsrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs)**We hope so.

Thanks for all you do.

- House Republicans
_(Sent from Team Scalise)_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zee2h2j3tstv1t7ghrcmk10d6r4sttgoq80h1548_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3ukuu92jn2o0gq505o0bekjp0199tine6gbakp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6lgcjrs76gp1hc1ipob2c2m1m4m0fn7n0risd68_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmco30cjh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

Banks don’t need your permission to legally seize your deposits. **This is how you can protect your savings. [**Learn More**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=17ypoesy06wdtwtzzwsuarvadito1covduc46wdjmutdcjrzdfe8smrwjr7qynqebj4lbcx9e99lvbzvocg8wo8pttk14o464b1oueyqsdaijoya4zc8gk91n753oxrdzoexlftia7yxcqokn0ok82034eiro9n31g0sdslkb6k5bbzig8lx9j08vnspbgj6j2mmapz2xi7lae8z4tj761iyn8zoq17an8tayevzdtoogq5rhgt315roet5vkzjwol0njbm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)

The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1g6bat7kz3jgb11opc13yl4sa5b7ww3e4disvb0gfiboybz2xyl9nyvz5ij0ay6zhunnrttvsjir17ea9x79i8eupf18bsoqi9a4qjacyaevbktviq67syelz377dj8mjkka4osl7zcney0709s9x6qdb8quckzk5nlr904a9bvfa0q6ezwxnjmbjg318f5ve2787ybsf3y9l3l0ye0f1sd2l37nsstn0gjvic0vi15mi32t25genkaaliz124dfs63td8n4f72b6qyw4loca8as315&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h) | **[New Leadership, Same Financial Risks?](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1g6bat7kz3jgb11opc13yl4sa5b7ww3e4e4ymc8x9wnj45djcxq0v850i3xwv9ky6ty460ggdsbv7p6jco1t334g3kqyo2dkiglngudthfghnzgmu34uyfsvbzpsxgjze0gvpv07mfwq08q7idmfyllzg5if89f4owvaofvl7pu5qlz2fwhzrfhqwreawjck9g5d0isq9dkpujvekkugrg6aqidb9v106y15q59w12adto2s6591ipx6q7sxilh074jfg1u9sj9e4rgnz6lnylvuu5a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)**

The dust has settled, but the economic risks haven't. **Discover what you need to know to shield your financial future.**
[**Learn More**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1g6bat7kz3jgb11opc13yl4sa5b7ww3e4eoe1dsnb7ktxxiehvedcfcqymm4pjcwtsiiiw861luzpux772ha9jt5g3dlkb7ujsmvm3g94kj6jp713e2ff043e7vbrez0y2cqybvrplqs7ge8f95pafwvl3r3bwkmvf3jsylm51st5khkgu6bvcs371unj2oody49g67ncsmt2d4xn50hg7y9gco32xwbop4chwuw64882x2rm4znsetzeum6dgk6k3e5igbq4zsh2t235qxixcqwj9i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)
* * *
**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dc6lwffqcvge6mfacakirrrdtnkljylguzr245zt85lvb25unvyf550vrhzfy1hfajr0jnkdi2i49l7n2fgv30eqnpe7yf5w8at3dojb6r3t2q9yys3l39nf418mrrbbms3uv6b0tnqxj2abzidgi1dqlmogohm8094p4qr5ut9mpelzsrp6obonv1y35wxl4agqw67warol46p3spo506njjfdy3k4m4w10fc39pn72803qk3b5v33t1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dc75pknktozpai3eiaf0fpj7wkmlix0fmqgb3s8jw6qg368lkzlhn14dh49myun0dnis3lfyghc210qluq55avz2i3ewjf3mytcfmyq23m6ne88pvjo6vmtry4czdxj3iy5j3n4h3vg0o4m2gvpnuxibyx3dr17x4gm8b1mcvcoaiu6ngb0eqy3ko707wcggei7vy7aut3iv1i1qmfog15rucf0utwpqxlokx3tp7cqroxrhdoahl7rjg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dc7n72gu85rl7tpj2az57oqzawylhv1e26mo2cgpi6g4tmotxeojsj90mogdykc7fcphmzatfavle1yzjkrem2tdsfek8f110n0ufhgr0596u274tqwplnz248913e4uue8nzrwbbe9qd5hs15ke56209hgat74k9rs49a6nwls3r7p08kaqsuhx5oqnlj3ct3waa95s9es2lxbb59pv24v3ve9qh6yv3qaiosht25xet6eowxayrnepc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dc7t07p1kk8wc2a18at9xmi3e6klgt2cfjbl21rg879qhqrl8iblyfp8bxs8zr5qi4hmtnvoetpjv2gopucqhxos1vfnvekdq4m8p5mdj0o17i5hqhexroeayndqrknj4kmc7w0wo0af67sf7ew8dc7mj6xxvp2nq0xlgn1iy8vtjivaz8o0urz7ktesr3oy5mjfcmyq2slyjnpllbq833yaodun8ehzwg0g3g9wiwf5xe4fpgaohs4fo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h) For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd0g914hsufobzf3vgds5z3u33ygutkv6ye5txiqkovk84364kcjr6dfd208krl51ok25jvic8cw77zh24szaisaf1ax5tu583pnck0224dnfpg0zlm8t78s42yflndf7ysnk05ocyvb89tsc12mfwl4buactncax0ny5kc8k7cit8n0e1bu63ovnd6f4a8cuvpq1c992vgrp48fiaid0vbggku03n0naoputvx0bs1ufb5f9no2pr1b7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd1025zr7nxk8937bgxwvxwk6bkgtrltkq7esithmol8y86ze33lx2i26mxbkiqo3drtoxqdb1wtk8hvtadmmrnppdakstrhxiz1m7sqklg6v7edxsurj8q2y657ntl7feucu4x7ogl3zn2fizzds54rofrzvta1bxttcxxflsgmljtb6np480464iwjvgty6ccv3dc6h8plmfj4d4js1ufrzjcisj9s5dbs8il4vh8hkmum2wnefvq5r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd15hm5kk4qvcgpnhgrajw2qmomgsq0sc5zrs73nypqv0om5r7t1cl0mxv76lofv65iiv99yzgqrbm37j91ihk61ktbndtpxlbicfsidhgj191duujczp9vb49zwza6yrkx52911l3qu2oa73m982b9c046wxzxqg6zpn8tr0bjbuyapwx0c9ihek1l1l0ctgk3a5f74zijv8vxrxwk52tj0silegvuwz71q0mp8qms92hgchfnv9zcxr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd1naqauaj759rzs1g9fnuvgpkygro1rtj32rtadkpffqspz2ng3ih4v0dezlf8c8wqnbj4tyz8psnmiofovtt0cv7bb2tnopv6socp4eblhkhc9sqkgfmbnyp5jlgq124zvypsixnfitq9w9igab9r0zqjtzfudkdf8hhp01l141nh1kgaonfzrd7p6q6lpv5sf7ga2sxt3699cs0kg3t0x9i8b85db4ypndzdo8bzy7t77b2n9be31f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd1ttv72rblce0jw7g3jbt1mtwkgqm2q9aubqem8mq93ewt4bs762d8ds0q509zjmkhciwloxs2n7ouwepz62lhr3jc2pt92dos5hlftbx2cabb0pi729ngk4sano0xrambk6tid7w9mirgjsvs5nfwnmbaqbls53ol4su8x384uw11cp4nkpcr2wodmfp897ofk9i509m0z3kk1mslv4s462htxxe0fy1b9v15s34glo2vaunn05irtn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcxsdtc59bsadnbjuqsfp6dd1zmzby6ueomy7apfk23rucx7mgp83p1rkoq2hayqaq6awyoww88zolh8ly0c34ppp638g7w8i8kpc97jjeauc3azcrat6f55bhr99gys5xqvzdnpr9bp0wyw6aa6egmseocyoxfeabntsmz61xkpbxk0rne5pu7k5015464t7j2c8qdplwrz6bpu5r8vt4hw73njxk1kw71ayo4j085r7chgctlq9k3t17mqvvjw2oszi5nwmcy0djf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snigkv&__onlt=h)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z532mtsc6t7taef34oap48uvhm3b8oi9mlkn5lg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmcp76c9h2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlvtuac7pgkd5phj3v5nal0vblnbpu1p61q24qm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmcp76c9h2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3jb3u3gklr8ga1oshlhlhgd8ir67dv1g6u13120_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmcp76c9h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl91blduhkfp6aajnrgj38aflbvcgfn29ilcvh6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmcp76c9h2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,

Times have certainly changed. | | | | Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. name: Thanksgiving via USO
subject: Remember our service members this Thanksgiving
body:
Sign our card for service members now
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cw_m6KCP/b1h6b3lCWTVoRlhsOWdBM0lnc05PTWJ0bjA5VEVnRXJ4Q3o5L0ROZHp6ZXdwSitSYmMvNGM2R3NFWDFKc3o0ZERZU2pVakFVTXJCYTE3SnpCVDZmMGZKdmNvNTNxN281Qmg2UEVOcXNDRHM9S0/eFZaTWF5aVFtZnIwZnJjK2FiSDNDdTg3cHVGMWgrMkplL0RqUkRQTzhuMnF0bkNRem1odHFsWGlIQkgxYTZ3L3pwZjc2YVhtVWRYS2RxY2x1cTZCbHN1ek8yYUdybHpVS0)
---
USO Supporter,
Some of the toughest days in my 25 years in the Air Force were holidays. There were times when I was deployed far from home during the holiday season. My family tried to celebrate without me, but it was hard on all of us. Even now, my heart aches remembering those missed moments.
That's why I can tell you firsthand: An encouraging note of gratitude over the holidays can lift a service member's spirit in a powerful way. Just knowing that someone is thinking of you means everything. So today, I'm personally asking: **[Will you add your signature to the USO's Thanksgiving card for our heroes in uniform?](https://links.e.uso.)**
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWk28RSD/b1h6b3lCWTVoRlhsOWdBM0lnc05PTWJ0bjA5VEVnRXJ4Q3o5L0ROZHp6ZXdwSitSYmMvNGM2R3NFWDFKc3o0ZERZU2pVakFVTXJCYTE3SnpCVDZmMGZKdmNvNTNxN281Qmg2UEVOcXNDRHM9S0/eFZaTWF5aVFtZnIwZnJjK2FiSDNDdTg3cHVGMWgrMkplL0RqUkRQTzhuMnF0bkNRem1odHFsWGlIQkgxYTZ3L3pwZjc2YVhtVWRYS2RxY2x1cTZCbHN1ek8yYUdybHpVS0)
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
|
---

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.uso.)
---
|
---

Think about your favorite Thanksgiving memories -- breaking the wishbone, backyard football games or that extra slice of apple pie. For so many of our service members, being deployed means missing these treasured moments year after year.
Our mission here at the USO is to make sure these service members know we see their sacrifice and deeply appreciate their service -- especially on Thanksgiving. **[That's why we set a goal of filling our card with 100,000 signatures from grateful Americans. But the goal deadline is at midnight Wednesday, so please take a moment and add your name now. It means more than you could ever know.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform,
Christopher Plamp, USAF Retired

name: Tim
subject: We will be ready Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
If you’re worried about what the next four years will look like under a second Trump administration, you’re not alone.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97628300/514069669/2013822272?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDE3MDIwNS0zZWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1obl15MAjfmu-CVcXdKW5v6E04YITjUvvn1y6dw5cOc=)
---
Peter,
If you’re worried about what the next four years will look like under a second Trump administration, you’re not alone.
There’s nothing I can say to make the result of this year’s election less disappointing. Trust me. I’m disappointed too. But what I can tell you is this: **In Minnesota, we will be ready to stand up to protect our progress and our way of life no matter what comes our way.**
As long as I'm Governor, we will protect a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions, stand with working people, welcome immigrants, and ensure that all Minnesotans are free to live as they are and love who they choose.
I won't lie to you, Peter. It's going to take a lot of work. In the coming years, our movement will be tested like never before. But we will make it through if we stick together – just like we always have.
That’s why I’m reaching out personally this morning. To prove that we’re ready to defend our values in the New Year, we must reach our $150,000 goal before our end-of-year public fundraising deadline on December 31. And I’m hoping we can put a serious dent in it before people log off for the holidays.
**[Peter, will you send $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you so we can defend our values next year and continue working together to make Minnesota a shining example of progress for the rest of the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97628304/514069674/646991919?refcode=body&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDE3MDIwNS0zZWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1obl15MAjfmu-CVcXdKW5v6E04YITjUvvn1y6dw5cOc=)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Reclaim our libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvfbn7iskfm75co5p2pgnlipgijg2vgbc823452g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm2o74cth2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8qjej7jnkgkfjpv7mq3jeghcvjrbhlh63jj0nfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm2o74cth2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfn0odgf1doi9arqq57fhcsvn8ekr18ttpg20700_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm2o74cth2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjsfnbfv6qj6dfiiuan7gujob8uq0nnq1iak9sa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm2o74cth2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,

* An Illinois woman is charged with two counts of a hate crime for the broad daylight attack on a pregnant American Muslim woman and her husband

* Dr. Zachary Foster has a Ph.D in Near Eastern Studies from Princeton and is a Fellow at the Rutgers Center for Security, Race and Rights. He runs a digital archive called [Palestine Nexus](https://substack.com/redirect/587c60cc-0ed2-4f5c-9870-35c0e3fdbfb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and writes a newsletter called [Palestine, in Your Inbox](https://substack.com/redirect/6b23fb79-1f93-45e3-a414-7e078e94eeff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Dr. Foster joins us to discuss Israel, Palestine, & the history of Zionism.

name: The Forward Party
subject: This Election Season Was Crazy...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
... It should be like this.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_election_was_crazy&n=1)
---
Monday, November 25, 2024 | Peter -- It’s hard to understate how truly crazy this year’s election was. Do you remember when?
* The **Republican frontrunner refused to participate** in any debates
* The incumbent president, after strongly hinting he would not run for reelection, changed his mind, despite having underwater approval ratings
* The **Democratic Party refused to hold a competitive primary** , even freezing a sitting Representative out of the Party when he tried to run
* Independent and non-legacy party options gained more momentum than we’ve seen in decades (RFK, Jr.; No Labels)
* A large number of **Republican voters voted for a primary challenger even after she dropped out of the race**
* There were legal battles over whether the Republican candidate was eligible for office based on post-Civil War constitutional amendments
* The **Republican candidate faced multiple assassination attempts** that quickly faded into the background of the news cycles
* The Democratic presumptive nominee dropped out after a disastrous debate performance, and his **Vice President was slotted in to take his place**

After all of this, Donald Trump ended up winning reelection, joining Grover Cleveland as the only president to retake the White House after losing it. While Democrats and many Republicans lament this series of events, the truth is that they built the very system that has pushed our nation in this direction. We have entrusted the two legacy parties with our country, and they have delivered to us a country that is struggling. They have led a government that has fundamentally failed to address the pain that people are feeling every day, as they send their kids to school, or go to the grocery store, or look to buy a new house or start a new job. _**We must do better**_ , but to do better, we must understand where the two legacy parties have failed. We’ll be writing tomorrow to discuss those failures, and how Forward plans to create a party that won’t make the same mistakes. With hope for a better future, **Lindsey Williams Drath, CEO** **Matt Shinners, CSOO** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_election_was_crazy&n=2)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_election_was_crazy&n=3)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_election_was_crazy&n=4)

clean_body: ... It should be like this. | | Monday, November 25, 2024 | Peter -- It’s hard to understate how truly crazy this year’s election was. Do you remember when? The Republican frontrunner refused to participate in any debates The incumbent president, after strongly hinting he would not run for reelection, changed his mind, despite having underwater approval ratings The Democratic Party refused to hold a competitive primary , even freezing a sitting Representative out of the Party when he tried to run Independent and non-legacy party options gained more momentum than we’ve seen in decades (RFK, Jr.; No Labels) A large number of Republican voters voted for a primary challenger even after she dropped out of the race There were legal battles over whether the Republican candidate was eligible for office based on post-Civil War constitutional amendments The Republican candidate faced multiple assassination attempts that quickly faded into the background of the news cycles The Democratic presumptive nominee dropped out after a disastrous debate performance, and his Vice President was slotted in to take his place After all of this, Donald Trump ended up winning reelection, joining Grover Cleveland as the only president to retake the White House after losing it. While Democrats and many Republicans lament this series of events, the truth is that they built the very system that has pushed our nation in this direction. We have entrusted the two legacy parties with our country, and they have delivered to us a country that is struggling. They have led a government that has fundamentally failed to address the pain that people are feeling every day, as they send their kids to school, or go to the grocery store, or look to buy a new house or start a new job. We must do better , but to do better, we must understand where the two legacy parties have failed. We’ll be writing tomorrow to discuss those failures, and how Forward plans to create a party that won’t make the same mistakes. With hope for a better future, Lindsey Williams Drath, CEO Matt Shinners, CSOO Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr0OAyIRH5b0n7PFIASY96ITOwIr-zoaxENOZax-pTgUIqJ1MX9zpkOQzZ9TzCYZrTxV33xBxywYgkczv9XEvEK1SojvyW5BZLdmZqSpz9LbGdiSrZcYWVuRMYhFEYZhi6kyfYMt4hqfZeobPqIfmnHdElxYNnsmvx87dNHkSkRHnA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."

>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.

The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr2gjpeM_DQvBY7LYeEfTZCsXDL5pbhIrD3q1eLWLL8qfe3mW1ymMIdpZZFRJ33pFJZXK0UIchFEnOd6ajUzhL_xmzh7BTVG3R7jYz2zuKNBJiK4thnjeZrg6xzdEggNUFUa31mcdZ3cSdwOMCe-PCFDuV-jvahXTokoCM16RWpxzg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. **#1. They're fighting radical schools**.

I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr2Dz2WwZioKwBWM27gWZT7TG99AfqbDgxGXP18mBGWszIluYP-AVFlAzVgXme_yhXPGq02T4yTMWM_XFMq3WSf7AoFX_ORMPeZmn1h5-MZ0dwMAQvR8PYcbGds32gCrjJEWLb9vphTd2hMZ2Xd00V8H0dcv4aJcYjE0UQCu6Wn0Bw%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!

**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr3Ag4sDXzPvDu86e2yf86JtR8kIJhgF_N7MXqhHw8cDZgtmKDJG6w0j-HiDI8yXThXYS3E-035a7qeYMJQueP_6xg9LJ3dnKil5mVmsoGrxZIXmRhMoivM6LBHwWdo90eSOmAfjSR_1AIxzjIeU0j4K2nJFkZwTaRytislgT9xWHg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr2zTwpdvuV62NxKCOFctqca2Nhvelb22Ppyb17_HR6W6JSNfTrJ0FmtIKVzLPLpoaGFz6tMzxldfz9D624hr5OPMjwprOhQbr0lADziWtXtckuTdYwi617xEyhhdzZLG328plXCG0Y0pv656rUr0RTxtAC9-pOLllJQ7kAgctQkeg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr1fiVK7nLM5jEvh1VCHfdsEUuT3Iv7APW-SJtOn9ZGlRfMJnGc4d-YJn-sFfg5bPYgPtbgfYajYzMIIE8S-Y_Jav_OPfak7ywG8Xy-dn1Qfzs8aPVaZRwZTywKBlwKS5MjkH88mh-o3HMit9FmkgTIq7rAwjsga5Yw_q0XQDSVzqA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fab8999bcd404455b604b049a5f0ea46&_e=f1ia6kzThvfNjemzmiL_dNg8CLzgkwMxz6ss_2OSbh28aDB9E7BI_RpByF40j1tFaP0-pF1mRt-tA7mPt-2XX7BlX0ywoD6HNbPiIw1cHIzjaUbCOGs7SFJsQzYQtkmkK_YcOjQw1a9Q6QmUXVhOfzML9tKOphDmZYg33ARcjZU6Q2I1coOY9z0EJyBg4JwW2mLm1WBfiBlhPmKMNaqGw5CkyA7CdMrdn8wm14DLRr08s2FH8-8sco7PBAkKVpUQPGrcQ_cwAG6F9g47iLOlhyCpbdrYlyYLJTF_i-RXuhG3xPU371Qn5Pu4Dk18vxPqF9B7PGvTsdk62WARakx_Yv7h-pBYWeQbH67UzcZINm799pnSpLdM8OZvdgsyI8UlUtNzRN4zenvOcJj2f2eYHQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

body:

| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19211/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/d2d520292f2b64c791ee4c2e01051b9ef855ec10) here at any time.

---

November 25th, 2024
---
|
---
Hello Reader,

A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...

After months of grinding, they came out with this prototype that blew everyone's minds.

It uses this patented military tech that makes it 20X more badass than anything as regular Joes can buy.

They named this covert device: **[Operation Raven](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19211/6374453/25fa7c6f414e45a8fba56af9bb7bc0ac9fe7d50c/d2d520292f2b64c791ee4c2e01051b9ef855ec10)**

[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19211/6374453/25fa7c6f414e45a8fba56af9bb7bc0ac9fe7d50c/d2d520292f2b64c791ee4c2e01051b9ef855ec10)
---
Literally, you can spy on SWAT teams with this.

It looks just like you’re shining a spotlight on your targets...

It uses military-graded nanotech to magnify 10X more than any other IR binoculars out there.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer this Raven optic to you at an **[INSANE discount...](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19211/6374453/25fa7c6f414e45a8fba56af9bb7bc0ac9fe7d50c/d2d520292f2b64c791ee4c2e01051b9ef855ec10)**

These won’t last long at this price.

In fact, I’m positive these will run out soon.

**[Check here to see if DarkForce NVBs are still available](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19211/6374453/25fa7c6f414e45a8fba56af9bb7bc0ac9fe7d50c/d2d520292f2b64c791ee4c2e01051b9ef855ec10)**
