name: American Patriot Daily
subject: Israel Calendars Are Here!
body:
No other place on earth has captured the world’s heart like Israel. And... [unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpio81wl6zbyjtrp3b4cd0qgifl23zst0qe7yomc8dje2ibgeltgu533eglj2ac097ljfi7yj9b10mhbyqrjjwrh8eytdt5&__stmp=sniill&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | | |
---
| | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6uok4d61u7giucd1tnovnc9usqz4f8v7whxfn51uu60babbpvrwljp44n4tmjht5z43a3tbkusnyej6lptmvx2dq4hzd7uomz16k787u4qot6ou9pjpvbsm8bgxnscppg0x70jmor5r0wcvj2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6upsz8wng6umfidajvnm80t2kuz4rpdd73h9fid6dd0oeucukl26kx9coyql5r00geomuq5xr4i6q4wtsionb8f0aocpp0gq07uv1t19rrpeb4ccdbxzj12gl1qkdv4ye4byvzmpyiserw31d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
| | Dear Friend, **No other place on earth has captured the world’s heart like Israel.** And in these difficult days, Israel greatly needs our help. The Scriptures tell us that **God Himself sets watchmen over Israel** , and we believe part of the way He does this is through the brave and ever-vigilant EMTs and paramedics of **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** , Israel’s Red Cross organization. To express our appreciation for your generous support, we**** will send you the **Dwell in the Land** **calendar** — a beautiful **work of art** that features stunning photography of Israel, including breathtaking images of biblical sites and modern landscapes. The powerful Scriptures and breathtaking photographs will inspire you and be a daily reminder to pray for Israel and the peace of Jerusalem (Psalm 122:6) — and to pray for the lifesaving work of **Israel’s emergency medical system**.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6upl5bky655b52eopdm14mazsyz41v0mfo4coash1nllindaquvplfroq4ozokui2swijmx8nfsblnjlwnq3fqgz7feluvotppg3hbh0csr47il85tfe4xht888y2nhhc8g22pmqgzuwmpy5g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
**Created and produced in Israel,** the charts and graphs in this beautiful calendar also walk you through the festivals and holidays that are celebrated in Israel and around the world. **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** ’s 35,000 paramedics and EMTs, 90% of whom are volunteers, safeguard the lives of every man, woman, and child in Israel. Your support makes their work possible. **** **When you help save lives in Israel** with****[**a gift of any amount**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6uqta7oiu3f3s8elfl8e0wi7kcz3za8grwq6hs6vmilz04efg20x11wkrymnwu1dm4fvo70h8u19wvntzcrhjwi9dmhxa1gwcw5abkae1tsrcb7bvm1io6a3tr29p4z4aoktx3ms2qwo5759z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h), we will send you this beautiful **Israel calendar** as our gift of appreciation.
[DONATE NOW TO GET YOUR CALENDAR ►](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6ur06ad6g2stdqfzm77uih3esgz39ftq1ezzq7i7wtlm3jfl9xte29cwt47le1wytf25d3su56xf5cald5ta1cjimdk7fwoa3ct9w7uvoutd9ts6j2m0vdsbcxhizjqpyt2j3fmtm5y400apy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
**Even more importantly, the people of Israel need your help today! Every terrorist** attack, every rocket attack, every car accident, every heart attack, and every baby delivered by a medic requires immediate help. Please support **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** : protecting, saving, and giving life.
| | [PLEASE GIVE NOW ►](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfjo286w8rqomxxeffrx9d6ulwc0ya4wsq63vbn1fqe7uwxmyzhyl6cl6090r67fwko740v8xxrnl251yi5cvn0cz2n4fkstrwbjb3vhsiascjjcgfk4sqcdor60whxzkw4ghu8rmakh9rk6fezhanv205ibnfi7x28fifd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=x488qlvnsrsu0n9j7jzkoczhy6k96rygeb7pe9os6bjjqamx29ed8cxmtf6re358oh1zz6vny0dw9c5snz4wfizr4wh486u23niieifqiz3fqrr36040kq4zk4l1js20dmstvg10m14lb5f8wnih78n55mj5flrdhky70h3pb7zrj4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sniill&__onlt=h)
---
| | |
---
MAGEN DAVID ADOM, Israel’s emergency medical services, provides emergency medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. MAGEN DAVID ADOM is saving lives in Israel every day. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Defend the next generation
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5mhijlu8klbke7mjj4ofot4gh7o9c6ni8cb0770_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zp5gti6f0hmskss8bdab8nqbul3jisc5tms5m0hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zp1vfmbrr2a1prldrebq7qi2o6p84p4riqg4h0i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd8ac5epi23n1nfjqa2ukg7vuqm4m0hv7jvgon18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrcdephrjebv7sprfg9ij3qpbs5eotckusuchpfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ze75p80pm89mnnae4plikooim9d5s4o8355ab9t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhm6or2c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
I need your name on this!

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zss1967tldum9inh7hmjffj729h11b98vrm43s48_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmepb0cjh2bs)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggjqkdfh65lb5tr89gb2mbuvo22ctel6cerq5tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmepb0cjh2bs)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg2dkirug9n9ddhk4p93919r0ahrkqtgjhlhs8b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmepb0cjh2bs)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z83fhgkcv487bu62fhtgae77qpq3q4ltjn6jsbi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmepb0cjh2bs)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7tsr5he0gbm4u5tmhpiisev23atk7cdqrg60vdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2clhmepb0cjh2bs)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: DOGE doesn't need to be a department
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_1&amount=25]
Team:
We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency.
This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability.
We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen.
Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
The reasons are clear: [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
* Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to.

* Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs.

* Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining."

* Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits.

* Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values.
Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=7UR7MCiwKVkvNRSXNycccZocg3MvmZjxvKv1FTucKpEaun8gYGDSEhIv1l2e0n7Zq5GUKrVM75nhLTXMjsQ3NRMZ31VXhMgz7LiMHr6bs1dCIaFPV1zB3oMhc2EFtAFDtQPIiejWNHc5%2FuB8%2Bsx9%2BWafqXe%2BIE6obtK5Rgco5ZoSt%2FzFWZNOa%2BqFWV8g9dy05pB%2FsznmbTvn3qKIg%2Fh9%2BtdUj17An%2BmHXZEgfwX1w58OAitYDf1ukRydkT2iRZ3IpeF7s1eWWAql4EDV4sETsW%2BrYpoZJbJKD4QRcN5NLp%2BT7gyc6NFULpBcGQ5vfSYjokQ106FDSWXl8Mh%2BO4krr9iiXJu0LueutYiGKowaFcHmL5Yoz9%2BJSBjJi0p3kvWr8AAq1prWMyXezph3RIwn2OyWSBs0jokfH5q%2FOItSXek%3D .

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3861dc776ae64b08b872c8345f99e2d6&_e=EemK64GyWtCWBHjdUsCebpXjJS0BSl5ebso2zj1Nr9Du7-2P8KCTURc29YIixAtWhSvRCxprRWtjcYSepfoLS2Yu6K08MRcqZvl0GVR11_XqYbXMLel_n3O7N5wz0JOjvffHhMflBNiQ1YHmobsnmsOb94VUUBg4T8rq0C7sT-ktMbOwAYpj2pTmlepqxRJ2kQwK83bi6_L8Nvl2nVxsguMyr75OOiY6FH_VEGZ2SHyFIifAXmhDjA2w4X4MB1Qm6zEa2bix3FDJtLtR1jcCZ3e_AWGanUeCmiOwuL3D2Cb7hGlzEOkg9Pn03tiLavmR_RCz5u5FC7D_-NjvKwH5JS8mQy1h8YTHz-lg1CWxZljKy4TIgvK3z8-1KTk67yc1WVJ0unDxUuru7mAyGeaXFw%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3861dc776ae64b08b872c8345f99e2d6&_e=EemK64GyWtCWBHjdUsCebpXjJS0BSl5ebso2zj1Nr9Du7-2P8KCTURc29YIixAtWhSvRCxprRWtjcYSepfoLS2Yu6K08MRcqZvl0GVR11_XqYbXMLel_n3O7N5wz0JOjvffHhMflBNiQ1YHmobsnmsOb94VUUBg4T8rq0C7sT-ktMbOwAYpj2pTmlepqxRJ2kQwK83bi6_L8Nvl2nVxsguMyr75OOiY6FH_VEGZ2SHyFIifAXmhDjA2w4X4MB1QmsfjCXg_qKUA3BfBnFFdV-5T1Wlo9UNyxHoulTtLGPKw7CtKcSQKsGJ0WCZPwKkb5ONT-BrWHG5HKhFleQbNK_iy-rfFgdJXIS3Qk7dzfRhB7jXMflQ5Sm3LuIwAQFC2ltoH1wcIvQaAkpm1TBxhGxA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3861dc776ae64b08b872c8345f99e2d6&_e=EemK64GyWtCWBHjdUsCebpXjJS0BSl5ebso2zj1Nr9Du7-2P8KCTURc29YIixAtWhSvRCxprRWtjcYSepfoLS2Yu6K08MRcqZvl0GVR11_XqYbXMLel_n3O7N5wz0JOjvffHhMflBNiQ1YHmobsnmsOb94VUUBg4T8rq0C7sT-ktMbOwAYpj2pTmlepqxRJ2kQwK83bi6_L8Nvl2nVxsguMyr75OOiY6FH_VEGZ2SHyFIifAXmhDjA2w4X4MB1QmK2p5CoJSVd52_Y6nZVVZpjPxWNEwWnWYBBGgX9PGP4nYS-fUb4sC_dh3idt72ut8FfWpKwJIWgI3U6VAx1YQxhzSYHHjk0YN5OaW8eJMTzMdpW4kBO6NmN76ErBCxi6U2TdDH4376kEQTz8WH4vmJA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3861dc776ae64b08b872c8345f99e2d6&_e=EemK64GyWtCWBHjdUsCebpXjJS0BSl5ebso2zj1Nr9Du7-2P8KCTURc29YIixAtWhSvRCxprRWtjcYSepfoLS2Yu6K08MRcqZvl0GVR11_XqYbXMLel_n3O7N5wz0JOjvffHhMflBNiQ1YHmobsnmsOb94VUUBg4T8rq0C7sT-ktMbOwAYpj2pTmlepqxRJ2kQwK83bi6_L8Nvl2nVxsguMyr75OOiY6FH_VEGZ2SHyFIifAXmhDjA2w4X4MB1Qmy-VvAkCd2-lvcEPc4u87wxlgN6iFv7EazcAekhtFJqw_Kl4TCS1cplNmV9gcpYNrPayxgJcWW96JbU8nBjEpTuoVIo93ejIeQ6MtWOsnPumBpHJ-OBCr0OEWyKAU4RpnwgmtTZ25xXFOhT4dAjw7LA%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

body:
New Mexico is the Democratic frontline

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=SIYz2xXhRy7m9ERfLUuX%2Bvb6GXazIfOhSCTbedVKozGSLwAHqekPLKDy%2Flh5q03h2wf7s7NOJZIQKXyAS7yo0%2FFE9JbpyHeEsPwUG8gmcIHu5CKxRR9tNLioenNaAFPxzfU5c1VgP%2Ff3xAIJ4ViiCNu217YU4ptYVhiE9339bwctoPJPXTJNEhD7Gar3oSpxuG8zQTeVCz0gkj2QKAZs%2F1JHe3sujp8WmVGYu%2FrMHNAN5tqozy3e1DMT1cY1ymMzW8F7euDWkyQcZAfazmqfPnYwcwzgHyXmqk2f9SKNAVsdJAIAdiihIYv4VkopXlWqK299l1%2Ftg%2B9%2FTgevtLKgCrgXQ4onKRlG%2F%2BV8tZ%2FzWWJpBfnR%2FBm1Ux0rhhlLJXuNDH08vtFD5vMlBgGjhorkZVKDA42VC9fwbI405y0vgZ0%3D)

Saludos, Thanksgiving is four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride with so many ups and downs throughout the election cycle. It has been an unprecedented year from start to end, as I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way. Make no mistake, New Mexico is a frontline for Democrats, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans. So we need to start gearing up for the new term right now — because that’s what it’s going to take to continue fighting for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico. clean_body: New Mexico is the Democratic frontline Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, Thanksgiving is four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride with so many ups and downs throughout the election cycle. It has been an unprecedented year from start to end, as I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way. Make no mistake, New Mexico is a frontline for Democrats, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans. So we need to start gearing up for the new term right now — because that’s what it’s going to take to continue fighting for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Mark Warner
subject: 183 votes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
That’s how close Lily Franklin was to flipping Virginia’s 41st House District.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97641824/514097518/1734299835?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FranklinSplit_241125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyODJlMC00OWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Draf8njNRCrXczGLmKJ4yO_blh0CqUSQ6WxL2aamcEw=) Derek,

Did you know that in 2023, one of the closest elections in the Commonwealth was decided by only 183 votes?

Virginia’s 41st House District was considered “unwinnable” for Democrats, but Lily Franklin came only 183 votes short of flipping it blue. Now, she’s running again – and this time, we’re going to make sure she wins it.

[_**Will you split a donation of $10 right now to help Lily Franklin win so Democrats can expand their majority in the Virginia House of Delegates?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97641825/514097519/1734299835?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FranklinSplit_241125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyODJlMC00OWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Draf8njNRCrXczGLmKJ4yO_blh0CqUSQ6WxL2aamcEw=)

If Lily wins we’d flip a seat in the chamber – which don’t get me wrong, is great. But it’s not all that this race is about.

It’s about making sure that Virginians in Richmond are supported. It’s about building a brighter future for working families – helping them deal with rising costs, giving them the aid they need to buy or rent a home, protecting reproductive health care so folks can safely start and raise a family, and making sure our kids can get a great education.

Lily is a true champion for Virginians and I have no doubt that she will work tirelessly to move the Commonwealth forward and stand on the right side of progress.

[_**Can you split a contribution of $5, $10, or more to support Lily’s campaign? Remember Derek, 183 votes in 2023. We can win this thing.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97641826/514097520/1734299835?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FranklinSplit_241125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyODJlMC00OWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Draf8njNRCrXczGLmKJ4yO_blh0CqUSQ6WxL2aamcEw=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97641827/514097521/1734299835?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FranklinSplit_241125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyODJlMC00OWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Draf8njNRCrXczGLmKJ4yO_blh0CqUSQ6WxL2aamcEw=)****

name: Attorney General-elect Dan Rayfield
subject: Thank you for your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Rayfield
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/oregonian-issues-endorsement-for-attorney-general-20963317?e=1768325bd4)
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter, I wanted to say thank you for your support through contributions, some amazing events, and spreading our message to your networks. With house parties, meet and greets, site visits, and events like the Pendleton Round-Up bringing us to cities from Portland to Otis to Umatilla, we learned so much from everyone we met.

As Attorney General, my focus every day will be on serving the people of Oregon - no matter what corner of the state they live in, or who they voted for. Together, we will work to build safer communities, protect seniors, consumers and working families, and stand up against national threats to Oregon’s values, including safeguarding our abortion rights, defending democracy, and taking on big polluters.

It is a tremendous honor to have the trust of Oregonians to serve as their next Attorney General. Thank you to all those who dedicated their time, energy and resources to our campaign. I am excited about what we can accomplish together. We will always be listening, and looking for ways the Oregon Department of Justice can better serve our state and all Oregonians.

To read our full statement from election night, click [here](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=3d3a94475c&e=1768325bd4).

Thank you again for your support and for believing in me and our campaign. We will see you soon.
---
|

With house parties, meet and greets, site visits, and events like the Pendleton Round-Up bringing us to cities from Portland to Otis to Umatilla, we learned so much from everyone we met. As Attorney General, my focus every day will be on serving the people of Oregon - no matter what corner of the state they live in, or who they voted for. Together, we will work to build safer communities, protect seniors, consumers and working families, and stand up against national threats to Oregon’s values, including safeguarding our abortion rights, defending democracy, and taking on big polluters. It is a tremendous honor to have the trust of Oregonians to serve as their next Attorney General. Thank you to all those who dedicated their time, energy and resources to our campaign. I am excited about what we can accomplish together. We will always be listening, and looking for ways the Oregon Department of Justice can better serve our state and all Oregonians. To read our full statement from election night, click . Thank you again for your support and for believing in me and our campaign. We will see you soon. | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | Paid for by Friends of Dan Rayfield PO Box 2284, Corvallis, OR 97339 | | | Copyright © 2024 Friends of Dan Rayfield, All rights reserved. Friends, We are updating our email delivery service and you are receiving this email because you are signed up to receive my newsletter. This is a required email to initiate the transfer of service. I hope all is well and I look forward to sending you my next update. Take care, Dan. Our mailing address is: Friends of Dan Rayfield PO Box 2284 Corvallis, OR 97339 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Friends of Dan Rayfield PO Box 2284 Corvallis, OR 97339 * USA

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I was ready to fight on January 6th. I still am today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, this is me on January 6th.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-re%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.pJ5QoL&refcode=em241125-1-30&t=1&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k)
I never imagined that I’d need to use what I learned in the Marine Corps to protect myself and my colleagues on the floor of the House of Representatives 15 years after I left Iraq.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker — something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
Maybe it is the Marine in me, but I will always fight for our democracy. I'd have done it in the Capitol that day — and I will fight as hard as I can for you and for our democracy as Arizona’s Senator.
I won’t lie to you. It’s going to be tough. But as I prepare to be sworn in next January, you have my word that I won’t back down. I’m not afraid of tough fights, and I’ll be out there on my own if I have to.
But it would give me a lot of peace of mind if I knew that this team still had my back. So, if I can count on you in the months ahead, please:
[**Can you make a recurring donation to my campaign so that we can figure out how to budget and sustain our operations for the long haul? It’s going to take all of us working together to hold the line against Trump, and it would mean a lot to have you with me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-re%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.pJ5QoL&refcode=em241125-1-30&t=2&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k)
[BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-re%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.pJ5QoL&refcode=em241125-1-30&t=3&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k)
And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can always count on me to be on the front lines.
Thanks for your help. And as always...
Semper Fi.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=4&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=3578_734936_Hfoy_k&akid=3578%2E734936%2EHfoy_k)

name: Roger Ream
subject: We need new press
body:
Correcting the MSM Mistake
They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year.
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ba89fa51704a4beba0976a2f466793e5&_e=Gj9WErWfnUdsuy2E2wm8WjW1WEBhb4LwH1i1IIYE6wFXBurRc9wet5jszIPaYmgsvXdQ9nAsX5dg_Un1eN772-NMhpC-b0vdub-MOd1TlMdXDUIc-VsYH2Pp5JUe_2HI3ZxRXIST9ciY6GCQkA1CPLjnRtzlJKQ77JmvoI7Z5vy0EYjCVrmkk-Jj9sI-LGLZDkKBEwuBUFUznKJmFlwM6EHmaSjxFmgfT0OFh6zFFaSfEUWKbzyhXyxSi59MWPjzrQAGHzSAcIHpJBG_qYcp_3m5YMP5YpUZcnTl_nKDu-mG-0WhVUtKfyez4DVwCvK1)
---
Peter, They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year. When President Biden refused to step aside, the left-wing media dismissed concerns about his mental acuity. They said Biden was as sharp as a tack.

When assassins came for President Trump, they minimized the threats.

And when Kamala Harris flip-flopped on critical issues, the mainstream media covered for her. They let her skip interviews, ignore questions, and do whatever she wanted. Peter, if this great country is going to endure, we NEED an honest press. That’s why The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), is training, educating, and helping young conservative journalists pursue careers in the profession. We help these journalists learn how to make a difference with fellowships, internships, the Student Journalism Association, and so much more. This year showed how essential it is that we get more conservatives into the media. [**Will you help us do that by donating anything you can right now?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ba89fa51704a4beba0976a2f466793e5&_e=Gj9WErWfnUdsuy2E2wm8WjW1WEBhb4LwH1i1IIYE6wFXBurRc9wet5jszIPaYmgsvXdQ9nAsX5dg_Un1eN772-NMhpC-b0vdub-MOd1TlMdXDUIc-VsYH2Pp5JUe_2HI3ZxRXIST9ciY6GCQkA1CPKy2obHnFSCLak1tyP8qs8IDgRrQ0lxfV3T2VMUCt7vKA0C2RGrVmddrGkCUq32G4X6W_g8ZoVry1wVO_qbLXvwH-3LUnJZFnONg8bI7EdpUdnwM2t72dwQWyEwUZ9QRWFV30E_vhpyR3syTYrj9zqc_-EBEvH7gC3Rst-DedM0z) For decades, we’ve helped young journalists succeed. Our fellowships and internships gave our alumni the foot in the door they need. And because of that, they’re now hosting shows and writing for some of the biggest publishers in the business. That means they’re working for The Wall Street Journal, FOX News, Reason, The Federalist, CNN, The Daily Caller, The Washington Post, and so much more.

But, Peter, we need to do more. That’s why we launched the Student Journalism Association last year. We’re empowering brave young student journalists to fight leftist lies and propaganda on their campuses. And we’ll help them kick star their careers, so that there will be more reporters with moral courage in the media across the country.

But, we need your help to do that. We’re supporting dozens of conservative student journalists on 21 college campuses. [Peter](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ba89fa51704a4beba0976a2f466793e5&_e=Gj9WErWfnUdsuy2E2wm8Wkndac2eoO2vwo6tgFWhASRD1skir19AltuyIWWPB5sGvZxFXvOosEKNgOro91aiGkGMb24nstpcKouF6KxEp8f7no45iKIBbRsM4eD_cW-hoNs8mPiGAHpUWW4wBR3WhEvxMto5isvdKVzotCHp3VDpYaBeSdCs1x8ppkhwlYd_2AZGLtyOugoTmHOhYsxNAU-S3YSDXCPBMOzEBAyiOoA%3D)[, will you help us grow that network, so we can fight for a future where the media isn’t pushing propaganda for the left-wing establishment? Please, donate right now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ba89fa51704a4beba0976a2f466793e5&_e=Gj9WErWfnUdsuy2E2wm8WjW1WEBhb4LwH1i1IIYE6wFXBurRc9wet5jszIPaYmgsvXdQ9nAsX5dg_Un1eN772-NMhpC-b0vdub-MOd1TlMdXDUIc-VsYH2Pp5JUe_2HI3ZxRXIST9ciY6GCQkA1CPLzTVGkVKPPPJzAzPMcHL_92PZ5hNYI559NQGMWFTy2KLyDf-caknt-LQZG7mCaz1nHWV_rMsUOzCyW4-D0nLap0mMX_LIXxfbpvswHLEbSxRwHlFgX_EEOp1viCD07r27-_p-ro484vxrhkGvQgh01NcBfJF3RYRXBRMrir_V0z)

Sincerely,
Roger Ream
President The Fund for American Studies

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf9d08e8422e4cb09eef5e50f086dfcd&_e=V-IYH46_VDgGwfAzmXDgT79jpUuuZuOssxJEOwBL6ebXgBiYaBATlHj-31zp6cbBUcjFJOR6Xi7WA7FJNvGwP40kPU2n88oexdut9o0XZ6iFdLsX6T6FaTcCu158r7Dq0ugllPMX7rFZmepUWfeWAJ_Lh1pz7g0mK6xCC-kPw9ufcM7lgjh8XYUM048GDYYMq0GM9RJlDc6RQvNars1mVYCHS3thMK6rL57myyQfXxkLjbz3DPI4D_Sm78pOaBRDCaraTfsg2rjiO4lF8Nkya8aLyB0KKY513hejszbHZbJtmp5IB2u2xqjuhowCkCBCcNmfyrQK6fsIs3-VRazlhg0DStEvn34E_rqAJcPoKTHvAx60cBPRx00N5gIOUYymPKSrY0zmT7vWxmQDdlDeWNxFMAD8BoZXpE8Xpv_wHz0%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf9d08e8422e4cb09eef5e50f086dfcd&_e=V-IYH46_VDgGwfAzmXDgT79jpUuuZuOssxJEOwBL6ebXgBiYaBATlHj-31zp6cbBUcjFJOR6Xi7WA7FJNvGwP40kPU2n88oexdut9o0XZ6iFdLsX6T6FaTcCu158r7Dq0ugllPMX7rFZmepUWfeWAJ_Lh1pz7g0mK6xCC-kPw9ufcM7lgjh8XYUM048GDYYMq0GM9RJlDc6RQvNars1mVYCHS3thMK6rL57myyQfXxkLjbz3DPI4D_Sm78pOaBRDkPLcusEIlIr2zEXDkileZera_ra7G70fxXyUxeAvIJP6iinTPHADld0CZpU8ZHU1-Ymni9yyNyBE7KdZGHZioJ2z_nExkQT0CL1oLU6h5YG4rPSv7hw3m5i9qg4kaAyFxLnar7gh8AGb1LwGVZVspwK3Mcw8l34iFfhDdf9uBPU%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf9d08e8422e4cb09eef5e50f086dfcd&_e=V-IYH46_VDgGwfAzmXDgT79jpUuuZuOssxJEOwBL6ebXgBiYaBATlHj-31zp6cbBUcjFJOR6Xi7WA7FJNvGwP40kPU2n88oexdut9o0XZ6iFdLsX6T6FaTcCu158r7Dq0ugllPMX7rFZmepUWfeWAJ_Lh1pz7g0mK6xCC-kPw9ufcM7lgjh8XYUM048GDYYMq0GM9RJlDc6RQvNars1mVYCHS3thMK6rL57myyQfXxkLjbz3DPI4D_Sm78pOaBRDxE1H0UT27DbddABus146ZI-MBJMfy7eXU29NAoW0isBES6V1pfROqDkrArYcKK8eR09TXTyiYHT9XsQ_WR-EBwCxai_4UcN_X5ROebKUpPHy-JJ7ibur2Nxd3euztC2ta2z3TC6mgnf_Hr20pehqykLJi1JD8OOcWG9C7nw3r_E%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf9d08e8422e4cb09eef5e50f086dfcd&_e=V-IYH46_VDgGwfAzmXDgT79jpUuuZuOssxJEOwBL6ebXgBiYaBATlHj-31zp6cbBUcjFJOR6Xi7WA7FJNvGwP40kPU2n88oexdut9o0XZ6iFdLsX6T6FaTcCu158r7Dq0ugllPMX7rFZmepUWfeWAJ_Lh1pz7g0mK6xCC-kPw9ufcM7lgjh8XYUM048GDYYMq0GM9RJlDc6RQvNars1mVYCHS3thMK6rL57myyQfXxkLjbz3DPI4D_Sm78pOaBRDMVMrXtU7cp-Mko-LnFdAmugWQuzZnyXReUpBpGMKJAqvZfGZqbPhJzzi9u-P9eu3YYBQqkJ8RAbQ7g-L08nYnF3dMM8tLT4bSP6b1jUjnu_3Wn5BzmPvdug5ZH2UndeWWgRhSh5OPsRuKnGwv2RjG6cW2HeDoEL93KdtVhrD9OA%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

name: James Carville
subject: I'm waiting with bated breath to see if you'll respond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville here.

We're at a crossroads for our democracy, and I need to hear from the MOST passionate Democrats to help shape our strategy for the battles ahead. That includes YOU. [**So please, click here to take my strategy survey right away.**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&akid=19023%2E9716520%2EKo-un6)

| | [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&akid=19023%2E9716520%2EKo-un6)
---

I just turned 80, so you better believe I've seen a lotta crazy stuff go down in politics -- but I won't lie, this year's election had my stomach in more knots than a kitten's yarn. **Now it's more important than ever that we make a plan to stop Trump, flip the Senate, and keep pushing forward.**

I'm waiting with bated breath to see how this team responds -- **because if we don't get fired the hell up, the Senate could be putty in Trump's tiny hands for his entire presidency.**

We can't let that happen, and that's why I selected you to take my **brand new strategy survey****.** I need to hear firsthand from Democrats across the country -- not more pundits in DC!! -- so I can help my friends at the DSCC lead the charge against MAGA Republicans and win back the Senate.

**Will you calm my nerves by being one of the first to take my new survey and proving that we're not gonna back down to Trump's wackos?** [**www.dscc.org/StrategySurvey**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&akid=19023%2E9716520%2EKo-un6)

| [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&akid=19023%2E9716520%2EKo-un6)
---

Thank you,

\- James

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241125-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-ETG-sl1&akid=19023%2E9716520%2EKo-un6)

Friend,
It is almost time for the **Annual Republican Party of Virginia Advance**! One of the key highlights will be a panel on **Leftist Money in Politics** featuring **Scott Walter** , author of an exposé revealing how an opaque network funnels hundreds of millions to support Democrats and progressive causes.
As the _New York Times_ describes, this network shapes elections through a daisy chain of groups. With the election season here, it’s vital we understand the forces influencing our political system. Scott Walter will equip you with the knowledge to make informed decisions for the future of our republic.
Join the panel at **10:00AM in the Washington Room** at the Kimpton Forum Hotel in Charlottesville!
---

clean_body: | | | | Secure your tickets today Friend, It is almost time for the Annual Republican Party of Virginia Advance! One of the key highlights will be a panel on Leftist Money in Politics featuring Scott Walter , author of an exposé revealing how an opaque network funnels hundreds of millions to support Democrats and progressive causes. As the New York Times describes, this network shapes elections through a daisy chain of groups. With the election season here, it’s vital we understand the forces influencing our political system. Scott Walter will equip you with the knowledge to make informed decisions for the future of our republic. Join the panel at 10:00AM in the Washington Room at the Kimpton Forum Hotel in Charlottesville! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel & Omni are officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder: A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2VEolD53QMNJFKleDBBSDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJ0LmP0SGaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTI0MTExMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MTEyNSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWxvZ29XA3NwY0IKZz8vrERnlq9mgVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ADXUzZYoqmzxo-9BJbMtDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJ0LmP0SIaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTI0MTExMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MTEyNSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlMVcDc3BjQgpnPy-sRGeWr2aBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jVS8chyAnWE9F0Z6NcrKqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJ0LmP0SIaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTI0MTExMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MTEyNSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlMlcDc3BjQgpnPy-sRGeWr2aBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? | | | ~ "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. ~~ SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. subject: ICYMI: Here’s what year-round organizing looks like for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97644898/514104595/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODJjOC00ZWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GzrKoBRkLeiAcjyzYK98Ibi9IRuTxK5lRXoI_S6HpZE=&emci=947e59b2-45ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=4df682c8-4eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=5534179)
---

| | The thing about Movement Labs and our signature project, Contest Every Race, is that our work doesn't stop after Election Night. **We organize through wins and we organize through losses.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97644900/514104596/-327605227?refcode=2024-11-25-stop&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4df682c8-4eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODJjOC00ZWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GzrKoBRkLeiAcjyzYK98Ibi9IRuTxK5lRXoI_S6HpZE=) And this one was a tough loss across the board. But each time an election doesn't go our way, we put in the work to gain more and more votes until we finally get that win. And to do that, organizing can't just happen in the three months before an election. It has to happen all year long. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97644902/514104597/-327605227?refcode=2024-11-25-stop&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4df682c8-4eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODJjOC00ZWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GzrKoBRkLeiAcjyzYK98Ibi9IRuTxK5lRXoI_S6HpZE=) Here's what that looks like for us:
* Giving $500 grants each quarter to our over 300 county Democratic parties that actively participate in the program
* Recruiting thousands of people to run for Mayor, City Council, State Rep, and more in the off-year elections
* Supporting rural and red district Democrats with time, money, and infrastructure
* Putting thousands of volunteers on the doors to develop face-to-face relationships with voters over the long haul

We will always be an on-the-ground-365-days-a-year organization! _Sarah_ Sarah Long

clean_body: | | | | The thing about Movement Labs and our signature project, Contest Every Race, is that our work doesn't stop after Election Night. We organize through wins and we organize through losses. = And this one was a tough loss across the board. But each time an election doesn't go our way, we put in the work to gain more and more votes until we finally get that win. And to do that, organizing can't just happen in the three months before an election. It has to happen all year long. = Here's what that looks like for us: Giving $500 grants each quarter to our over 300 county Democratic parties that actively participate in the program Recruiting thousands of people to run for Mayor, City Council, State Rep, and more in the off-year elections Supporting rural and red district Democrats with time, money, and infrastructure Putting thousands of volunteers on the doors to develop face-to-face relationships with voters over the long haul We will always be an on-the-ground-365-days-a-year organization! Sarah Sarah Long Director of Development Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Movement Labs instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
I need your name on this!

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zusvss583kk7u7t7hl1h5i12k8rr47ucufhg1d2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znubqk08shi8km23e3r4lpi1oattlcsjipl04vjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0jv0r5srobcidpu8qdc2nlnvetc1iq2gacbna40_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqip15jl2jt4926fep85qjsv7vdorh2rd6uj97kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaj8mheuv29dp05f39g4i7hdmidcqmijs075n86g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu2fijiuj99p0ta40nb8lqmbocquuhg3mn4q3lh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4etg0nlpdr14a2gl2vc04k31555megk15nakthg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm4o32chh2bs)
| | |
---

__

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

Peter – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=97b369b28439475a813672ac891134f5&_e=nNM-tPftUtdv8Id1iSBnu73DInDjR894I7Zq51U8mHzGDCT7MlmKTfTlk1qwHdnBir-U3wAYVvt0hmKUYB8LSBRpR_6uHjj9hhYn6jVm5TcOCtc10B0F6a5OgMjuVhNLb9ltYHm-BcjJfrYWLv5PbS-czqX2QuiDwPbstqWWAM8x9XcMx4IdYJEQ4yWFo7WkhLxQFeoOnaBN-TBYMrVbueIYb0I6iERD9QvgDfG0jLCiDoOBppYbsehcZL2TxQpI13v8ouhjXBmi43s-huOoxt5iVHaWaihv_M9v9dbP6K85z4ZH5tWfdNa7pitz1do80l6BgLv_LR_Ti4-qu84KVCo3VBLfXDoCCO6V1ImiVMyTqzb81pXUltIis2RA9S_iKyBH01dBipFcrKKYQmyir23sJgNd2AdyNTQSWYcC0C8%3D)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=97b369b28439475a813672ac891134f5&_e=nNM-tPftUtdv8Id1iSBnu73DInDjR894I7Zq51U8mHzGDCT7MlmKTfTlk1qwHdnBir-U3wAYVvt0hmKUYB8LSBRpR_6uHjj9hhYn6jVm5TcOCtc10B0F6a5OgMjuVhNLb9ltYHm-BcjJfrYWLv5PbS-czqX2QuiDwPbstqWWAM8x9XcMx4IdYJEQ4yWFo7WkhLxQFeoOnaBN-TBYMrVbueIYb0I6iERD9QvgDfG0jLCiDoOBppYbsehcZL2TxQpILT7WgOugywaC1_SK-IuziyzUbhBhe8nT4PbYMjOry0MAXy1pwZs2rFTsYQMr1kFfYd_0bpFZIF0gI6TlaCEzQlRm283E-RxgfsNUfCfrIPynX-8Peh2awsjnoBzfzNDtiO4omTRJOU1ZaqRd2tnBUX7tdhzPNH6o6i5IODlIUWE%3D)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Peter — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.

clean_body: | | | | Peter – President Trump just won the most decisive landslide victory this country has seen in decades. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action. That’s why I’m pushing to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government. On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – a building they own – to peacefully, and patriotically protest discrepancies in an Election... Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: and they deserve better. This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this. Peter — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours. Will you answer the call? . Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us! Yours Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene | | | %unsubscribeurl% |

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Free my police officer son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKnC7J9lKdqG2a8CweZe9uvApNRFRnXbWV54XkdSo0jOprd9SVUGpsQ3sFFmEz5NK5VY307NEyk1wnFHG5aNs-qnepUQaxnUPpFL_jMxh1SYRd5CL8TdPpTB2eBLuNvgaaCH5aQgQ-p7JRfsDGSCMDreg%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKnLLCy4dGhOzqPs3Nz2a97i8D-uQed83A18pceUkuotqZIqN_8DjFoPfRpcwF3-68mXLMbXLpv-N8Nc8gaTuAl19aSrpMFO6gzXfTLglrs2Gdt15RF2QT7_3XToPKLlnIle7PJCFkEgyZ28YfmbQvWgQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKnG_r3M7qJnN-_F2X02n-WizAZoNs-pWUJpMdV_6zQMygWC573clBxFpnGkyxvCZv_iVd-LjuPzRs_i7vWoWVQXpHJ0pZGxBFckkcIu0Z25si8-28lXtfpmYy-9iiYEwv_oOhDA49YA9hvv060puVREg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKn9L-B7NyS3kHAHp7cHt_DlTQ40tsLLmI0MZE-H6oVLwgLWi9PmINqWqCuUsUYymbHydYI6D_apeiYqU1UeLchJ95dNkQxqbPpTaEDpGm6bQHu0j4A-Y8ZZP_TFeHwM5Yn2MgZH1e0Ac0EWjB1oSCHRQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKnvjhI1m7aiYqq3TaHjzrwhGzCQNXdFJu93-6AeeUgP5JsGKEEiPokmKEeICpgD-AKyYSpEbdTFuKyOy1RoALWtL7nlZKyGwnJocxwz7-ReBiNv2ZbJX4ZkF0YHN0OWkolWM_xHB6098p-AQjTR57xWA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLcBIfOY0TEbY48J0ltLv6XAqDwcL8mh9_3lZycJ7gPWPjoAV8QvkviAvsjEvR_Gna5cwXu-D8h_HaZFfTZ-cEEdrtRYRYrhW3o_ChPwpSVAO2Q1pOuuSUT2aT1AcvJn4uSd73AQfWN3mykR47Kh55rDU8GuJolSCz2r9CiGUYooI3Y-STVEVVRzmkLoElJu9ugBKtMLmZ92oYktpANg1gv5nYnGoIbUUo3b_2fLrGJKnzfd4_-4BZnsrjj2BFnuwsyYZE-iXHWeRNRg1QuBsQgEzXsS8js5OJTZ9xybJtiYiUgsTARgOfCWzUnVGjRAC9t-TRFC7LDDW0HxUROclJ9dhBRsweUz_32Otu2PVR2Rm7UftKRe6cIKKyntrxhxVGg%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_e=bV2I7s_P5-z9FHmFrvDaLQe4HJv8Mssy1wK_czzibitzpQJ5Wp9E4DhKQWgLNyt1PTz4U0R9r6cO1ly-GyYpeH5amXxsGtz0cZqJYpitjhflDaAE-oDif1OiB5ouDkaFfMAJcSDWiCKe-DKP9E8MGR0xwn0oLYD7sfXNZ6Fh2qtOzy6dWAum-qV7yCM2QN3lGewZeNrH3w6O_i0cpQw-XA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=be60f82146344ee481802b47d73da55a&_t=msldOcazUVWU7d_BryjD2jqD-R0KtQVgQSQGbipsWR-wZa8GHi2FCpupAsvOu8zm45At3qFW2tPxgwlkIb-4jHyDPBQiCkcTUoaMcigPRWSl4jbID4RACx15msUvvl7P)
