* **TOP NEWS**

"**Mexican cartels use app for asylum seekers to hunt kidnap victims,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Jason Buch** -- "In early March, **Pedro Arandia** , a 29-year-old from Venezuela, and his two young nieces crossed the Suchiate River on Mexico's southern border, paying the equivalent of $30 to be rowed from the Guatemalan side.

They stepped off the boat -- and right into the arms of gangsters.

"That was my first experience getting kidnapped in Mexico," Arandia said in a recent interview at a migrant shelter in Matamoros, just across the Rio Grande from Brownsville.

The one-time delivery driver said he and his nieces, 11 and 14, were taken to a building with small, crowded concrete rooms the kidnappers called "chicken coops."

They were released once he paid the $100-per-person ransom -- a pittance compared to a later ransom his family was forced to pay.

Arandia said he'd heard about Mexican immigration officials preventing asylum seekers from going north, so they avoided bus lines, where they would have been easy to identify as immigrants. He and his nieces sometimes traveled by foot and slept outdoors. It took them a month to make it to Mexico City, he said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/0811e1fe-a69b-423e-ab5c-f253b42f64c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In the Mexican capital, they found a large community of expats planning to seek asylum in the U.S. Arandia learned from them that Mexican officials wouldn't let them go any farther north without an appointment from the U.S. government, for which he needed a smartphone app called CBP One. So he installed it on his phone. (CBP stands for U.S. Customs and Border Protection.)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/0811e1fe-a69b-423e-ab5c-f253b42f64c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Arandia, who said he fled Venezuela because of its collapsing economy and increasing lawlessness, received notice in early May that he had been approved for an appointment in three weeks at the port of entry between Matamoros and Brownsville.

He purchased plane tickets to Reynosa, a border city near McAllen, because he was afraid taking a bus would make them easier targets for kidnapping.

He was right to be wary. In Reynosa, he and his nieces had to take a bus to Matamoros -- there was no flight. Only a few minutes after buying their tickets, three men approached them in the middle of the crowded bus station. One of the men grabbed his youngest niece.

"And he says to me, 'Keep quiet or face the consequences,' and he shows me the gun in his waistband," Arandia said.

At both the airport and the bus station, Arandia had to show his CBP One appointment to purchase tickets. He believes one of the ticket agents tipped off the kidnappers.

Asylum seekers and employees of non-governmental organizations that work with immigrants said in interviews they believe criminal gangs target people who have appointments through CBP One, one of the very few ways the U.S. government permits people to claim asylum at southwest border ports of entry.

Because asylum seekers need CBP One appointments to travel through Mexico, it's easy to track their movements and set them up for kidnapping and extortion." They were released once he paid the $100-per-person ransom -- a pittance compared to a later ransom his family was forced to pay. Arandia said he'd heard about Mexican immigration officials preventing asylum seekers from going north, so they avoided bus lines, where they would have been easy to identify as immigrants. He and his nieces sometimes traveled by foot and slept outdoors. It took them a month to make it to Mexico City, he said. In the Mexican capital, they found a large community of expats planning to seek asylum in the U.S. Arandia learned from them that Mexican officials wouldn't let them go any farther north without an appointment from the U.S. government, for which he needed a smartphone app called CBP One. So he installed it on his phone. (CBP stands for U.S. Customs and Border Protection.) Arandia, who said he fled Venezuela because of its collapsing economy and increasing lawlessness, received notice in early May that he had been approved for an appointment in three weeks at the port of entry between Matamoros and Brownsville. He purchased plane tickets to Reynosa, a border city near McAllen, because he was afraid taking a bus would make them easier targets for kidnapping. He was right to be wary. In Reynosa, he and his nieces had to take a bus to Matamoros -- there was no flight. Only a few minutes after buying their tickets, three men approached them in the middle of the crowded bus station. One of the men grabbed his youngest niece. "And he says to me, 'Keep quiet or face the consequences,' and he shows me the gun in his waistband," Arandia said. At both the airport and the bus station, Arandia had to show his CBP One appointment to purchase tickets. He believes one of the ticket agents tipped off the kidnappers. Asylum seekers and employees of non-governmental organizations that work with immigrants said in interviews they believe criminal gangs target people who have appointments through CBP One, one of the very few ways the U.S. government permits people to claim asylum at southwest border ports of entry. Because asylum seekers need CBP One appointments to travel through Mexico, it's easy to track their movements and set them up for kidnapping and extortion." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: We need you activated, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Hey Peter— it’s time to get off the sidelines.
Trump’s going to purge any senior flag officers he perceives as “disloyal” when he retakes office. He’s going to use Purity Boards to do it — collections of what will probably be the most extreme true believers you can think of redlining any Three- or Four-Star General or Admiral they want out.
These Purity Boards will exist outside of the Military. They will report directly to Trump. They’ll have no checks on their power. And they will single out any and all senior officers that they believe will be loyal to the Constitution above Trump.
Do you want a direct path to permanently degrading our National Security, doing deep and lasting damage to the office corps? Do you want “Yes Men” and “Yes Women” who will roll over to Trump’s every command — with no consideration for the Constitution, civil rights, or the honor and dignity that serving in the most powerful Military in history demands?
Hell no.
Trump’s going to do everything he can to destroy the Military and remake it in his image. And we’re going to do everything we can to make sure the country knows that his administration is not just politicizing the Military, it’s not just getting rid of our most essential and seasoned officers.
This is the most serious threat environment any of us have seen in our lifetime. And Trump’s purge of the Military will make each and every American less safe.
We need you active, Peter. We need you speaking out about this. And we need you with us.
If every single Veteran, every member of a Military Family, every supporter reading this email signed on we would have hundreds of thousands of people speaking out against Trump and these ridiculous and dangerous plans.
But not everyone will join us. That’s why it’s so important that you do, if you understand how serious this is.
[**Please, Peter. Add your name and join VoteVets and the ranks of Americans speaking out against Trump’s “Purity Boards” and his goal to destroy the Military.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241125-1-30&akid=33993%2E3013755%2EkCSrsG)**
| [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241125-1-30&akid=33993%2E3013755%2EkCSrsG)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=33993%2E3013755%2EkCSrsG).

subject: Sign Our Congrats Card Today!

body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=758a5be1fc374fbfa51ced197e828b16&_e=_Z2wzV4GSsLYdfqMrgYQkFJvY2eBRPbLCy5aRfoCo7x5OB2HotalsML3waaOOGymSSpGJ8N9pl0PO1juH3F2J-x0FbaDlW9w1bpUg0660KXxZSTlBoUfgaYb3ygX_3FOdHH52ny4w6lfr4Pg7bvQ_rtRUl5qpAY1o2Cv4wJq3d1twOaP8Taxxcfyr8dWvWwYfntosmIszqFH2MYaV59oKstoJOCi6RVgKCuVDZlaby-FO9DIiu7ukhZM2vXLh_iE_A_EBtVbdUIQfXxAAswKeNxrsVfHTEGGCC8I1gtEPK-jPT8eV0z4uQZZtONTdhdMtRoujduJe2fk4K7MpFxK6pxHToQJ4CBNWeGuJWrgVPY%3D)

Patriot,

We hope this message finds you well and filled with the same pride and optimism that we're feeling for our country today! It's a new day in America, and together, we're going to Make America Great Again!

As proud patriots who believe in the principles that make America exceptional--freedom, hard work, and faith--we have a chance to come together and show our support for our new 47th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump! President Trump has achieved something truly remarkable, and now, we want you to join us in celebrating his long-awaited success in a personal way by signing a special congratulations card.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=758a5be1fc374fbfa51ced197e828b16&_e=_Z2wzV4GSsLYdfqMrgYQkFJvY2eBRPbLCy5aRfoCo7x5OB2HotalsML3waaOOGymSSpGJ8N9pl0PO1juH3F2J-x0FbaDlW9w1bpUg0660KXxZSTlBoUfgaYb3ygX_3FOdHH52ny4w6lfr4Pg7bvQ_iXpQ3umJdANK2JfpXw7wl9AKC-bnNw7P4tnd8ESqJ9w8014fStQKPaCMVsiUrZ6kP-vGdnWPP8sK2lhnMK6QYXH3GPR18TU9NodKz95hRFqUQF5Gx1BRIm_4z2OwO42h8lf0E-Yi7OYdZi1Nbk2e3lWNYoGftcOjzlzy5Jr45MH4fZsWb8l37nrO3BJOLcfKg%3D%3D)

---

This isn't just a simple gesture; it's a statement of our shared values. It's about showing our appreciation for those who stand strong for the causes we hold dear--those who fight for limited government, individual liberty, and the preservation of the American Dream. your signature is a reflection of your commitment to those principles and your pride in our great nation!

We've seen firsthand how challenging these times can be, but moments like these remind us why we must continue to stand together. By signing this card, you're letting President Trump know that you're with him, support our MAGA movement and are helping push forward the mission that will preserve the greatness of this nation for future generations.

As conservatives, we understand the power of grassroots support, and that's exactly what this is. It's a chance for you to add your voice to a wave of support that will remind our America-First leaders--and our country--that we're not backing down.

**[Take a moment to sign our personal congratulations card today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=758a5be1fc374fbfa51ced197e828b16&_e=_Z2wzV4GSsLYdfqMrgYQkFJvY2eBRPbLCy5aRfoCo7x5OB2HotalsML3waaOOGymSSpGJ8N9pl0PO1juH3F2J-x0FbaDlW9w1bpUg0660KXxZSTlBoUfgaYb3ygX_3FOdHH52ny4w6lfr4Pg7bvQ_rtRUl5qpAY1o2Cv4wJq3d1twOaP8Taxxcfyr8dWvWwYWZQV9Xm6bwf7_oNq6LB88XsgBH5K3YXpk5rWUayIaIQ4YiuEuXnOj-hGeLA3uYATum6EoZB_1EOfr8dkOj_PlI5qr9bxErUo4N-VQKiyPrs2dEPYs4eeuOPuVX0p6KDCik-ODMX43iozV6SgRTtBzh_TNEhsfEYXhcl8QfhNWtM%3D)**

**God bless you, and God bless America.**

_Warmly,
The Harrigan Family_

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Mexican cartels use app for asylum seekers to hunt kidnap victims,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Jason Buch** -- "In early March, **Pedro Arandia** , a 29-year-old from Venezuela, and his two young nieces crossed the Suchiate River on Mexico's southern border, paying the equivalent of $30 to be rowed from the Guatemalan side.

They stepped off the boat -- and right into the arms of gangsters.

"That was my first experience getting kidnapped in Mexico," Arandia said in a recent interview at a migrant shelter in Matamoros, just across the Rio Grande from Brownsville.

The one-time delivery driver said he and his nieces, 11 and 14, were taken to a building with small, crowded concrete rooms the kidnappers called "chicken coops."

They were released once he paid the $100-per-person ransom -- a pittance compared to a later ransom his family was forced to pay.

Arandia said he'd heard about Mexican immigration officials preventing asylum seekers from going north, so they avoided bus lines, where they would have been easy to identify as immigrants. He and his nieces sometimes traveled by foot and slept outdoors. It took them a month to make it to Mexico City, he said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/99d0243a-aa62-4a81-a9db-d1f7673a32ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In the Mexican capital, they found a large community of expats planning to seek asylum in the U.S. Arandia learned from them that Mexican officials wouldn't let them go any farther north without an appointment from the U.S. government, for which he needed a smartphone app called CBP One. So he installed it on his phone. (CBP stands for U.S. Customs and Border Protection.)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/99d0243a-aa62-4a81-a9db-d1f7673a32ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Arandia, who said he fled Venezuela because of its collapsing economy and increasing lawlessness, received notice in early May that he had been approved for an appointment in three weeks at the port of entry between Matamoros and Brownsville.

He purchased plane tickets to Reynosa, a border city near McAllen, because he was afraid taking a bus would make them easier targets for kidnapping.

He was right to be wary. In Reynosa, he and his nieces had to take a bus to Matamoros -- there was no flight. Only a few minutes after buying their tickets, three men approached them in the middle of the crowded bus station. One of the men grabbed his youngest niece.

"And he says to me, 'Keep quiet or face the consequences,' and he shows me the gun in his waistband," Arandia said.

At both the airport and the bus station, Arandia had to show his CBP One appointment to purchase tickets. He believes one of the ticket agents tipped off the kidnappers.

Asylum seekers and employees of non-governmental organizations that work with immigrants said in interviews they believe criminal gangs target people who have appointments through CBP One, one of the very few ways the U.S. government permits people to claim asylum at southwest border ports of entry.

Because asylum seekers need CBP One appointments to travel through Mexico, it's easy to track their movements and set them up for kidnapping and extortion." Arandia said he'd heard about Mexican immigration officials preventing asylum seekers from going north, so they avoided bus lines, where they would have been easy to identify as immigrants. He and his nieces sometimes traveled by foot and slept outdoors. It took them a month to make it to Mexico City, he said. In the Mexican capital, they found a large community of expats planning to seek asylum in the U.S. Arandia learned from them that Mexican officials wouldn't let them go any farther north without an appointment from the U.S. government, for which he needed a smartphone app called CBP One. So he installed it on his phone. (CBP stands for U.S. Customs and Border Protection.) Arandia, who said he fled Venezuela because of its collapsing economy and increasing lawlessness, received notice in early May that he had been approved for an appointment in three weeks at the port of entry between Matamoros and Brownsville. He purchased plane tickets to Reynosa, a border city near McAllen, because he was afraid taking a bus would make them easier targets for kidnapping. He was right to be wary. In Reynosa, he and his nieces had to take a bus to Matamoros -- there was no flight. Only a few minutes after buying their tickets, three men approached them in the middle of the crowded bus station. One of the men grabbed his youngest niece. "And he says to me, 'Keep quiet or face the consequences,' and he shows me the gun in his waistband," Arandia said. At both the airport and the bus station, Arandia had to show his CBP One appointment to purchase tickets. He believes one of the ticket agents tipped off the kidnappers. Asylum seekers and employees of non-governmental organizations that work with immigrants said in interviews they believe criminal gangs target people who have appointments through CBP One, one of the very few ways the U.S. government permits people to claim asylum at southwest border ports of entry. Because asylum seekers need CBP One appointments to travel through Mexico, it's easy to track their movements and set them up for kidnapping and extortion." clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. name: COURIER
subject: Want to counter right-wing lies and defend democracy? Start here.
body:
“The right played the long game and won big this year. We can play the long game too.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97647785/514114264/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWU3YWFiMWUtNTJhYi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9I5ZfmjJtHQSBp87xxfZXBEJ41JaPfMn9ZSA5j1KTA=&emci=3f18fc61-51ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=1e7aab1e-52ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Donald Trump didn’t win because of better policies or a better message. He won because legacy media is failing us, leaving a void the right has spent decades filling with a sprawling media empire. From Fox News to an army of social media influencers, their disinformation machine used lies and hate to set the agenda in the 2024 election.
**At COURIER, we believe the only way we can change this is by building a left-wing alternative—a progressive media ecosystem that doesn’t just counter lies but delivers fact-based reporting and a vision for a better future to communities across the country.**
[**But we can’t do it alone. If you believe in creating a media movement that fights back against disinformation and strengthens democracy, chip in $25 or whatever you can today to support our work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97647786/514114265/-593472309?refcode=20241125-EM-MarkJacob2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWU3YWFiMWUtNTJhYi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9I5ZfmjJtHQSBp87xxfZXBEJ41JaPfMn9ZSA5j1KTA=)
And while we work to build that alternative together, here are 10 more ways you can defend democracy right now, shared by COURIER contributor Mark Jacob.
Read his full list below—and let’s get to work.
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team
* * *
**_We’re not helpless! Here are 10 ways to defend democracy_**
The right played the long game and won big this year. We can play the long game too.
Like many of you, I’m struggling to be realistic and optimistic at the same time in the wake of the brutal election results and the steady march of fascism.
There’s a saying that the Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. popularized: “The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.” I hope that’s true, but right now I don’t know where justice is bending. I just know I’m bent out of shape.
Yet it’s vital not to give in to despair. The other side – the sexist, racist side – was on the run after the Roe vs. Wade ruling and the election of Barack Obama. Did they give up? No. They came back and won, through determination ... and dark money and propaganda and corruption and ... well, the point is, they came back. And we can do so too.
Which is not to say the next few years will be easy. They may be ghastly. People on TV speculate about a big Democratic comeback in the 2026 midterms. But I’m not convinced there will even be 2026 midterms, at least not fair ones. The Republicans have shown us what they’re capable of. I’m scared. But I’m not paralyzed by my fear, and I hope you’re not either.
Here’s my advice for the pro-democracy public and media in these coming tough times.
**5 SUGGESTIONS FOR THE PUBLIC**
**1\. Hold onto your outrage. **
Trump’s horrible picks for key government positions are an attempt to wear us down. They want us to surrender our standards and accept the idea of sexual predators and hucksters running our government. The Matt Gaetz nomination for attorney general was a test. The fact that he had to withdraw was an indication that decency is not dead, even if it is gravely wounded.
**2\. Be loud.**
A lie told often and loudly becomes the truth in many people’s minds. So it’s important to repeat the facts over and over again. Elon Musk’s Twitter/X has given people a bad impression of social media, but there are other options, such as Bluesky. People need to make their opinions heard. It’s good for democracy.
**3\. Choose an issue and get going.**
Electoral politics isn’t everything. You can contribute to a healthy society by picking an issue you care about and making a difference. Groups that help immigrants are in particular need right now. The Republicans want you to tune out and hide in your home. Don't.
**4\. Think local.**
An important step in the right wing’s road to power was winning local races and taking control of legislatures so they could gerrymander election maps to win congressional races. They translated local power into national power. A lot of cultural issues such as book banning play out on the local level. If you’re disheartened by your inability to elect a pro-democracy president, try electing a qualified person to your town council.
**5\. Support quality journalism. **
Yes, there is some excellent journalism left. If you’ve canceled your subscription to the Washington Post or Los Angeles Times over their cowardice in avoiding a Kamala Harris endorsement, direct that money to a quality nonprofit news source like ProPublica.
**[Support Independent Journalism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97647787/514114266/-593472309?refcode=20241125-EM-MarkJacob2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWU3YWFiMWUtNTJhYi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9I5ZfmjJtHQSBp87xxfZXBEJ41JaPfMn9ZSA5j1KTA=)**
**5 SUGGESTIONS FOR THE MEDIA**
**1\. Don’t let the government hide the cruelty.**
Trump and his collaborators will do everything possible to conceal the human toll of their actions. This will be especially true if the Trump regime puts huge numbers of immigrants in camps, as it has promised to do. The media must find creative ways to reach the victims and tell their stories.
**2\. Don’t normalize.**
Susie Wiles, Trump’s campaign chief and incoming White House chief of staff, describes herself as “a moderate on the political spectrum.” And some news outlets are buying it as if it’s centrist to support would-be dictator Trump. Many media outlets, including the supposedly liberal MSNBC, have also cited the selection of Marco Rubio for secretary of state as a reasonable and even “traditional” pick. Rubio did vote to certify the 2020 results, but this year – when he wanted to be Trump’s running mate – he spread lies about election fraud, including a claim from the debunked film “2000 Mules.” And Rubio seemed to apologize for his certification of the 2020 results, saying he did so “because, at that stage in the process, you have no options.”
Wiles and Rubio are not moderates or traditionalists. They are fascist enablers.
**3\. Don’t be slaves to access.**
Perhaps some of the friendly treatment of Wiles comes from news outlets’ hopes that she’ll read their texts, answer their phone calls, and green-light their interviews with Trump. This thirst for access and fear of being frozen out may have prompted the humiliating make-nice visit to Mar-a-Lago by Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski of MSNBC’s “Morning Joe.”
**4\. Don’t soft-pedal fascism.**
When Trump abuses power, the media must say so directly. Don’t give it a candy coating. After Trump won by lying constantly and getting judges he appointed to stall his criminal cases, the New York Times credited him with “remarkable political grit and resilience.” Similarly, when the media use the word “conservative,” they paper over the fact that today’s Republican Party is not conserving anything. In fact, it’s a repudiation of longtime American values. Call it “right-wing.”
Beware of certain terms disappearing from news coverage. When major news outlets stop using words like “authoritarian” and “extreme,” you’ll know that the authoritarians and extremists have prevailed. Legitimate journalists must fight against that.
**5\. Don’t contribute to public amnesia.**
A damaging issue for Trump four years ago was his bungling of the Covid crisis, but that failure was hardly mentioned this year. The misery of 2020 was such a non-issue that the right wing dared to ask: “Are you better off now than you were four years ago?” – even though four years ago we had a pandemic and mile-long food lines and social unrest over the murder of George Floyd and huge job losses.
Voters didn’t remember how bad it was, and the media rarely reminded them. Trump’s record should have been front-and-center in media coverage. It wasn’t. Even an event of historic proportions like the Jan. 6 coup attempt got short shrift.
Giving people the big picture – not just events in isolation – is a key duty of journalism. Do it.
**AND FINALLY**
For me, the first Trump term was a nightmare of doom-scrolling social media to keep up with the latest White House abomination. For Season 2, I’ll keep paying attention to the news but will try not to be consumed by it. It’s important to detox – to preserve our physical and mental health. For me, that means walking along Lake Michigan, listening to the music of the Decemberists, and admiring the paintings of Remedios Varo.
Find your joy. Stay hydrated. We can win in the end.

clean_body: “The right played the long game and won big this year. We can play the long game too.” Peter, Donald Trump didn’t win because of better policies or a better message. He won because legacy media is failing us, leaving a void the right has spent decades filling with a sprawling media empire. From Fox News to an army of social media influencers, their disinformation machine used lies and hate to set the agenda in the 2024 election. At COURIER, we believe the only way we can change this is by building a left-wing alternative—a progressive media ecosystem that doesn’t just counter lies but delivers fact-based reporting and a vision for a better future to communities across the country. = And while we work to build that alternative together, here are 10 more ways you can defend democracy right now, shared by COURIER contributor Mark Jacob. Read his full list below—and let’s get to work. In solidarity, The COURIER Team We’re not helpless! Here are 10 ways to defend democracy The right played the long game and won big this year. We can play the long game too. Like many of you, I’m struggling to be realistic and optimistic at the same time in the wake of the brutal election results and the steady march of fascism. There’s a saying that the Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. popularized: “The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.” I hope that’s true, but right now I don’t know where justice is bending. I just know I’m bent out of shape. Yet it’s vital not to give in to despair. The other side – the sexist, racist side – was on the run after the Roe vs. Wade ruling and the election of Barack Obama. Did they give up? No. They came back and won, through determination ... and dark money and propaganda and corruption and ... well, the point is, they came back. And we can do so too. Which is not to say the next few years will be easy. They may be ghastly. People on TV speculate about a big Democratic comeback in the 2026 midterms. But I’m not convinced there will even be 2026 midterms, at least not fair ones. The Republicans have shown us what they’re capable of. I’m scared. But I’m not paralyzed by my fear, and I hope you’re not either. Here’s my advice for the pro-democracy public and media in these coming tough times. 5 SUGGESTIONS FOR THE PUBLIC 1\. Hold onto your outrage. Trump’s horrible picks for key government positions are an attempt to wear us down. They want us to surrender our standards and accept the idea of sexual predators and hucksters running our government. The Matt Gaetz nomination for attorney general was a test. The fact that he had to withdraw was an indication that decency is not dead, even if it is gravely wounded. 2\. Be loud. A lie told often and loudly becomes the truth in many people’s minds. So it’s important to repeat the facts over and over again. Elon Musk’s Twitter/X has given people a bad impression of social media, but there are other options, such as Bluesky. People need to make their opinions heard. It’s good for democracy. 3\. Choose an issue and get going. Electoral politics isn’t everything. You can contribute to a healthy society by picking an issue you care about and making a difference. Groups that help immigrants are in particular need right now. The Republicans want you to tune out and hide in your home. Don't. 4\. Think local. An important step in the right wing’s road to power was winning local races and taking control of legislatures so they could gerrymander election maps to win congressional races. They translated local power into national power. A lot of cultural issues such as book banning play out on the local level. If you’re disheartened by your inability to elect a pro-democracy president, try electing a qualified person to your town council. 5\. Support quality journalism. Yes, there is some excellent journalism left. If you’ve canceled your subscription to the Washington Post or Los Angeles Times over their cowardice in avoiding a Kamala Harris endorsement, direct that money to a quality nonprofit news source like ProPublica. = 5 SUGGESTIONS FOR THE MEDIA 1\. Don’t let the government hide the cruelty. Trump and his collaborators will do everything possible to conceal the human toll of their actions. This will be especially true if the Trump regime puts huge numbers of immigrants in camps, as it has promised to do. The media must find creative ways to reach the victims and tell their stories. 2\. Don’t normalize. Susie Wiles, Trump’s campaign chief and incoming White House chief of staff, describes herself as “a moderate on the political spectrum.” And some news outlets are buying it as if it’s centrist to support would-be dictator Trump. Many media outlets, including the supposedly liberal MSNBC, have also cited the selection of Marco Rubio for secretary of state as a reasonable and even “traditional” pick. Rubio did vote to certify the 2020 results, but this year – when he wanted to be Trump’s running mate – he spread lies about election fraud, including a claim from the debunked film “2000 Mules.” And Rubio seemed to apologize for his certification of the 2020 results, saying he did so “because, at that stage in the process, you have no options.” Wiles and Rubio are not moderates or traditionalists. They are fascist enablers. 3\. Don’t be slaves to access. Perhaps some of the friendly treatment of Wiles comes from news outlets’ hopes that she’ll read their texts, answer their phone calls, and green-light their interviews with Trump. This thirst for access and fear of being frozen out may have prompted the humiliating make-nice visit to Mar-a-Lago by Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski of MSNBC’s “Morning Joe.” 4\. Don’t soft-pedal fascism. When Trump abuses power, the media must say so directly. Don’t give it a candy coating. After Trump won by lying constantly and getting judges he appointed to stall his criminal cases, the New York Times credited him with “remarkable political grit and resilience.” Similarly, when the media use the word “conservative,” they paper over the fact that today’s Republican Party is not conserving anything. In fact, it’s a repudiation of longtime American values. Call it “right-wing.” Beware of certain terms disappearing from news coverage. When major news outlets stop using words like “authoritarian” and “extreme,” you’ll know that the authoritarians and extremists have prevailed. Legitimate journalists must fight against that. 5\. Don’t contribute to public amnesia. A damaging issue for Trump four years ago was his bungling of the Covid crisis, but that failure was hardly mentioned this year. The misery of 2020 was such a non-issue that the right wing dared to ask: “Are you better off now than you were four years ago?” – even though four years ago we had a pandemic and mile-long food lines and social unrest over the murder of George Floyd and huge job losses. Voters didn’t remember how bad it was, and the media rarely reminded them. Trump’s record should have been front-and-center in media coverage. It wasn’t. Even an event of historic proportions like the Jan. 6 coup attempt got short shrift. Giving people the big picture – not just events in isolation – is a key duty of journalism. Do it. AND FINALLY For me, the first Trump term was a nightmare of doom-scrolling social media to keep up with the latest White House abomination. For Season 2, I’ll keep paying attention to the news but will try not to be consumed by it. It’s important to detox – to preserve our physical and mental health. For me, that means walking along Lake Michigan, listening to the music of the Decemberists, and admiring the paintings of Remedios Varo. Find your joy. Stay hydrated. We can win in the end. = Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

Here’s how you can help.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here’s how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It’s the same with our kids’ literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgkidnvep1dg0n69l7adtfc617tdso8to7r8agrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm2pr4c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpobv6vmkmr5m7lf8pedkt7g07phghteugf95e90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cljm2pr4c9h2bs)

name: Team Jared Moskowitz
subject: A rare example of a public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:

name: Roger Ream
subject: Correcting the MSM Mistake
body:
They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year.
| [ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fbda196a1dc4befa9e23a115a39dea2&_e=5pEdI4UNq2ogt1F6aIQLDEpAgXuclYAghz8HO42aF2TGBhjR43ofGt7sUHSbSQIACgFkJWuvggEXsbXYHas6PryJSiR4WrhyRadnEgT3V4rpxBYZ_ielli9z8IjMcUtDOu3MTeXpRzXnNDsDauMgRSvwIF1hiAkR6dbbdbRp1zFzRj3MCu-S9mbs-m6Vqx3_uu7piGLopcq2k3j7aWjcg4QIQzGry5XYBc05XTB1R895Eck8YJXGjS44gdilKcaohnX9oy6r9zzDPO2aZoVBY78mMLhm2b3Ql5-CVjvq2XY%3D)
---
Fellow American, They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year. When President Biden refused to step aside, the left-wing media dismissed concerns about his mental acuity. They said Biden was as sharp as a tack.

When assassins came for President Trump, they minimized the threats.

And when Kamala Harris flip-flopped on critical issues, the mainstream media covered for her. They let her skip interviews, ignore questions, and do whatever she wanted. Fellow American, if this great country is going to endure, we NEED an honest press. That’s why The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), is training, educating, and helping young conservative journalists pursue careers in the profession. We help these journalists learn how to make a difference with fellowships, internships, the Student Journalism Association, and so much more. This year showed how essential it is that we get more conservatives into the media. [**Will you help us do that by donating anything you can right now?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fbda196a1dc4befa9e23a115a39dea2&_e=5pEdI4UNq2ogt1F6aIQLDEpAgXuclYAghz8HO42aF2TGBhjR43ofGt7sUHSbSQIACgFkJWuvggEXsbXYHas6PryJSiR4WrhyRadnEgT3V4rpxBYZ_ielli9z8IjMcUtDOu3MTeXpRzXnNDsDauMgRVz2GjwgkYUdALv_4kdgT6pzFKI1yzKDS2V4VjKhJXVyn_nmHxgACcZ0i2ZILVZGtNvchuhlaiR6Wb78svezmbKr2IIaSFaWtYu_dOYvYedlwibj7pSqIbRnhcy_Hh4523pN_T98Pp9VM-Hi3wicwvs%3D) For decades, we’ve helped young journalists succeed. Our fellowships and internships gave our alumni the foot in the door they need. And because of that, they’re now hosting shows and writing for some of the biggest publishers in the business. That means they’re working for The Wall Street Journal, FOX News, Reason, The Federalist, CNN, The Daily Caller, The Washington Post, and so much more.

But, Fellow American, we need to do more. That’s why we launched the Student Journalism Association last year. We’re empowering brave young student journalists to fight leftist lies and propaganda on their campuses. And we’ll help them kick star their careers, so that there will be more reporters with moral courage in the media across the country.

But, we need your help to do that. We’re supporting dozens of conservative student journalists on 21 college campuses. [Fellow American](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fbda196a1dc4befa9e23a115a39dea2&_e=5pEdI4UNq2ogt1F6aIQLDESBCX5nAYYbsEDusotiswR2ht-jz8KOc0-uLXd0asbi_6tPXhpgJR092hxOU-lMFq5weeEIJbPM40cz-pRGIlND95rl9WQJf7QpLT8ELj87TTnAj5IYetBh_Df-KhtZ2lXz1kVKXgJRbTg5Flg8PnprrykBG1bOBvhnpPiF0rfvDKahZvQp0jmSaatBFF2-eT-l180sAoZpmjAQ_PrVULE%3D)[, will you help us grow that network, so we can fight for a future where the media isn’t pushing propaganda for the left-wing establishment? Please, donate right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fbda196a1dc4befa9e23a115a39dea2&_e=5pEdI4UNq2ogt1F6aIQLDEpAgXuclYAghz8HO42aF2TGBhjR43ofGt7sUHSbSQIACgFkJWuvggEXsbXYHas6PryJSiR4WrhyRadnEgT3V4rpxBYZ_ielli9z8IjMcUtDOu3MTeXpRzXnNDsDauMgRTXIBZrFCgCFm1YqE4EoFQAP9ffzC6Nor-OAqllDRi7AcMXFwc89XGsFiLk3K9aqWqFWTqZkzC-iBWek4rkPwy3QKm4LRbqciCZa2OMmYaBAYbV86RFyvABY0i0e9cYwPiVkEYW4qgNpVqept-I3Lvw%3D)

Sincerely,
Roger Ream
President The Fund for American Studies

subject: We’re SHOCKED to learn this about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane for Congress
body:
At first we thought it was an error. But the truth is much worse...

| |
---
| | | We were SHOCKED to hear this about you...

name: Dulce, UWD
subject: 📣Defend your community from deportation!
body:
We’re preparing for 2025 and beyond, ready to join us? | | | 🤝Safety starts with us, Peter. Have you noticed the energy shift over the last few weeks? That’s the collective of people meeting this moment by deciding to show up, gain skills, and build power — ready do the work — to defend our immigrant communities. We must enter 2025 surrounded by a circle of people who are ready to fight back to protect our loved ones from deportation. 🫂Building a strong, trusted community of people who have each other’s backs is how we’ll keep each other safe. Because I grew up undocumented, my family and I had difficult conversations about preparing for interactions with law enforcement. Now, as the Deportation Defense National Trainer, **I invite you to join our “Know Your Rights, Know Your Power 2025 and Beyond” webinar on Tuesday, December 10 at 6:30 PM ET.** [Will you join me?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpykGTwukmU2BzRvYuSZePZibyDO0RLiRx3Z4ySq-dapUeQ20qHct6OZp1MDMWmkBg1F1268Juzn7HAQv361HIdRNl5BGHODJcUyi0jJ-JsXQ0QNFg_Zsp6Y2fmE6bhFVgQ5M34REKSIAi89Tus0mqNrxya9BOBi1VF5ZPT0B43k_HZ52040BLsapg3iyFzV8wzppjQShEMkPgkLhXQr_d2zNBjHOjwglbc0LrvppX--g/4br/hGm8dnUZRVm9_8FUVikcqQ/h0/h001.Pj70tybb1bfAmY5Ml8hb2vQZEfDfqpQruGgPPNwT350) **[RSVP Today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpykGTwukmU2BzRvYuSZePZibyDO0RLiRx3Z4ySq-dapW5L9dbn2aFpS8p6nZr-vPCice1jcDHtFiNl-TnwDRiPxPr7CgoNcusSdh3z9UTdvFdyBk1o-9X-crEgZRPyF1_2SydKn10Ksg39pd3c_YQ734i1DmWXq_Nfp0lE07X5qhJWnwUKuE9dLVt8W1XK-zUloReSwnCDVk5AByblH9oZXS5ctNGJWnRSFeezkcUygY/4br/hGm8dnUZRVm9_8FUVikcqQ/h1/h001.lgo6be8RjOthcy0epJzuzzrEEau5fvriwgZ7BeYgTfY)** _[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpykGTwukmU2BzRvYuSZePZibyDO0RLiRx3Z4ySq-dapWx8FIYTgaA21O5-nbukF2kg1yKqL6i7uNRAcYxNE8RInLTuCI94KaQLWsT2RL8LOc-sFfYqJmMc78boNPaMkkrTKnJEKK1rZAaW_bNCi-k-aj7ryusReT0Rh7Z9Bq_VW5AOvhfau94R7W6R92Lz0x90Uq--_q7SuYo263K2pHNDXb-uYbDyGo9Hhs1jvE_Fu4/4br/hGm8dnUZRVm9_8FUVikcqQ/h2/h001.5AIHTmRFBhM2XLKskBLxM_KXojhJf6phFe4oMl44nb0)__Spanish interpretation available. Habrá interpretación en español disponible._ When you attend our webinar, you’ll:
* ✊Learn about your rights, no matter your immigration status
* 💪Gain the confidence to exercise your rights in any interaction with law enforcement
* 📚Get useful resources to bring back to your community

As we prepare to face a second Trump administration, we know he plans to expand the deportation force, continue the criminalization of our loved ones, and attack our freedoms. 🧡That’s exactly why [I’m inviting you to learn alongside immigrants and allies across the country](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpykGTwukmU2BzRvYuSZePZibyDO0RLiRx3Z4ySq-dapVAvR2S906TL2zc5O3UiLOC3dlV4aWJix2pBWMmkd4mau_1WoOcJEduCrkmY4nhewBV3HwoH6_AuuKWHlwtlEvwmMOkhtFnm1CiSNjgbjXmMZZSC3xSyWaw8wTYL4rDuwhGEHRed7dGHm0-8AaqzRSTEAx80UQvSB6HlK-hBV52o4XdaFW3LxNHwIJyiFt7-HE/4br/hGm8dnUZRVm9_8FUVikcqQ/h3/h001.B5A1ZsUPpG1V3P1ecJoXKYwDqYMzJLBahAsyaaOikkI) who are ready to show up for their communities, too. In Solidarity, Dulce and the rest of the UWD Team **P.S.** 🌟We’ll have Spanish interpretation available! Nuestra llamada tendrá interpretación en español disponible. Make sure to invite your friends and loved ones to join you at our training!

clean_body: We’re preparing for 2025 and beyond, ready to join us? | | | 🤝Safety starts with us, Peter. Have you noticed the energy shift over the last few weeks? That’s the collective of people meeting this moment by deciding to show up, gain skills, and build power — ready do the work — to defend our immigrant communities. We must enter 2025 surrounded by a circle of people who are ready to fight back to protect our loved ones from deportation. 🫂Building a strong, trusted community of people who have each other’s backs is how we’ll keep each other safe. Because I grew up undocumented, my family and I had difficult conversations about preparing for interactions with law enforcement. Now, as the Deportation Defense National Trainer, I invite you to join our “Know Your Rights, Know Your Power 2025 and Beyond” webinar on Tuesday, December 10 at 6:30 PM ET. interpretation available. Habrá interpretación en español disponible. When you attend our webinar, you’ll: ✊Learn about your rights, no matter your immigration status 💪Gain the confidence to exercise your rights in any interaction with law enforcement 📚Get useful resources to bring back to your community As we prepare to face a second Trump administration, we know he plans to expand the deportation force, continue the criminalization of our loved ones, and attack our freedoms. 🧡That’s exactly why who are ready to show up for their communities, too. In Solidarity, Dulce and the rest of the UWD Team P.S.** 🌟We’ll have Spanish interpretation available! Nuestra llamada tendrá interpretación en español disponible. Make sure to invite your friends and loved ones to join you at our training! | Follow us on: | | | | |

**→ Developing: Governor Brian Kemp Under Fire for Disbanding State Maternal Mortality Review Board ←** Peter: Georgia has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country. _And earlier this fall, the state’s Maternal Mortality Review Committee determined that two Georgia women, Amber Thurman and Candi Miller, died as a direct result of the state’s six-week abortion ban._ But instead of using this information to take accountability and address the maternal mortality crisis, Gov. Brian Kemp just disbanded the entire committee. Without the Committee’s oversight and recommendations, critical gaps in maternal healthcare could go unaddressed, potentially leaving lives at risk. That’s why we’re launching an urgent campaign to pressure Gov. Kemp into reinstating the Maternal Mortality Review Committee **as soon as possible.** **But we need to secure 1,000 signatures on our petition to prove overwhelming public support.[ So will you sign your name right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97651149/514124815/-805290569?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112524_1_1_Maternal-Mortality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTljYzkwMC01OGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-i-3XiaNMUSZ4o6aLgdkhWtbyJcz3vgNCAJPuo9oU8Y=&emci=849cc900-58ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e9cc900-58ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=43566853)** | | **[REINSTATE THE MATERNAL MORTALITY REVIEW COMMITTEE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97651150/514124816/-805290569?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112524_1_1_Maternal-Mortality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTljYzkwMC01OGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-i-3XiaNMUSZ4o6aLgdkhWtbyJcz3vgNCAJPuo9oU8Y=&emci=849cc900-58ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e9cc900-58ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=43566853)**

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = → Developing: Governor Brian Kemp Under Fire for Disbanding State Maternal Mortality Review Board ← Peter: Georgia has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country. And earlier this fall, the state’s Maternal Mortality Review Committee determined that two Georgia women, Amber Thurman and Candi Miller, died as a direct result of the state’s six-week abortion ban. But instead of using this information to take accountability and address the maternal mortality crisis, Gov. Brian Kemp just disbanded the entire committee. Without the Committee’s oversight and recommendations, critical gaps in maternal healthcare could go unaddressed, potentially leaving lives at risk. That’s why we’re launching an urgent campaign to pressure Gov. Kemp into reinstating the Maternal Mortality Review Committee as soon as possible. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e2d05607061429b90946e9b8ddccee4&_e=zpLRdu8v9xb0SrN2HlqOv5N_nw-DcViINI1_d5VcE9hPEV1QYaZjCsAjrNbtfeXyH6DxOt6o6Im49VrmbTm7yAFIiO_Q_UFwB5UTa7__BR-Ct8hui9NejkeIy10GYe2_VSiaeba7kvUlFdTQUzov-RcIwE6VrlYpP6hl1QiNQMEq7difUVNqEuLa7QXMNuEnBLabfDIdGsMk7BaRf7aMCi2JbrRZRot0ge0uDKOJnYTCq9NvHT2PMu6dUogSdsziLcCpPbTwRgDXF-MIUnnMcIkJRdxMuopxtoMJSpw_Z0P4vYAY2EAl7g66EokzlQFVigQkU8IhmxzMo7xk5Deo5j0itUu-J4P_XyzYsRjWYUyX1Ng3PblYForXaOz2W8arLbR7_KoM5HQBo0XY_XaNIQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57e159825e4c4d97affa2e4e85705fc0&_e=KknEGaKspor69oChTKyvM2BDmykf4wGNVWVNUCgzO2u1OjBwoWdf7xjkBruUQMu1WlZ6cFQNMBNNhhI7QWsYCPdSub5TnZHKDqFY-lvwcpx7aoG-QeuQa3P9H4WdinV_4Yhdtcsynv2Kf8p8B4ejVfMZHZxHuI7ePt2eGbANlgB3EcfIlXVsxC1PCrrY4hVBYoMZLxut2iVPFmRMU0gAOK918Am6cPfA86tYjbuS54lt06BSsfTpLtOMQ03pN2BNcYn_EnyzluHHEuVPKQIUOeQy1Fx1Tr6FCxxxV2DuBU7zqqWPT1rbMD2YCyk3mV7lVgYVDcSebXcHyEwFcFZY-Wm9_L1X4j_it5tPtYw-Ye50dnFvplOMPr7yhf2-mCk_bxe55G0pjNRAPu3u5DB-KLFR6qYka8lxnkktfvxPaWS2-HnL1mwyJTebKr2DRJb4xS7KkFltwqyg_YvZRX30YpXgVhUYHrJfaP1ILZHE775SccXDd4bN20sYhaFTNsjO)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57e159825e4c4d97affa2e4e85705fc0&_e=KknEGaKspor69oChTKyvM2BDmykf4wGNVWVNUCgzO2u1OjBwoWdf7xjkBruUQMu1WlZ6cFQNMBNNhhI7QWsYCPdSub5TnZHKDqFY-lvwcpx7aoG-QeuQa3P9H4WdinV_4Yhdtcsynv2Kf8p8B4ejVfMZHZxHuI7ePt2eGbANlgB3EcfIlXVsxC1PCrrY4hVBYoMZLxut2iVPFmRMU0gAOK918Am6cPfA86tYjbuS54lt06BSsfTpLtOMQ03pN2BNcYn_EnyzluHHEuVPKQIUOeQy1Fx1Tr6FCxxxV2DuBU7zqqWPT1rbMD2YCyk3mV7lVgYVDcSebXcHyEwFcFZY-RF-jXZrO0rCyXJdOlv-G5cGyZ16xCW4FzEZeCJCUEOeqiF4utwWPE6cqqyQYZ1h19ugWmOAtfxOVt-5wq_42jp81POkq_PlSgr4Y69TwgBHyC6vWbmCRQyhHv7FoSzn8m_EvmfmCXl_rt1VQRbsHyijokHyMoN9ecweDpLAzlx3)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9v06/?__vbtrk=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: hope for our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97652115/514128112/-491556796?refcode=241125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjkwYmNiNy01YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TObj6b-CI9iuonOUjXypn_NBLG0cXq29wc8jfmK1ykM=)
---
One year ago, I launched my campaign for Governor of Virginia. **As I reflect back on the last year, I’m grateful for the many conversations I’ve had with Virginians across our Commonwealth.** I got into public service because, from a young age, my parents – a career law enforcement officer and a nurse – instilled in me a deep devotion to our country. Years ago, I swore my first oath to the U.S. Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a career serving my community, my Commonwealth, and my country — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love. When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads. I decided to run for Congress. We worked hard, and we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle. In 2018, Virginia’s Seventh District elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968. As I reflect on both the past year and the 2024 election, I’m once again reflecting on what I said when I launched this campaign to serve as the next Governor of Virginia: our Commonwealth is at another crossroads. Do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? While the election wasn’t what we wanted, I’m still filled with hope and a true belief in the promise of Virginia’s future. And I am committed to standing up for the values that unite us as Virginians. I know when we come together and focus on the issues that matter most – stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families – we can get things done. [**It is still a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now and support my campaign with a contribution split between my campaign and Serve America? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97652116/514128113/-1451023484?refcode=241125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjkwYmNiNy01YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TObj6b-CI9iuonOUjXypn_NBLG0cXq29wc8jfmK1ykM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97652117/514128114/-1451023484?refcode=241125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjkwYmNiNy01YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TObj6b-CI9iuonOUjXypn_NBLG0cXq29wc8jfmK1ykM=) Thank you,

Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That 's what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State -- especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there's one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am "begging" for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That 's a LIE. **_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can't afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I'll say it again loud and clear. If you can't afford to contribute, please don't. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom - and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0ae7725f85c6456c84d876b757dec588&_e=znrqLTAni_83-54Y-uXU5wxhPW8-2beVgverOe90SxMMwFFTg89elXX6LQk1NBTuVU8Nax5Pg5xAJy_om1mfcjo3zax-8nqTijTja0X-gHMnbn3ibRs54wceyXO25k7yjNjh62eVWDTrkwgdg7MT7wHnz4pt5ffHfq5LOGBjy0KZ9nt3uPeQFQBR4ELr7PEpiZtFD1GV--7skgYa-z86UtC8dXesoiOKTVGohUr7gZaR4yoG47FxTgNihC6lw0xLPIgDL76-2RsbVPnKuBf4YURQ4FRyLGkhNT5hOu1SzFj9EOM6GCwyj3ljN-rSILwBq01ddEuvKkIXptEVfoAB9c65yg0wakele64ifluT5mDk4ZGNcgbXHboeOTRXLHx08A0IxZOFAnxr9b93MydhGg%3D%3D)

Imagine all of your money being seized. That 's what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State -- especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there's one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am "begging" for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That 's a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can't afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. name: Eliza Walton
subject: Fwd: The Owyhee needs you!
body:
The clock is ticking for the Owyhee Canyonlands, and we only need a second of your time. | | Hi Peter, I want to make sure you saw my last email. The Owyhee Canyonlands needs you to act now, before we lose the chance to permanently protect it. [**Urge our members of Congress to join us in the fight to protect the Owyhee here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652199/514128729/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652201/514128748/-940096265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) If you are interested in taking further action by speaking to a member of Congress directly about the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands, RSVP to join OLCV's Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden and submit a question about the Owyhee! **WHEN:** Thursday, December 19th, at 11:30 am PT. Mark your calendars today!
**WHERE:** Zoom webinar (link will be shared a few days before the town hall)
[**RSVP for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652205/514128761/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Sincerely,
Eliza Walton
OLCV Coalition Director | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652208/514128772/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, I only need a moment of your time to take action for a magical place in Oregon - the Owyhee Canyonlands. If there ever was a time to act for the Owyhee, it is now. [**Can you take a second to send a message to your senators? We need protection for the Owyhee before it’s too late.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652218/514128779/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) There’s a reason we’ve prioritized our fight for the permanent protection of the Owyhee this year. It’s Oregon’s last great unprotected natural treasure and [73% of Oregonians](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652225/514128788/835257482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) support an Owyhee Canyonlands National Monument. Now the clock is ticking, as we near the end of President Biden’s presidency and await for Donald Trump to assume office and a Republican dominated U.S. House and Senate. Before the election, there were two paths to achieve protection for the Owyhee Canyonlands: passing [Senator Wyden’s Malheur Community Empowerment for the Owyhee Act (S 1890)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652228/514128793/-1443505139?emci=e272bfc3-969f-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=fa4d5fba-38a0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1246005&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=), or a national monument designation. With the election results, it will be much harder - if not impossible - to pass Senator Wyden’s bill. Congress has already failed to act on Senator Wyden’s bill before, and they will do it again. Now is the time to get President Biden to designate a national monument for the Owyhee before he steps out of office. [**Send a message to Senators Wyden and Merkley now to urge them to go into full monument mode!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652232/514128796/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652237/514128799/-940096265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Why take action now? Yesterday there was a hearing with the committee of Natural Resources on Representative Bentz’s bill (HB 10082), which was developed to be an alternative to Senator Wyden’s bill. Representative Bentz’s bill does not center the long-term ecological health of the Owyhee, neglecting to investigate livestock land use in the Canyonlands, and burdening the Burns Paiute Tribe with financial obligations. That’s why [OLCV opposes Bentz’s bill](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652247/514128801/-1959272842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) and is continuing to push for a national monument. We urge you to take action now, since our Senators will already be discussing the Owyhee Canyonlands. [**Let’s show them that a national monument designation has our full support!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652255/514128805/-940096265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Thank you for supporting the permanent protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands. Sincerely,
Eliza Walton
OLCV Coalition Director _P.S.:[To get more involved and show more support for the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands, sign up to write a letter to the editor here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652265/514128808/-600427321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pZ1-jgMLDjWTTNTXYAJt8zN_LYMUN3uT5L-hp7YvSrw=&emci=72f6edf2-57ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8ba36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Our organizing team will be in touch with you shortly. _ |
