| **JAMIE RASKIN TOLD AMERICA** that the _Supreme Court handed Donald Trump a terrifying win_ _..._ **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97652406/514129053/481028328?refcode=DOTL_20241125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyYTM2MjU5LTViYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fQnHHtgQYk7zN91doRGuhNZcI-_RWwPDV-0ad07-EKU=&emci=c9babfea-43ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a2a36259-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14887570)** **MAGA REPUBLICANS** are RUTHLESSLY attacking him and threatening to flip his seat for daring to expose corruption!

name: Urgent Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand the Jan 6 case and classified documents case against Trump proceed. Don’t drop the charges!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Special Counsel: "Don't drop federal cases against Trump!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T532a09a7-8b6d-4b75-9491-a11e315345fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecb8959e-7405-453a-a742-540621b776b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Now that Trump has won the election, special counsel Jack Smith is dropping the January 6th case and the classified documents case against Trump, because “the Department’s position is that the Constitution requires that this case be dismissed before the defendant is inaugurated.” **What kind of asinine position is that?** Trump cannot get off completely free after trying to overthrow a free and fair election AND putting our national security at risk. He must face the consequences of his crimes! [**Add your name: Don’t drop the federal cases against Trump! >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87dbebd9-f5d3-4b3e-afee-8f5930976fea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5f230ed-6ac6-41a4-9b28-4648504e8ea1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dd4ce8b-38d9-4ff3-9473-6e76694ae9a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cb2d177-7fb0-4cc0-b10a-54dedf9220f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9edcb1a5-aec6-4108-a37c-8e941a3e72a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fd57117-97f0-4776-a9d6-0e9623206d44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=41b4b9d02d0741c8a06bacdb2b08391b&_e=cVIKcAuhaLB4TgSk_VZOQiw49ofAffFIwuWuzMzAPKNnHYxCvtDmJa35AyWzhtlPp_7d1f2HFbSQQuQ8oUJ_DPiMeAE6mOq_dV7i80JdOvR9mjjmiRGz5QrHufvR0GCVetQrU4OjYqG1m7lIMBHB_nEZcblb5Seb8iR3xFreC58XsN1GWKXoS7PoIs-Cax8esZOfEFLxUnEn2y_ciY_QQv09Rs_Rh6baEZzEi51ZMrFsoOPZumbK1ckt2GcKGQ1titd_gr-d6dvW8VdhXtaOle8yOmnACd8lmvKw6iReHq-chsOtdN0BUCJVDwPbHd7X)
---
Dear Friend,
---
What do you do when you're snowed in on a Sunday morning? You bring the worship yourself! I'm with my family in Montana and the snow is still falling. There's nothing like the cold and snow to demonstrate the awesome power of our God!! I hope you are with your families, preparing to spend the week in Thanksgiving to our God, and I wanted to share some of my worship to the Lord from the frozen wilderness of Montana! _**Watch Sunday Worship through a blizzard in Montana ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

name: Team Lateefah
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hi Friend,
Throughout her career, Lateefah has been a steadfast voice for Oakland and the Bay Area, advocating for the needs of our community and fighting for justice. From working with local racial and social justice organizations like the Young Women’s Freedom Center and the Akonadi Foundation, to advising state officials on policies that impact our most vulnerable communities, she’s seen exactly how a broken system often ignores the people who need it most.
Now, she’s on her way to Congress to bring her 25 years of advocacy to Washington. There, she’ll champion issues like affordable healthcare for all, economic justice, accessible public transportation, and community public safety.
But as Lateefah often tells us: the issues that matter most to her, are the ones that matter most to YOU. That’s why we would love to hear from you, Friend. Can we count on you to take a moment and tell us what issues are most concerning to you right now? To ensure that we fully represent your priorities and concerns, click here to fill out our survey today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JdcUxDZnMk6Dk_1gaPIUKQ2]

Your voice is critical in shaping the future of our campaign and ensuring we fight for what truly matters to CA-12. Click here to fill out our priorities survey today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JdcUxDZnMk6Dk_1gaPIUKQ2]
CA-12 PRIORITIES SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JdcUxDZnMk6Dk_1gaPIUKQ2]
Together, we can make sure that your concerns, and the concerns of our community, are heard loud and clear in the Halls of Congress.
In solidarity,
Team Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_112524_prioritiessurvey [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_112524_prioritiessurvey] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

clean_body: The Radical Left will stop at nothing to push their agenda - but Anna Paulina Luna is ready to fight back, and she needs your support NOW. | Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Fellow Conservative, We're at a crossroads. The Radical Left is relentless in their pursuit of power, and we can't afford to let our guard down. That's why I'm counting on you to stand with me and help . As you know, the 2024 Election has passed, and President Donald J. Trump has emerged victorious. But our work is far from over. We must continue to fight for our values and principles, and that starts with supporting bold America First fighters like . Anna is a warrior who will never back down to the Radical Left. She's been a vocal advocate for our cause, and we need her voice in Congress now more than ever. But she can't do it alone. She needs our support to take on the Democrats and their liberal agenda. That's why I'm urging you to to support Anna Paulina Luna and help . | | | | ---|---|--- | | Every dollar counts in this fight, and I know I can count on you to stand with us. The stakes are high, and the consequences of inaction are dire. We've seen it time and time again - the Democrats will stop at nothing to push their radical agenda, and we must be prepared to fight back. We can't let the Democrats win. We must stand strong and united in our pursuit of freedom and prosperity. Anna Paulina Luna is a champion of our cause, and we need her in Congress to fight for us. to support Anna Paulina Luna and help . | Sincerely, RepublicanEmails.net Need help? Peter, it’s Ritchie.

I’ve said it before: **The outcome of an election can easily become a Rorschach test on which we project our own ideological priors.** In order to avoid substituting narrative for truth, _we must go where the evidence takes us._

That’s why I want to hear from you, the voters, about what your biggest priorities were in this election, and what you want to see more of going forward: | **— Peter's VOTER PRIORITY SURVEY —**
---

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me.

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: The Voter Protection Project
subject: This key race for Democrats is still too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| It’s been nearly **3 weeks** since Election Day, and Derek Tran’s election in California’s 45th District is one of the final few to be **_too close to call._** _Here’s the latest:_

**_FIRST:_** Grassroots supporters from across the country began to rally behind Derek’s campaign to ensure every vote could be counted.

**_THEN:_** Derek **_took the lead_** by a small handful of votes which put us on a real path to victory.

**_NOW:_** This race is closer than ever before, so it’s critical that Democrats come together in a big way to get the job done and flip CA-45 from red-to-blue.

[**Please, will you split a donation between us and Derek Tran’s recount fund to make sure every lawful vote is counted before it’s too late?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85177?t=6&akid=18100%2E878179%2EFyAAAc) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran - Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85178?t=7&akid=18100%2E878179%2EFyAAAc)
---

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18100%2E878179%2EFyAAAc). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18100%2E878179%2EFyAAAc).**

NOW: This race is closer than ever before, so it’s critical that Democrats come together in a big way to get the job done and flip CA-45 from red-to-blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran - Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately: | The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Have to fight "Agenda 47"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
Democracy Docket: Trump’s Agenda 47 — What It Means for Democracy [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
Listen, Team, we know that the election's over. But post-election polling has consistently shown two things: That people voted to show their displeasure economically, and that voters don't truly know what is in the agendas put forward by the candidate that won .
That's why we keep spreading the word about Project 2025 -- the extremist Heritage Foundation's plan to reshape America, especially after Project 2025's authors have been given prominent positions in the upcoming administration -- and "Agenda 47" -- which is a close parallel that Trump's campaign used as their blueprint for the future.
Both plans are a danger to our democracy. We need your help to spread the word.
Even without an election on the horizon, Team, we've got to make sure people know what's at stake and what bills and initiatives may be coming that will impact their ability to vote. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us spread the word about these dangers to our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112524_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112524_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112524_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112524_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112524_2&amount=35]
One of the central tenets of Trump’s Agenda 47 is securing the nation’s elections: “ We will implement measures to secure our Elections, including Voter ID, highly sophisticated paper ballots, proof of Citizenship, and same day Voting. We will not allow the Democrats to give Voting Rights to illegal Aliens ,” the agenda says.
Let's be clear -- no one is advocating for illegal aliens to vote. Voter ID has been proven again and again to be a suppressive deterrent to voting in multiple studies. Non-citizen voting has been against the law for decades, and despite the millions of taxpayer dollars that have been spent searching for voter fraud, very few problems have been found -- 20 formerly incarcerated voters who voted in 2020 when they weren't yet eligible to vote again in Florida, for example, or the Trump voter who filled out his deceased mother's mail-in-ballot in Pennsylvania.
But those 20 votes didn't change anything among Florida's 13 million eligible voters, nor did that one ballot have an impact with Pennsylvania's 9 million voters. And none of the issues found in these elections showed any non-citizen voting. This is an entire agenda concocted to control our elections and codify their power for the future , not to address any real problems.
Fuel our efforts to spread the word and inform voters with $25 or however much you can right now as we work to protect our right to vote in state legislatures and Congress for 2025 and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112524_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=hS5F8cMcnOf9xYQpzD%2BkfIjtZHrSMgG5xrywk%2B08MaDveLN2NrGDw5%2FsTJri0XZQ4uxlpA8du0C8oH2t%2FJLJh91x5cKoWi14%2F97Wo1NcDpaNo5cZf3%2BM2PvEnXNosWtZiuORzsSOLKjZvfnt4%2F8LQ%2FgzC7hzU43txEZgNYN1xdlNrNaCN1BfzRsF2Sn0dAqWRjw56U2yGsKv25BwR5fFztsQP0GI%2FjQxw%2F0pkAt05GCuQ0sXqCopIZQSm0Yn%2B5NF4DGaGK5au6%2Fq%2FmsO5b7S5zfAeY83W%2B4xg8pVCpfT%2F5esIbeQqdHhijJ8RzUHf4pHDL24aSlgUW%2FUN8S0Qf3Sm88B8SCQa99J0tWn9fiUn0QwKxU%2FDCwmKdjdzC6VRzG%2FNLh%2FKHJBjQaIQm5kBzf5nDOAkRmqPkuh3r2BokTW5Wc%3D .

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Our Fight Continues
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z3-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | Last week, I joined colleagues from across the country in our nation’s capital to attend a conference. These gatherings happen a few times a year, providing an opportunity to share the projects we’re working on and the candidates we’re supporting. This collaboration helps prevent overlap and allows us to connect with the incredible people doing transformative work across the country**—and in some cases, the world.** Unlike previous meetings filled with excitement, **the mood this time was more reflective and focused on preparation.** While not marked by despair, it was clear we were all feeling the weight of the challenges ahead. We looked to one another for comfort, guidance, and hope.**Collectively, we understood the gravity of the fight we’re entering, and no one is taking it lightly.** Representing some of the largest organizations in the country, the attendees—myself included, as Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind—**are united in our commitment to advocate for our members, candidates, and the values we stand for.** **The Trump cabinet is taking shape, and I know many are feeling scared—some even panicking.** Lives will undoubtedly change before our eyes, as this administration seeks to sow fear and intimidate. **But we must remind one another: we are not facing this alone. Marginalized groups will not go unprotected.** Nearly half the country agrees with us, which means there is no sweeping Trump mandate or massive overhaul of our nation’s values. Yes, they control the three branches of government, but they answer to us**—the citizens of this country. Our voices are our most powerful tool in defending democracy.** The recent withdrawal of Matt Gaetz as the nominee for Attorney General is a powerful example of the influence we still hold to shape our future. Gaetz was an awful pick for AG—his extremism, compounded by multiple scandals, made him one of the most controversial nominations in recent history. **Democrats across the country were loud and unified in their disapproval, using our platforms to call out this disastrous choice. It worked.** The backlash forced Gaetz to withdraw and resign from Congress, proving that when we speak up and fight back together, we can change the course of our nation. This victory is proof that our collective action matters, and it should fuel us for the battles ahead. **Trump may have won the presidency, but voters did not choose to sell our country to the highest bidder.** Yet that’s exactly what he’s doing, as he aligns himself with the world’s richest man, Elon Musk, along with Big Pharma, Big Tech, and Wall Street. These interests are already celebrating and strategizing to monopolize our economy and government. It’s up to us to expose every instance of corruption, every nefarious act, and bring it to the American people. **We face a daunting challenge, but we are not giving up.** This election cycle was expensive, and while we understand the concerns about money in politics, **we know this fight cannot be won without resources.** MAGA is counting on us to fall apart, to lose our momentum. **That will never happen—not for us, and not for you.** [**_We are asking for your support, whether as a monthly contributor or through a one-time donation, because our country—and her future—is worth it._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z4-kyd76rh0/)
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z5-kyd76rh1/)
---
In solidarity, -Hassan Martini
---
| | | |
## **Join our continued fight**
---
This is the time where we need to build our coalition for the future. The fight needs to go on against MAGA and their extremist agenda. Be a part of our fight today -------------->
---
| | | | [Chip in $24](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z6-kyd76rh2/)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z7-kyd76rh3/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z8-kyd76rh4/)
---
| [Choose Gift...](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjfbg-jvo1z9-kyd76rh5/)
---
| | | | |
---
__ONE__ donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in __EVERY__ major battleground. **Maximize your impact this cycle →** **No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2vjfbg--15aab-kyd76rh1&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2vjfbg--15aab-kyd76rh1&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Protecting our shared values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
In times like these, when the stakes feel higher than ever, our strength lies in unity. Colorado is a beacon of progress, resilience, and compassion—a place where we come together to protect what matters most: our shared values of freedom, equality, and dignity for all.
Under Donald Trump, fundamental rights have been challenged across the country. But here in Colorado, we’ve drawn a line in the sand and stood firm to defend the values we hold dear.
This year, Colorado took bold action by codifying abortion rights into the state constitution and protecting same-sex marriage. This historic step not only protects these rights for Coloradans but also sends a powerful message to the nation: Colorado will not back down.
Now more than ever, we must stick together to defend these hard-won rights. We must unite as a community, across our differences, to ensure Colorado remains a place where everyone can live with freedom and dignity.
Thank you for being part of this fight. Together, we can protect our values, preserve our freedoms, and ensure Colorado remains a safe haven for all.
All the best,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

Wearing your MAGA Christmas sweater is the best way to do it! Let’s make Christmas greater than ever! Sincerely, Team Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc., P.O. Box 509, Arlington, VA 22216. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Special Announcement and Invitation
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=diane_template&n=1)
---
| Friend – Humanity stands at a crossroads like never before in history. The Wall Street and City of London-dominated western economic and political order is bankrupt. A new order, proposed decades ago by Lyndon and Helga LaRouche, is coming into being through the BRICS expansion process, which now includes the majority of the world's population. The owners of the quadrillions of dollars of derivatives obligations in the old colonial world order, who are already carrying out a genocide in Southwest Asia, appear to be prepared to annihilate us all through thermonuclear war, rather than give up the power which they have already lost. If we w secure the future for generations to come, the United States must reject the global NATO and British imperial agenda, and instead uphold the principles expressed so poetically in our founding documents. _**It is in this amazing moment that I have agreed to become the President of the LaRouche Organization,**_ and I am looking forward to the opportunity to work with each of you in pulling mankind back from the brink of the apocalypse. We must demand that the leaders of our Republic answer to the needs of humanity and the American people (which are not in contradiction), not the monied interests that line their pockets, while billions suffer the consequences. Lyndon LaRouche was the greatest American patriot I ever met, and was loved by leaders from every continent because they recognized in him a dedication to the principle of creating a world in which every child had the freedom to develop his or her God-Given talent for the good of mankind as a whole. John Quincy Adams and Friedrich Schiller were among many who believed that the United States had that potential and it is up to us to finally make that happen. To that end, the Schiller Institute will be holding an extremely important online conference on the weekend of December 7 and 8, _"In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men, Become Brethren!_ ," which is designed to assemble international leaders dedicated to creating a new security and economic architecture which upholds the principle of national sovereignty of all nations equally, and the dignity and perfectibility of the human species. _**Join me there! Click the link below to register.**_ | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=diane_template&n=2 "Free Registration for Schiller Institute
Conference") [Free Registration for Schiller Institute Conference](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=diane_template&n=2)
---
Diane Sare
President, The LaRouche Organization
* * *

Peter,

President Trump has officially nominated Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead a new program, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), to CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING and make sure our tax dollars are SPENT WISELY!

_**Now, Elon and Vivek are CROWDSOURCING the American People to determine what should be cut first.**_

[**YOU HAVE BEEN SELECTED TO PROVIDE YOUR FEEDBACK!**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b5433491272b447d8f4184e6d145b091&_e=9Rom3VuWr3YviSm2dhFhVAhoxu0ttpQuAo4yhJDT3LnCYQ94IrAL0cTFDec9I1aREy9atAL1sZzVzHcnLx4TcFSk4QHEc_f08e5WwsS5DcST75946aDgVnpJgzHnkY8ysVmnftWzI0wcH92p_vXXSQzirihOd2ZK1cPR572JNyG9bZs8P_8WOy2HpHpsimgz6DZq8-GpMvXUPudbr_F2QOGrP1CTUYjw97a5JEF9MKmMXQQykeIBKVtezR_oPLw8OcMi9MjemN0VahCER2QVIWiTecydKfalgQiIslmg0-7YMic-Et8Nn_yFvTaOBSf47Tkw-xMlBfcBwGpjCRsXMVgzDQG51DA5zvyX00iIUJx9a4_jkja_5IjwML2boJHzMz11oQOMpRB46d5of7rxtiVvBCvYOt3UBDJqprETog0%3D)
[**Use this secure link to share what YOU think should be cut first!**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b5433491272b447d8f4184e6d145b091&_e=9Rom3VuWr3YviSm2dhFhVAhoxu0ttpQuAo4yhJDT3LnCYQ94IrAL0cTFDec9I1aREy9atAL1sZzVzHcnLx4TcFSk4QHEc_f08e5WwsS5DcST75946aDgVnpJgzHnkY8ysVmnftWzI0wcH92p_vXXSQzirihOd2ZK1cPR572JNyG9bZs8P_8WOy2HpHpsimgz6DZq8-GpMvXUPudbr_F2QOGrP1CTUYjw97a5JEF9MKmMXQQykeIBKVtezR_oPLw8OcMi9MjemN0VahCER2QVIeRuyp5HzwOrkxPkUr5Q-WuPSGwOFYBDMjvnCi5VeoN2akYIq31D-GeXxpRar-eO8r8085HHWUtEOmieJ8lPUPhLVlgf-0Hzp85wIEysvtsrzfRU_kIdAHRy4RkI9fSJxoD7_ideqB_Mj5lDtvR2kjM%3D)

_**In 2023 alone, the Federal Government WASTED OVER $900 BILLION OF TAX DOLLARS!**_

Elon and Vivek are set to SLASH the most wasteful spending across the Federal Government, but with so much to tackle, they need to know where to start!

_The American People gave President Trump a CLEAR MANDATE to Make America Great Again, and it starts with DEFUNDING the most useless Government Programs._

[**Can you take two minutes to provide your feedback before we have to move onto the next patriot?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b5433491272b447d8f4184e6d145b091&_e=9Rom3VuWr3YviSm2dhFhVAhoxu0ttpQuAo4yhJDT3LnCYQ94IrAL0cTFDec9I1aREy9atAL1sZzVzHcnLx4TcFSk4QHEc_f08e5WwsS5DcST75946aDgVnpJgzHnkY8ysVmnftWzI0wcH92p_vXXSQzirihOd2ZK1cPR572JNyG9bZs8P_8WOy2HpHpsimgz6DZq8-GpMvXUPudbr_F2QOGrP1CTUYjw97a5JEF9MKmMXQQykeIBKVtezR_oPLw8OcMi9MjemN0VahCER2QVITchHbgv-Kyu_8Kh4vd_liYtt9fJLTRgM87NS3Vpuj7eq5_tyQI5ovS-CquU-PNv7JBbs4d8BxCs0XNgFzoA3CmOfP-HoOWrTn_pIS3z0Si30eogp0w71Vp4yfY55hN7Z7PW8-FvwOlgl26o8iieuC8%3D)

Kailey, Government Waste Updates

body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_t=d1NJUv8Z7dZRcNaMt-E5uX3k1Mu0nwwQs4HZpnYiFPZZz6bI9XH5EQZO0arhZFPg5lRbveaJZD3CKaXUMm8dCr4qk04xYSoQOCr4SitSrOqa_0Ug7c2Nlby4eThHmOiZ)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_e=lemwNYDZABUjH6ESwIUQND71Zy0SSGcEOcr5c5rnUSF6BQQ0EUXtYwG_DtcMb1Olw3OkgKZ6Asf00hpCIL4537bnvkpufA2hOLMQrvxTjr7xuBRSvLNjXKhYhhYwLi843bINkFMhbESvaLB0vJGuiwIfL5MxvFAEQxPAU1Zlqlg2XRgIzvuJFuDwECzeZ-VyesVGmlrpcwHOPNgaR9OSbMDndl_jeHrFX7TK0R4cjX1x66D6DFDZhDEaaS5qDc82FNZ9vwRVa1Fc2cMGP88FW88gQi-424ToNYKQZyKG-xQUgMVGg8dUkpmTvN57_vBdfm2rgoqGqr7C69unMdgqgyEAHmazSQKBwCzwvT8Wj2fPJnJjnCeOQlkTwR-U0yV89qG3kzDdkI7bY37rYWlgNg%3D%3D)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_e=lemwNYDZABUjH6ESwIUQND71Zy0SSGcEOcr5c5rnUSF6BQQ0EUXtYwG_DtcMb1Olw3OkgKZ6Asf00hpCIL4537bnvkpufA2hOLMQrvxTjr7xuBRSvLNjXKhYhhYwLi843bINkFMhbESvaLB0vJGuiwIfL5MxvFAEQxPAU1Zlqlg2XRgIzvuJFuDwECzeZ-VyesVGmlrpcwHOPNgaR9OSbMDndl_jeHrFX7TK0R4cjX3BtfSIhe_0qn9OwtIt1UyeSEliODofSuMw2ENXaUFgPKhMtNUYti-Ns8UGfVSO0AqkKi3Uh_mtJueAEMeIwWlOyOZCYlf073_ws1SYddNZqdY4sJIC86zg4YpQhkw5CovaKbCZZiUGRBOyTmzscBcsGxWMYcNdwuMsDpCyRDDtvQ%3D%3D)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_e=lemwNYDZABUjH6ESwIUQND71Zy0SSGcEOcr5c5rnUSF6BQQ0EUXtYwG_DtcMb1Olw3OkgKZ6Asf00hpCIL4537bnvkpufA2hOLMQrvxTjr7xuBRSvLNjXKhYhhYwLi843bINkFMhbESvaLB0vJGuiwIfL5MxvFAEQxPAU1Zlqlg2XRgIzvuJFuDwECzeZ-VyesVGmlrpcwHOPNgaR9OSbMDndl_jeHrFX7TK0R4cjX2LfAn0mCzcExeLYYsnm_mgkEykrYbG_Ijy-01Lov0FcyGjT_2yD3elhzjlNwayzsnuvqxKzg7X0P1peNj6QoeUu35_SAMs41sg7yVOLoaacSnzuOyTjT1Kk8n9lCObZno6gUXTAssanw5bZaD0UfEXbIWIXvvRNFZDo_RbjopDhw%3D%3D)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before November 30.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_e=lemwNYDZABUjH6ESwIUQND71Zy0SSGcEOcr5c5rnUSF6BQQ0EUXtYwG_DtcMb1Olw3OkgKZ6Asf00hpCIL4537bnvkpufA2hOLMQrvxTjr7xuBRSvLNjXKhYhhYwLi843bINkFMhbESvaLB0vJGuiwIfL5MxvFAEQxPAU1Zlqlg2XRgIzvuJFuDwECzeZ-VyesVGmlrpcwHOPNgaR9OSbMDndl_jeHrFX7TK0R4cjX0BycTxVVotNsghz48P8A1k1dwhSIwMT7NH-uLap5Do6otzOS1rgnebEgJvglbagNbfuZxCGUgWy26JJQg_r2QPDfBo9K55XicAFcjf0Ps2TNOqa8j_IGAvIte4L9dMEe_zuZaqpdLGHvZDBiGbqoSDTlHIKNCLMo7Y1FF0d0gEiw%3D%3D)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c4fefd2706f6422d8114bb69bf9156f8&_t=d1NJUv8Z7dZRcNaMt-E5uX3k1Mu0nwwQs4HZpnYiFPZZz6bI9XH5EQZO0arhZFPg5lRbveaJZD3CKaXUMm8dCr4qk04xYSoQOCr4SitSrOqa_0Ug7c2Nlby4eThHmOiZ).

clean_body: | | | A recent report reveals alarming plans by Donald Trump's economic advisers and GOP allies to slash vital social safety net programs, including Medicaid and SNAP, to finance the extension of the 2017 tax cuts, which primarily benefited the wealthy. These discussions signal a troubling willingness to prioritize the wealthiest Americans at the expense of millions with lower incomes. An overwhelming of Americans DO NOT want these programs cut! If enacted, these cuts would jeopardize essential support for around** 70 million Americans, threatening their healthcare and food security. ** | We cannot stand by while protections for vulnerable communities are traded away to enrich the top 1 percent and another $4 trillion gets added to our national debt. Despite public reassurances during his campaign, Trump’s intentions to cut entitlements are now clear. Proposed spending caps and increased work requirements would further strain those already struggling. These proposed cuts are taken directly from Project 2025, which Trump pretended to know nothing about. ** Stand up for fairness and justice today. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
| | | Guess how Lauren Boebert is spending her time as CO-04's newest representative, Peter? She’s joined her disgraced bffs, Matt Gaetz and George Santos, on Cameo, **charging $250 a pop for personalized shoutouts.** Want her to say “Happy Birthday”? That’ll cost you. Want her to answer a question? Yep, that’s another $250. [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=d7f385697053446da5d250d9b039476e&_e=SW4jc5G4goEI9ZIT6T5w--mT9B6HjUi26Iae_GmHN7DzQDimY1gjVXt2QQOOC4AA2L5GIbdI-YNJJ2UggXZU9TvQQ24y75FO_HWvrZAbS_wLczXon3O7MxwAA405yVf93jLpZSDftpukVQn_SN-c0lUHDRp2ENLVDWQZIrLM2DF_k5srjdFVTS6ahbOmn0P0nFz2YqovwcRYy8XyDbfTB_eM5rVOluc6z_7Mz4OmuNYo5-mOsYBOXorM3VSHKXp31aVuas3Ydednz9Q5eHvcCZOp7CW4L8Rjn5m16z2J-Zw94x7xXUCqUYiXxav_6a3jr8bc3bj5w8oOhw62nsMvUaQ6LqcUdE-BH4nTP5Jtu1bDFDZk7MJCbKMXfjSCari5C_Q_9wrgHMuKVkcg0qKy5fX8QLDlM05fEutX0qNl0LEEeb_jmLRwyoz6Ob9F7SlR) And here’s where it gets shady: she’s not even listing herself as a Member of Congress. On Cameo, she’s calling herself a “politician.” Why? **Probably because House ethics rules limit outside earnings for Members of Congress to $31,815 a year.** **While Colorado families are working hard to make ends meet, Boebert’s busy scheming new ways to pad her bank account.** This is who Boebert is and always has been. She’s not in Congress to work for Colorado. She’s in it for herself—whether it’s cashing in on her public profile, taking donations from far-right billionaires, or throwing tantrums to stay in the headlines. **[It’s time to strategize and find the best ways to hold her accountable, but we can’t do it without you. clean_body: | | | Guess how Lauren Boebert is spending her time as CO-04's newest representative, Peter? She’s joined her disgraced bffs, Matt Gaetz and George Santos, on Cameo, charging $250 a pop for personalized shoutouts. Want her to say “Happy Birthday”? That’ll cost you. Want her to answer a question? Yep, that’s another $250. And here’s where it gets shady: she’s not even listing herself as a Member of Congress. On Cameo, she’s calling herself a “politician.” Why? Probably because House ethics rules limit outside earnings for Members of Congress to $31,815 a year. While Colorado families are working hard to make ends meet, Boebert’s busy scheming new ways to pad her bank account. This is who Boebert is and always has been. She’s not in Congress to work for Colorado. She’s in it for herself—whether it’s cashing in on her public profile, taking donations from far-right billionaires, or throwing tantrums to stay in the headlines. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Lauren Boebert isn’t interested in serving Colorado. But with your help, we’ll make sure her days in office are numbered. Thank you, Defeat Boebert PAC Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

body:
We know it may not seem like it has the power to make a difference, but when everyone chips in, it makes a HUGE impact
#

**$1.**
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, $1.
$1 because our work to fight back against Donald Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress has already begun.
$1 because the gun lobby will say, spend, and do anything to reverse the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement.
$1 because the majority of our fundraising comes from people like you donating to emails like these, and right now we’re falling behind on our November fundraising goals.
We know it may not seem like $1 has the power to make a difference. But when everyone contributes their $1, it all adds up and makes a HUGE impact on our work to save lives.
So please:
[**Use this link to make a $1 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241125-1-30&amount=1&t=1&akid=9503%2E3935704%2EVZOoPo)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/resistance-101-block-the-bots?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75be67d2-d932-42a6-bccc-e2c42ad9dc08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Is it me, or are there more? Facebook Bots, that is.
Really - bots are on any social media or email platform. I'm just very aware of them on Facebook.
Here's how you can tell if it's a bot: when you look at a post, hover the cursor over the name. If you don't see any schools, photos, friends, or other personal activities, chances are high that they are not real humans. These are profiles either created by another human or created digitally, with the specific goal of misinforming, disinforming, or interacting with you in order to extract data.
I'm talking about photos shared on your Facebook page by an organization or some stranger you've never heard of. Some of them seem harmless, but do you really follow any "Down Home Cooking" recipes pages? Then there are the posts about movie stars who are moving out of the country. I get lots of those lately. There are lots of hunters' pictures, with some dude propping up wildlife they have shot. Then there are the photos about two genders, and only two genders.
Who posts these so they get into my Facebook feed? I don't know. I probably don't want to know. But I need to block them. They are up to no good.
To get rid of them, click on the name of the profile. There will be three dots, (but not an ellipsis). Click on the dots and you will see an option to block the sender. Now here is where it gets interesting - if you see a message that says, "Ban ____ and new profiles they may create", that's almost surely a bot, and you want to ban all of the profiles they may create.
All of this may seem super-basic to the tech savvy crowd. But to the average user, if they see it on Facebook, they think it must be true. Or they think that "everyone" is talking about the movie stars leaving the country, or the concept of two genders.
Don't be fooled. Just block them.
I don't know if I'm really getting a lot more of them in the days since the election, or if I grew accustomed to having my team swat them away. Sometimes when I check Facebook, I have maybe 2-3 authentic posts, and the rest are from bots.
That's disturbing.
Block the bots.
Blocking the bots keeps your social media feed narrowed down to those things that you want to see. It also prevents the spread of misinformation and disinformation.
Think of it as Resistance 101.
**Speaking of tech issues:** if you have been trying to email me and I have gone silent, it's because I was migrating my campaign email from one server to another and something went terribly wrong. Until I get it resolved, please email me at [paulacollinsjd@gmail.com](https://substack.com/redirect/92eb25d3-bf97-49a2-b5ec-a7f8523e3f9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..3xGXaezXv2v_XFLFo4lmxsJwp6x4hl3OkGZT3DSJP9g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152158889)

body:
It’s official – Matt Gaetz’s seat is about to be filled in a special election!

| |
---
| | | ***** SPECIAL ELECTION FOR MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT *** **

It's official - the special election in Florida's First Congressional District was just declared and voting starts in January!

Every House race is critical but with our Conservative House Majority hanging on by a THREAD, this might be the most important special election of the century.

**Our Pro-Trump Republican trifecta could be COMPLETELY DESTROYED if Democrats manage to win key races like this.**

That's why we are PLEADING for your help right now.

Majority Leader Scalise set a goal of raising one million dollars to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with an America First Patriot, win every other special election, AND deliver President Trump's agenda. | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dUuJkT7XR5UAWNpdXpTMbA~~/AARclAA~_fbRGeNEjYqUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED: DONATE NOW")

Remember:

**Democrats were just humiliated in a national election. They are desperate to ruin our Republican trifecta. And they know winning this special election would change everything. **

That's why this race must be a top priority for Conservatives everywhere.

_The first votes will be cast in January so time is of the essence! _

Whatever happens between now and then could seal the fate of our fragile House Majority - and our entire Republican trifecta. So can you help? We're desperate!

body:

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Before you sign off for Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Saturday is the last day to reach our November fundraising goal.
#
Hey Derek,
As we look ahead to what it’s going to take to keep PA 🔵 in 2026 and 2028, we’re coming up on an important deadline this weekend.
Saturday is the _last day_ to reach our November fundraising goal, but with Thanksgiving on Thursday, we have a feeling yinz + youse won’t be paying much attention to your email this week... **and we don’t blame ya!** 🦃
But even though the holidays are here and we just had an election, this goal is still important for us to reach. Keeping this seat blue isn’t a given, which means we need to hit every one of our goals to make sure we’re in the best position possible.
**So before you get too busy with all the food and crazy takes from your Republican uncles and grandparents,[can you pitch in $5 today to help make sure we reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241125?refcode=em20241125-9626&amount=5&refcode2=9626_434096_eoz_nc&akid=9626%2E434096%2Eeoz_nc)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241125?amount=5&refcode=em20241125-9626&refcode2=9626_434096_eoz_nc&akid=9626%2E434096%2Eeoz_nc)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241125-9626-footer&t=1&refcode2=9626_434096_eoz_nc&akid=9626%2E434096%2Eeoz_nc)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Jared Golden
subject: Our race is headed to a recount!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Help us make sure every vote is counted.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84344?refcode=em20241125-8681&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8681%2E614464%2Ef8NwSw)
Hi Peter, it’s Jared Golden.
I’m writing with an important update on my race... After all the votes have been counted and the ranked choice voting tabulation is now complete, I remain in the lead in Maine’s second district by 2,706 votes, of nearly 403,000 votes cast.
**However, my opponent has filed for a recount, which is within his right to do. This is expected to take place over the next couple of weeks.**
**[I need your help to make sure every vote is counted! So will you split a donation between me and Lucas Kunce to help us prepare for a recount?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84344?refcode=em20241125-8681&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8681%2E614464%2Ef8NwSw)**
Thank you,
Jared

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). name: Molly Duane
subject: 18 cases, one mission: fighting for reproductive freedom
body:
We're not going anywhere | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97659162/514147169/59579377?sourceid=1150059&utm_campaign=25emkge-1112aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=givingtuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjJjNzdjYi02ZmFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDav-328F-TFD7b8KcUBDDo-TILjyIVUQw_5FsbRCzs=&emci=562c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5f2c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
---
18 active cases, Peter.

**Right now, the Center for Reproductive Rights has 18 active cases in the United States alone.** We are fighting harder than ever to protect reproductive freedom. But we can't do it without you.

[**Since Donald Trump was re-elected as U.S. president earlier this month, over 200 supporters have become _Champions for Reproductive Rights_ —a group of committed monthly donors who sustain our critical work. Will you join them?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97659163/514147170/129720750?sourceid=1150059&utm_campaign=25emkge-1112aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=givingtuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjJjNzdjYi02ZmFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDav-328F-TFD7b8KcUBDDo-TILjyIVUQw_5FsbRCzs=&emci=562c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5f2c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

When you start a monthly donation today, it will go 3X as far in the fight to build, enforce, and defend protections for reproductive rights around the world. **Your regular support will provide steady, reliable funding that we can draw on during critical moments that require bold and strategic action.**

Together, we'll stand strong against the anti-rights movement and build a future where reproductive freedom is secure.

**Monthly donors make this possible:**
* Funding 18 ongoing legal battles in the U.S.
* Responding to new threats to reproductive rights
* Fighting for a future where freedom is protected for all

| [**GIVE MONTHLY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97659164/514147171/129720750?sourceid=1150059&utm_campaign=25emkge-1112aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=givingtuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjJjNzdjYi02ZmFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDav-328F-TFD7b8KcUBDDo-TILjyIVUQw_5FsbRCzs=&emci=562c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5f2c77cb-6fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237 "GIVE MONTHLY")
---
We're not just defending against today's attacks—we're empowering change for tomorrow. Peter, that's why reproductive rights champions like you must act now. Make your first monthly gift today.

clean_body: We're not going anywhere | 18 active cases, Peter. Right now, the Center for Reproductive Rights has 18 active cases in the United States alone. We are fighting harder than ever to protect reproductive freedom. But we can't do it without you. When you start a monthly donation today, it will go 3X as far in the fight to build, enforce, and defend protections for reproductive rights around the world. Your regular support will provide steady, reliable funding that we can draw on during critical moments that require bold and strategic action. Together, we'll stand strong against the anti-rights movement and build a future where reproductive freedom is secure. Monthly donors make this possible: Funding 18 ongoing legal battles in the U.S. Responding to new threats to reproductive rights * Fighting for a future where freedom is protected for all | "GIVE MONTHLY" We're not just defending against today's attacks—we're empowering change for tomorrow. Peter, that's why reproductive rights champions like you must act now. Make your first monthly gift today. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Winterizing our operation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Pleasant Peninsula PAC
body:
We’re winterizing our operation here at Team Scholten, but believe me, we’re still working. You’re going to be hearing from us a bit less, weekly at this point. But we’re still going to need you to help us with our future preparations.

---
| I’m a gardener. Every fall, I get the garden ready for the winter–a process that takes more time than people expect. Roses must be pruned, the last weeds are pulled so they don’t take root, bulbs are planted, hay is laid over our garden beds, and the irrigation system is drained. We take stock of what grew well and what didn’t, and we make a plan for what seeds to order again and which ones to skip so that come Spring, we’re ready.

So too with our campaign operation. The off-year is active–data is analyzed, the office is packed up neatly, yard signs are stored, and we look over our finances. And we plan. We plan, plan, plan, and prepare. We’re winterizing our operation here at Team Scholten, but believe me, we’re still working. You’re going to be hearing from us a bit less, but we’re still going to need you to help us with our future preparations.

[_**Not only am I rebuilding for my own operation, but I’m growing my leadership fund to help others. I hope I can count on your support as we use this time to plan, strategize, and prepare for the year ahead.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97659433/514148178/2042543991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzczOTc0Zi03MGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWvEFUjVcXjUWTkcnydLe7phRIGbmm035OXDQFFY33Y=)

clean_body: New analysis: uncalled CA-13 is up to us | = | Hey there. We’ve been keeping you all apprised of the results in CA-13, one of the last uncalled U.S. House races. Over the past few days the count has narrowed in favor of Democrat Adam Gray. We’ve been working 24/7 to ensure every vote is counted — including helping voters correct errors that could invalidate their votes (aka ballot “curing”). = = = = = = = This new finding is from a reporter at FiveThirtyEight, one of the nation's leading election forecasting media outlets. What they are saying is critically important: We still have an opportunity to flip this seat from red to blue, but it’s going to come down to which party can do a better job “curing” (aka fixing errors) in otherwise eligible ballots. We are on the ground doing this work RIGHT NOW. But counting has taken longer than expected and we are significantly over budget. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. clean_body: Friend, we cannot give in to despair. | | = Peter, with Republicans soon to be in control of all three branches of Government, the work in front of us is more important than ever. Our sights must be set on 2026, and we must start working right now to win back control of Congress in that election. So we're not wasting any time, Peter. We're already investing in the long-term organizing work that will help us turn the tide. And in the meantime, Yassamin will be fighting every day in Congress to limit the damage done by Trump and his radical allies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, — Team Yassamin | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? = = PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b4dc6aaf7f0454bb04f4543b8d5b6aa&_e=Y9nNgFvidE4RxAMj7FWFH8wmq7NgsrV0aqp5XrUkNx5Dm1SCKNFxmXUL3GRNWGzL9FmYXzUB78HBBP9l37pTv5gZwI5U8raR7yHxjMu73NkU92z2NMLpju61H7ZUY2rk3_re6wimeKrx-DRp2jP8hd6g1-eLAl78VVT76k7cFUUJJJ2moA-K6A-se-vJ-xvNTfvb5T5Zfll3GcHCd2TyfImfanr0ctonyxPHr02jzvEMe2sjQ5DONqZ-I_gLECQDiO5HcYYuUYT_7wAQBy9_DeTrGqlW1EP5c31r8jXs_0b2JHCXRJ9xEi-pVuYsFLY5sH7K6ElfQp6mWc8d8_1rrOYmzlVR4TwxTVPd7hctwnzZZAWfZxEzw8ZLoGpWPuQtPXP2DlXoQUCNzdgIH58grIOuYI4ufXWcFLgYXO3e0pY%3D)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---

body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.

| |

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b28c02a3df8e4286964aebce1044cdfb&_e=qCtC90mkynKskRroIyEf-syGZxk993ioooky94fcOUXBxmhA-19l1QIj8DRknvHL_HUFk_NNJ9soRQIuu2qk1vOisVpaAZexIaj3ihvIrMf8rRXUlvc4S-4F_aMV8-bdAEEcdDCTmoODEYZgsBwHY1_o2s2o9D_ZGoVzpTgl9NSGhh8WXwHE6FiKXMX9nr1Zh0YUyFaW5CgmXK7pbPoA5kCEvPs7x-Ik_jvp1_8HtDe_ewMovTIaFE76azBSJa_vSWOmxtc1nnSezRrflu1t1q_GPHlu_vW7mEp4VYs05HBlbuNz7yD-58rwhPopX0iwuqBAr7PNtZbNwUcfZYpxa7s4GzuMlP1cVE7grwyG21AlWz_hKO3kUapE46gV2iDqqEyb6KhBh_sq0X2UvCqjMH73iR0qRE0jvuskHVi9uek%3D)

Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_? Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b28c02a3df8e4286964aebce1044cdfb&_e=qCtC90mkynKskRroIyEf-syGZxk993ioooky94fcOUXBxmhA-19l1QIj8DRknvHL_HUFk_NNJ9soRQIuu2qk1vOisVpaAZexIaj3ihvIrMf8rRXUlvc4S-4F_aMV8-bdAEEcdDCTmoODEYZgsBwHY1_o2s2o9D_ZGoVzpTgl9NSGhh8WXwHE6FiKXMX9nr1Zh0YUyFaW5CgmXK7pbPoA5kCEvPs7x-Ik_jvp1_8HtDe_ewMovTIaFE76azBSJa_v-kKcezrHjUGJrla8uC-h8C8yymhLVXmqUP6bMbg3GEtySbgY1kosNlc8bGbi1vBj37vvAQ5XjLWBjd8ILMOK1cw95MzY1AcGXmibCS2ZA6c82Nw2vcKciiLgnT4jkgOtvo5FqNdKXOV94SuAIkdm-F0GIqupAvxjo3PtCvAlPmE%3D)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b28c02a3df8e4286964aebce1044cdfb&_e=qCtC90mkynKskRroIyEf-syGZxk993ioooky94fcOUXBxmhA-19l1QIj8DRknvHL_HUFk_NNJ9soRQIuu2qk1vOisVpaAZexIaj3ihvIrMf8rRXUlvc4S-4F_aMV8-bdAEEcdDCTmoODEYZgsBwHY1_o2s2o9D_ZGoVzpTgl9NSGhh8WXwHE6FiKXMX9nr1Zh0YUyFaW5CgmXK7pbPoA5kCEvPs7x-Ik_jvp1_8HtDe_ewMovTIaFE76azBSJa_vN9J7eIl08xm6HkagA_iLye3V7h8CEF_-lGhMWb42TYk3HAOreWrHW8Usso6lf_WNApuDIsGYqjh6huxM7mMVILYVzqHjwGMRJjZtgT6Y4ck3rgFfvOmiBcWJ_19i8Cn2_JxUAxR58bqI_aLbdHyllDZ9pFn72fxzGYfafLGiv7Q%3D) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events. Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories. Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries. Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b28c02a3df8e4286964aebce1044cdfb&_e=qCtC90mkynKskRroIyEf-syGZxk993ioooky94fcOUXBxmhA-19l1QIj8DRknvHL_HUFk_NNJ9soRQIuu2qk1vOisVpaAZexIaj3ihvIrMf8rRXUlvc4S-4F_aMV8-bdAEEcdDCTmoODEYZgsBwHY1_o2s2o9D_ZGoVzpTgl9NSGhh8WXwHE6FiKXMX9nr1Zh0YUyFaW5CgmXK7pbPoA5kCEvPs7x-Ik_jvp1_8HtDe_ewMovTIaFE76azBSJa_vZVnqNcHrfkN6jE157Kxb_zqOmFju8f4qGseN_gHzM2DFC9ESXvw9a5VRxeEwTzmexyvF2GzxlJh3Szxd018j7_-0ilENG4CrCU5CCZZ3Go-Fq24wUUPYx8CAbPwz_3Cu5gtM9s1GMFvEJNdlAkNVW6Nt8WXswQ6lwH6jHdE6UY0%3D)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values. God bless America,

Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events. Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories. Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries. Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values. God bless America, | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We remain steadfastly focused on the fundamentals of our 10 Year Plan.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97660670/514152340/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1OGE2MDdkLTczYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uyK6yc8LSX0b_rVNH5OCG95CSpUNJGe8Mv969FcZ5Js=&emci=0f9213a2-5eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=158a607d-73ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Like you, I am profoundly concerned about the incoming administration and what Republican control of the federal government means for our country. These results sting. Right now, lots of us are considering the most effective ways to use our time and energy to defend our democracy. At the NDRC, we have a tried-and-true strategy that’s delivered fairer maps and fairer representation, and we are ready to lean our weight into those efforts. As Executive Director of this organization, I may be biased, but I _truly_ think this is some of the most important work we can do during the incoming administration and leading up to the next nationwide redistricting cycle. Earlier this year, the NDRC published our 10 Year Plan with our strategic roadmap. We will refine our work as we continue to fully understand the changes and chances coming out of this year’s election results, but this election was just one part of the plan. We remain steadfastly focused on the fundamentals of our 10 Year Plan:
* **Best-in-class mapping:** The NDRC Geospatial Analytics Department will continue to lead the development of best-in-class mapping tools. Technology and the use of AI are changing the game rapidly, and our investments will ensure we have the best tools available to support the mapping and analysis of congressional and legislative redistricting plans for Democrats nationwide.
* **Electoral investment:** The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle. And looking ahead to 2025, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania.
* **Grassroots mobilization and public education:** As we inch towards the 2030 Census, we need to continue to build our community of pro-democracy, fair maps supporters so we have the capacity we need to mobilize efforts that build toward fair redistricting.
* **Redistricting reform:** And of course, we’re committed to advancing reforms and policy changes where redistricting processes need improvement.

I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters. I’m committed to doing everything I can to position the NDRC to be successful in ensuring fairness in our democracy. [**Are you with me? If so, please add your name here to recommit to the long-term fight for fairness.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97660672/514152342/2098600543?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_10yrPlan_email_20241125-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241125-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_campaign=10yrPlan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1OGE2MDdkLTczYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uyK6yc8LSX0b_rVNH5OCG95CSpUNJGe8Mv969FcZ5Js=&emci=0f9213a2-5eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=158a607d-73ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=8431045) Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps. We can do this. We have a smart plan, the right team, and a _truly_ remarkable community of supporters all across the country. [**So if you’re onboard — if you’re ready to get back to work — let me know by adding your name here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97660674/514152344/2098600543?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_10yrPlan_email_20241125-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241125-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_campaign=10yrPlan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1OGE2MDdkLTczYWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uyK6yc8LSX0b_rVNH5OCG95CSpUNJGe8Mv969FcZ5Js=&emci=0f9213a2-5eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=158a607d-73ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=8431045) Thank you — and more soon. Marina Marina Jenkins

Earlier this year, the NDRC published our 10 Year Plan with our strategic roadmap. We will refine our work as we continue to fully understand the changes and chances coming out of this year’s election results, but this election was just one part of the plan. We remain steadfastly focused on the fundamentals of our 10 Year Plan: Best-in-class mapping: The NDRC Geospatial Analytics Department will continue to lead the development of best-in-class mapping tools. Technology and the use of AI are changing the game rapidly, and our investments will ensure we have the best tools available to support the mapping and analysis of congressional and legislative redistricting plans for Democrats nationwide. Electoral investment: The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle. And looking ahead to 2025, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania. Grassroots mobilization and public education: As we inch towards the 2030 Census, we need to continue to build our community of pro-democracy, fair maps supporters so we have the capacity we need to mobilize efforts that build toward fair redistricting. Redistricting reform: And of course, we’re committed to advancing reforms and policy changes where redistricting processes need improvement. I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters. I’m committed to doing everything I can to position the NDRC to be successful in ensuring fairness in our democracy. Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps. We can do this. We have a smart plan, the right team, and a truly remarkable community of supporters all across the country. Thank you — and more soon. Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Dear Peter,
At some point in our lives, all of us will need care. **That means we all know someone who is a caregiver,** whether for a young child, an aging parent, a person with a disability, or another friend or family member.
If you’re a caregiver — either professionally, for your family members or balancing both — it’s likely that you’ve experienced moments where you feel underappreciated and undervalued for your work.
**We want to make sure that all caregivers feel supported and know how vital their work is.** So this Thanksgiving, we’re putting together an online thank-you wall to celebrate caregivers across the country in our community!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97660857/514152962/-652034714?ms=112524_thankyoufwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTgxN2E4MC03NGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gG_40GTOysdGY1-kGp-xOgajU_z3mhHB5XjYkO4jfBA=&emci=b1761fe2-8ea7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=9e817a80-74ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787)

subject: 3 dishes that will solve any Thanksgiving politics

body:
Pitch in any amount to my campaign today and all three recipes will be included on your donation receipt.

Peter,
The holiday season can be joyous, but I know it can also be tense — and with everything going on these days, we could all do with a little more joy and a little less tension.
**So to help ease your holiday season stress, today I’m sharing three of my favorite recipes: colorful, caramelized roasted vegetables, creamy, comforting mac & cheese, and savory, spicy sweet potato galettes.**

Food is an essential part of caring for ourselves and our communities. It helps us stay fueled for the fights to come and build the connections needed to effect real change.
Plus, sharing a meal together reminds us all that we still have so much to be grateful for. Especially when the food is this good!

Thank you and happy holidays,
Pramila Jayapal

name: Illinois Review
subject: ALERT: IL GOP Support Proves Again to be the "Kiss of Death"
body:
Establishment leaders long stricken with Trump Derangement Syndrome find creative ways to lose in historic Trump-dominated election cycle

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/9da7763d1828/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10348850?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=4ed4049ad8) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=4ed4049ad8)
