https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
IL GOP Support Proves Again to be the ‘Kiss of Death’ Even During a Trump-Dominated, Historic Election Cycle (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/11/il-gop-support-proves-again-to-be-the-kiss-of-death-even-during-a-trump-dominated-historic-election-cycle.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/11/il-gop-support-proves-again-to-be-the-kiss-of-death-even-during-a-trump-dominated-historic-election-cycle.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Donald Trump claims victory on Election Night in West Palm Beach, Florida, November 6, 2024. (Reuters/Brian Snyder)
By Illinois Review

It wasn’t that long ago when IL GOP leaders were endorsing Fl. Gov. Ron DeSantis’ failed presidential bid, hosting ‘Never Trumpers’ at fundraisers in Naples, Florida; naming anti-MAGA officials as gala co-chairs and blaming President Donald Trump for Illinois election losses in 2020 and 2022.

When Trump secured the Republican nomination for president last Spring, those same officials were silent. But that’s not all. When this publication revealed that a party leader in 2016 compared Donald Trump to Adolf Hitler – IL GOP officials were once again silent.

This pattern, however, should come as no surprise. In 2022, IL GOP officials backed Richard Irvin’s failed campaign for Illinois governor. During the primary campaign, it was reported by WTTW’s Paris Schutz that in 2018, Irvin sent text messages calling Trump an “idiot” and a “bigoted racist.” Irvin also texted the friend, “I hate Trump too!” Irvin would lose the primary to the Trump-endorsed candidate by 43 points.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/11/il-gop-support-proves-again-to-be-the-kiss-of-death-even-during-a-trump-dominated-historic-election-cycle.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
During Republican Day at the Illinois State Fair last year, then Illinois Republican national committeeman Richard Porter gave an interview to the Chicago Tribune and said that Trump couldn’t win independent voters in swing states in 2024 and that he was running for president to avoid going to jail:

“I think the most ardent Trumpers recognize that they might love him in their heart, but they know in their head he is not going to win independents in Georgia, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, New Hampshire, Arizona and Nevada. And that’s what you need to do to become president.

And if you don’t become president of the United States, Trump goes to jail.”

After this publication ran a story on his reported comments, Porter was in damage control, offering a long explanation to try and repair the damage – but it was too little, too late. And during the 2024 election, Trump would win every swing state proving Porter to be wrong once again.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/11/il-gop-support-proves-again-to-be-the-kiss-of-death-even-during-a-trump-dominated-historic-election-cycle.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4ed4049ad8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

clean_body: Standing together, we’ll fight back against MAGA. | Peter, Our fight for the future has never been more important. With Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists set to assume office at the beginning of next year, I’m ready to get to work and fight back against their agenda. We begin to rebuild now, and with your help, I’ll continue to drive forward policies in Harrisburg that work for all Pennsylvanians — regardless of MAGA extremists vision for our country. With all of us standing together, our movement can and will outlast the extremists that seek to strip away rights, restrict freedoms, and undermine our democratic institutions. name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC’s tweet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

When AOC correctly pointed out that the Democratic Party is far too
influenced by millions of dollars from right-wing megadonor-funded AIPAC
and their super PAC, they tried to fire back — and failed.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241125?refcode=em20241125-36181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ ]Tweet from AIPAC: Fact check on what Democratic voters find popular vs
unpopular, @AOC.

The anti-Palestinian lobby group tried claiming their stance is popular
because they were able to unseat Justice Democrats Representatives Cori
Bush and Jamaal Bowman after spending more than ever before in their 2024
primaries.

But we know the truth, and Cori and Jamaal quickly fact-checked them:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241125?refcode=em20241125-36181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ ]Tweet from Cori Bush: So popular you never mentioned the issue you
lobby for in ads. So popular you took GOP money and courted Republicans to
meddle in Dem primaries. So popular your candidate needed to spend 15x
more than what I spent to defeat a 52-year family dynasty.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241125?refcode=em20241125-36181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ ]Tweet from Rep. Jamaal Bowman Ed.D.: Fact check on how AIPAC buys
elections, targets Black people, and bullies elected officials at every
level of government all across the country. Fact check on your desperation
because the majority of Americans want an arms embargo and an end to
genocide.

If AIPAC's policies and politicians were popular, they wouldn't have to
spend $100 million to convince voters while actively avoiding mentioning
their "single issue" in TV ads.

We know AIPAC is already preparing to spend historic sums of money to stay
relevant and hold onto power in Washington in the next election cycle,
which is why we need to get ready to fight back harder than ever before.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241125?refcode=em20241125-36181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ ]It’s time for the Democratic Party to reject AIPAC, and we’re building
the resources to recruit working class, progressive candidates to run for
Congress who won’t be beholden to them. Will you help us by pitching in
$5 or more before our upcoming November 30th fundraising
deadline?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241125?refcode=em20241125-36181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ ]Contribute $5

Unlike AIPAC — which receives most of its money from GOP billionaires and
corporate donors — we depend on grassroots contributions from regular
folks like you to find and recruit the next generation of leaders to
transform the Democratic Party. Anything you can chip in will make a
difference!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241125-36181-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36181_1203867_xGesjJ&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36181%2E1203867%2ExGesjJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tina Smith
subject: Onward we go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi folks, It's been three weeks since the election, and I, like I imagine most of you, have been reflecting on our path forward. So I wanted to share some of my thoughts. In the days after the election, I needed a little time to unplug. My go-to was to watch the Lord of the Rings Trilogy, extended edition. Our chocolate lab Moose kept me company, Archie cooked me good food, and our grandchildren got me back on my feet. **But now it's back to work.** There are no easy answers to the complicated question of why we lost this election. We organized and fought hard to elect our great candidates — people we knew would work to improve the lives of Americans in red states, blue states, and all the states in between. That started with the top of the ticket, with our excellent candidates Vice President Kamala Harris and Governor Tim Walz. I thought they were going to win, like a lot of you, and their loss was hard to take. I will deeply miss working with my friends Sens. Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and Bob Casey, all champions for working people and their states. Not having them in the Senate is a big loss. At the same time, most of our Senate candidates won tough races — in Nevada, Wisconsin, Arizona, and Michigan. I’m excited to welcome back Tammy Baldwin, Jacky Rosen, and of course my friend and colleague Amy Klobuchar. I’m also excited to welcome to the Senate new colleagues like Adam Schiff of California, Ruben Gallego of Arizona, Elissa Slotkin of Michigan, Lisa Blunt Rochester of Delaware, Andy Kim of New Jersey, and Angela Alsobrooks of Maryland. I am so proud of this group of grassroots supporters who helped get these candidates over the finish line. Thank you so much. In moments like this, all we can do is move forward. We’ve faced challenges before and persevered. _So onward we go, to defend the values we stand for._ And as I always have, I will work with anyone who wants to work with me to move Minnesota and our country forward. This seat is on the ballot in 2026, along with my colleagues in Georgia, New Hampshire, Virginia, and more. And we have to fight like hell to protect them and take back the Senate majority. **We can do it. I know we can.** It will take hard work and grassroots energy. But we’ve won tough races before, and I know we can do it again. Folks, I’m ready to move forward and turn this moment into a new commitment and action for progress. Onwards,
Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97661747/514155615/279292157?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241125_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEwMDE0Ni03OGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tj4t8tOmmdaLcN_rAVwzAJzC078WduCf2KOgWNR8AiQ=)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: 20 million dollars in debt?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress](http://links
body:
| | | My friend, Remember the BILLION dollars that Kamala Harris raised in her 100-day campaign? Well, reports are starting to give us a clear picture of how mismanaged her campaign was. The Harris campaign paid Oprah Winfrey, Beyonce, and other celebrities for endorsements and ended her campaign with 20 million dollars in debt. They spent **$450,000 a day** to run an ad on the Las Vegas sphere.
---
[](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=eb4cf9b95df24c5e864e19cc9d6986a0&_e=H8IJ5SoTKDBqhUmv1dofIuY4FrjZf4QCoXS1iQBNDp2JqfqP4sC4aB240Gjgjc_xz6F2xToLkI1-4h8i0egkyuFZky70GdrWb_pHIrmiPIVFKKiAqpH61H79uYN-8sB__IpLz_8djzemtbu8xWcdgUGYKtzssN0G8Kh6bxd-bbWt--ZdvGs_X4HZnrCp9jCWVOXRy-H3In57MpQuch9Rnw3ASum5kS9hpdE8_IgQeKgEaXtnuJk2fZbIB9Goi4kRrm7URTsda68zZ3hUKi9oEE_hpxjpmLUusPi9fQ7KsDpKqZlC1i57wIdXu4zZgKKAxyO-yFOFHzmm9T0lkDtvYg%3D%3D)
---
_**... And she was going to fix our economy?**_ It’s clear we need leaders who will prioritize fiscal responsibility, not celebrity endorsements. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. We want to know what**YOU** think. **[What’s your top priority when it comes to fixing our nation’s economy?](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=eb4cf9b95df24c5e864e19cc9d6986a0&_e=H8IJ5SoTKDBqhUmv1dofIuY4FrjZf4QCoXS1iQBNDp2JqfqP4sC4aB240Gjgjc_xz6F2xToLkI1-4h8i0egkyuFZky70GdrWb_pHIrmiPIVFKKiAqpH61H79uYN-8sB__IpLz_8djzemtbu8xWcdgUGYKtzssN0G8Kh6bxd-bbVNym94fUzhJfJlLhB0l-ZyJ2lYK1GSSf6aryBLBlHoAxGVGCjM3Jn0XfxI4YMHQiilMc2U6_d5fywAD3XE6AsJBZa4U7QUfpU4zUzCPonJHsCNoMJGQQ_eQc5F4sYhz4nGpRgPhd6IbdOEPkrsydKENqH6JTIfleDPk2BIVSNUbg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | My friend, Remember the BILLION dollars that Kamala Harris raised in her 100-day campaign? Well, reports are starting to give us a clear picture of how mismanaged her campaign was. The Harris campaign paid Oprah Winfrey, Beyonce, and other celebrities for endorsements and ended her campaign with 20 million dollars in debt. They spent $450,000 a day to run an ad on the Las Vegas sphere. ... And she was going to fix our economy? It’s clear we need leaders who will prioritize fiscal responsibility, not celebrity endorsements. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. We want to know whatYOU think. Reducing the national debt Cutting wasteful government spending Lowering taxes for hardworking Americans Supporting small businesses and job growth Your feedback is crucial as we fight for the policies that matter most to you. Thank you for standing with us and making your voice heard. Glenn Grothman | | | | | | | FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA! | | | | ---|---|---|--- Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Something I know to be true
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When we work together, we can do tough things. And as much as any one of us can do on our own, we can accomplish so much more as a team.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.
As you know, I’m not afraid to tell you the truth, even when it’s tough.
And there’s no doubt about it — these next few years are going to be tough. Each of us is going to need to evaluate our efforts and our impact as we move ahead
But I also know this: When we work together, we can do tough things. And as much as any one of us can do on our own, we can accomplish so much more as a team.
This team helped me win my first Senate campaign. We rallied and won a second time so I could serve a full term in the Senate. Over the last two years we supported good candidates in tough races around the country, and even though things didn’t go as well as we’d hoped, we did notch several critically important wins.
I know that as we look to the challenges ahead of us, this team is going to have an important role to play.
If Gabby has taught me one thing, it is that we don’t get to quit just because things get tough. I will not be going anywhere, and I hope I can count on you to stick with me.
Thanks so much for what you’ve already done, and thanks in advance for what we’ll do together in the years to come.
Hang in there,
Mark

👋 Wait! Before you go 🧑🚀
Mark Kelly is going to need a massive team behind him as we prepare for the work ahead of us. If you’re looking to be a part of it, please:
[**Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly as he continues to serve Arizona. He needs you on his team.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_nov24_em/?source=em241125-1-120&akid=5925%2E6688874%2EQ4umxT)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_nov24_em/?source=em241125-1-120&akid=5925%2E6688874%2EQ4umxT)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5925%2E6688874%2EQ4umxT).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Your response is needed [Trump’s Cabinet approval]
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=agHh7g9hbcZVt25xQ8cHyyn%2BK5A%2FsEW4GBX7uztqo0PaixUh%2Fx43sxYFUMjSUn41uA5idtNiZu5gIzEbz108obnjW0aD%2FpAbtgmeU4278qY6l3FrJUY%2FUk%2BYojgyoYHYG1EswQVA1BdkHRsySOwlr7B6xQspMT7TaIIeXGWRaVNQC%2Bn1qRQV4YfdHfbSzmSpLnHm3YQeVYKhug0QcaBAF6ZOFyJhlyRJaWTk3zHjGZlZAHeLt6HQpqJyBPg4VorEb1H%2BSIErE8i66HuJNqhjF8%2FY7%2F8YrqMH2sk9NGVjjP5oABAUQElX%2BwatwLvNc741e4k5aHXAcpJMrXW5y9OwmH48vnezay2xFl6wjUN7eU%2BlTnLNGxI3DMR0aRLfnGIGjc83VeqrK7OaHJHFojZW9L9SEG8rZHItd3Y%2FOZuq12E%3D]

# [#]
Peter, Trump has taken no time in making nominations for his cabinet. Here at TOP PAC, we’ve been keeping a close eye on his nominations and we want to catch you up on some of his most SHOCKING picks:

❌ Dr. Mehmet Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
❌ Elon Musk + Vivek Ramaswamy for Department of Government Efficiency
❌ Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Department of Health and Human Services
❌ Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense

Trump will only continue to nominate the most unqualified and inexperienced picks for his cabinet. Look, we think these picks are AWFUL, but we need to know if our top supporters feel the same.

Your response to our one-minute survey is needed before midnight tonight: Do you support or oppose Trump’s current cabinet nominations? [https://secure.everyaction.com/8q1zlH6IdUuqPS8iQmuq3A2]

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, Trump has taken no time in making nominations for his cabinet. Here at TOP PAC, we’ve been keeping a close eye on his nominations and we want to catch you up on some of his most SHOCKING picks: ❌ Dr. Mehmet Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services ❌ Elon Musk + Vivek Ramaswamy for Department of Government Efficiency ❌ Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Department of Health and Human Services ❌ Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense Trump will only continue to nominate the most unqualified and inexperienced picks for his cabinet. Look, we think these picks are AWFUL, but we need to know if our top supporters feel the same. Your response to our one-minute survey is needed before midnight tonight: Do you support or oppose Trump’s current cabinet nominations? [] I OPPOSE HIS NOMINATIONS » [] I SUPPORT SOME NOMINATIONS » [] I SUPPORT HIS NOMINATIONS » [] I’M NOT SURE » [] Thank you for your response! Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. Team, I wanted you to see this. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97662589/514158373/823540626?refcode=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTBlZWI2Ni03YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCU_nFLMDq0z0xN8iACEvrWI1DzH4ecj2fc2aYjtLks=&emci=2718c168-5fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1049176)
**North Carolinians spoke, and our Attorney General’s office will _remain_ in Democratic hands, Peter!** Jeff Jackson has a long record of advocacy for our state, from his work as an assistant District Attorney to his service in the NC Senate and the U.S. House of Representatives. He’s ready to take up the mantle from our previous Democratic Attorneys General — Gov. Roy Cooper and Gov.-elect Josh Stein — and protect North Carolinians’ constitutional rights. And with so much uncertainty around how the federal government will go on a range of different topics, it’s critical that North Carolinians can rely on our AG to stand up for all of us. However, Republican legislators just pushed through a bill that strips the incoming Attorney General of certain powers and will force him to work according to the whim of the GOP-controlled legislature. North Carolina voters chose _Jeff Jackson_ to be their AG — not far-right Raleigh Republicans. That choice must be respected. **[Look, the AG should serve the people — NOT politicians. If you agree, sign on to CONDEMN the GOP legislature’s blatant power grab >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97662590/514158374/781371918?refcode=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTBlZWI2Ni03YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCU_nFLMDq0z0xN8iACEvrWI1DzH4ecj2fc2aYjtLks=&emci=2718c168-5fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97662591/514158375/781371918?refcode=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTBlZWI2Ni03YWFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCU_nFLMDq0z0xN8iACEvrWI1DzH4ecj2fc2aYjtLks=&emci=2718c168-5fab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=410eeb66-7aab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1049176)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8196%2E5257348%2EfFhxIO)
Hi Derek — I hope you are doing well.
Because of your support, I have a new title for the first time in years: United States Senator-Elect. And I can’t thank you enough.
Over the last few weeks, while continuing to serve the people of my congressional district in the House, I’ve also participated in a bipartisan Senate orientation.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241125_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8196%2E5257348%2EfFhxIO)
_Here I am with the new Democratic Senators: Lisa Blunt Rochester, Elissa Slotkin, Andy Kim, Ruben Gallego, and Angela Alsobrooks. I campaigned with and for these wonderful people and am lucky to have the opportunity to work with them now in the Senate._
I have been making a determined effort to meet with my new colleagues across the aisle and look for ways we can work together. The Senate operates on unanimous consent for much of its business and you can’t move anything forward without bipartisan support. As I will be in the minority in both houses, this will be all the more essential.
With a new chamber of Congress comes new rules and procedures to learn, new committee assignments, and much more.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241125_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=8196%2E5257348%2EfFhxIO)
_Here’s Eve and I in front of my new (temporary) office ... in the basement._
Throughout my campaign, I spoke with voters about the need to bring down the cost of housing, child care, food, and medicine — and I am determined to do all I can to make the economy work for everyone.
I’m ready to roll up my sleeves, find people across the aisle, and make sure we deliver for the hard-working people of our state. And, as always, stand up for our democracy and freedoms.
Thank you again for being a part of this campaign.
— Adam

clean_body: | Hi Derek — I hope you are doing well. Because of your support, I have a new title for the first time in years: United States Senator-Elect. And I can’t thank you enough. Over the last few weeks, while continuing to serve the people of my congressional district in the House, I’ve also participated in a bipartisan Senate orientation. Here I am with the new Democratic Senators: Lisa Blunt Rochester, Elissa Slotkin, Andy Kim, Ruben Gallego, and Angela Alsobrooks. I campaigned with and for these wonderful people and am lucky to have the opportunity to work with them now in the Senate. I have been making a determined effort to meet with my new colleagues across the aisle and look for ways we can work together. The Senate operates on unanimous consent for much of its business and you can’t move anything forward without bipartisan support. As I will be in the minority in both houses, this will be all the more essential. With a new chamber of Congress comes new rules and procedures to learn, new committee assignments, and much more. Here’s Eve and I in front of my new (temporary) office ... in the basement. Throughout my campaign, I spoke with voters about the need to bring down the cost of housing, child care, food, and medicine — and I am determined to do all I can to make the economy work for everyone. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves, find people across the aisle, and make sure we deliver for the hard-working people of our state. And, as always, stand up for our democracy and freedoms. Thank you again for being a part of this campaign. — Adam | | 135 E. name: George Latimer
subject: Which issues matter most to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=ZVaMutD%2BHblsVgyfQxMcSd0yQ4VQ5IXMDPjIBblI2YqN%2BbCXAM3oueRudHSBg00hTk%2F9j%2Blz2KAcZGCVViz1NPfxQxQfsySBbuya9VZCvQ0xDJqnCa4EDaSNFM%2B0uN4Q8cfsdMHkkRLg3SM7eHqKz0uYHo4j6uekqkn5MDlC9dXNdicp2C20ApG0YYYD5SFLtSZFcn8qN7d5soQGu2OZhi4J9IOB5ATeg9zYv6Z1yMThA49dWF6gtEnKhECXqhXkw4NsRPA4Yfn5LvaCVuTJfSqmf9gIL6tjjD29Nagnj7AIsCSjZCi2HPfOodXiEpQT8ogF8uFg%2FogFx7X9Z8j3Ioq2pdBu5k%2FAI1Qx2r%2FINLCTguaaNbi48gAAxYIuTdTryFzMm0RAoPMinZF7T8vDtLEyRIJcAmVAaPCOceidPgynaSSo1%2FJ0Mvw8S9HYQmfk]

# [#]
Hi Peter, do you have a minute to chat?

As we inch closer and closer to being sworn in as a member of the 119th Congress in January, I look forward to continuing to deliver real results on issues that impact our communities most. Being able to give back to the communities that have given me so much throughout the years is what drives me.

As your Congressman-elect for New York’s 16th, I’m committed to making a real difference in the lives of folks in our communities. I’m in this fight to make our diverse district a place for all people to live, work, and above all, thrive.

As I enter my first term in Congress, It’s important that I know which issues I should prioritize. My team put together a survey so you can share directly with me what’s on your mind. Will you please take a moment to complete this survey? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rTbey9fDFEq50KlsI3-7BA2]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rTbey9fDFEq50KlsI3-7BA2]

Your feedback is invaluable to me, Peter. Knowing what issues matter to you most will accelerate progress and lasting solutions in Congress.

Thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts.

— George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: I couldn’t have won without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’m excited to serve as our next U.S. senator and fight for conservative principles and Ohio values, but I need your help to determine what issues you most want me to fight for. [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d75645b6e5e043d9b4a2e2e55f5b34f6&_e=C8Xd6d7-AxSOVfuMa-HX48fmD9nVkNQiMUibZSQPSKglIYyiDZhShRDhtO5vDOsH3BtpYWe9jS8q54j2vkcokHUBiJDknRGL4WE1pLtpq20F1U2o_YVBy3WYhkJLkyKfFlwAOVsuI-Hx-jaXAoYUK-ggcvy95IeUxw5LIP6MsOkGzAEQ3zNhWScQqm0M-x-r2k18cH4VGcwYrMEpkvYbBoqK1Crm6c61RbhFaQdAEQPFmtMS7Yw7ANQqMwWN-IasNY_5AT8XPycbTUXr5iojk9n31wku1ssjUl9edbJUysYiIMDXBoWpK_Gloou1UQk0qa0PLvcieuvZuN95hbYCjUHsqCeOFqCNGIPGewmLCghxQ7FBbCSPghpO2EJZlbVDRBx8upIhL5WjKwV1IATo1veL2O2M0AEabwu5hKERoCLZFJnG1W73jD22IcFzsjoiQlLSn5NOQQPIwVhs4GF5Dw%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d75645b6e5e043d9b4a2e2e55f5b34f6&_e=C8Xd6d7-AxSOVfuMa-HX48fmD9nVkNQiMUibZSQPSKglIYyiDZhShRDhtO5vDOsH3BtpYWe9jS8q54j2vkcokHUBiJDknRGL4WE1pLtpq20F1U2o_YVBy3WYhkJLkyKfFlwAOVsuI-Hx-jaXAoYUK-ggcvy95IeUxw5LIP6MsOkGzAEQ3zNhWScQqm0M-x-r2k18cH4VGcwYrMEpkvYbBoqK1Crm6c61RbhFaQdAEQPFmtMS7Yw7ANQqMwWN-IasNY_5AT8XPycbTUXr5iojk9n31wku1ssjUl9edbJUysYiIMDXBoWpK_Gloou1UQk0Dz2TbQwUxnrmAu3IT8dLcw3ZtQa53FLxp-9smg6PgAetNgqOrScOsSFJWubDqoI6tnFr3-PKo9eXrsMhohFNWOMJfO5-heHlibZEmVEv8PrSOCBfA-NtLnSLYIGTUaw24fV0Om2EqwsesO9f0yOu7Q%3D%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d75645b6e5e043d9b4a2e2e55f5b34f6&_e=C8Xd6d7-AxSOVfuMa-HX48fmD9nVkNQiMUibZSQPSKglIYyiDZhShRDhtO5vDOsH3BtpYWe9jS8q54j2vkcokHUBiJDknRGL4WE1pLtpq20F1U2o_YVBy3WYhkJLkyKfFlwAOVsuI-Hx-jaXAoYUK-ggcvy95IeUxw5LIP6MsOkGzAEQ3zNhWScQqm0M-x-r2k18cH4VGcwYrMEpkvYbBoqK1Crm6c61RbhFaQdAEQPFmtMS7Yw7ANQqMwWN-IasNY_5AT8XPycbTUXr5iojk9n31wku1ssjUl9edbJUysYiIMDXBoWpK_Gloou1UQk0rzAJmu5ruxr1NffUkLgeYR5FSy6PStsHvT4d9wquWGkdFaktYL3uaLrEjqemdXkouMJHFnZTr4TDtGBNl385QK7YsyUmwsrRY_gtQnjGskn0JY6jWDF_XKT_r6VedbsGR642p9cZkyASw1RIzHFuPA%3D%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

[**Please take a few moments today to complete your Top Issues Survey.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d75645b6e5e043d9b4a2e2e55f5b34f6&_e=C8Xd6d7-AxSOVfuMa-HX48fmD9nVkNQiMUibZSQPSKglIYyiDZhShRDhtO5vDOsH3BtpYWe9jS8q54j2vkcokHUBiJDknRGL4WE1pLtpq20F1U2o_YVBy3WYhkJLkyKfFlwAOVsuI-Hx-jaXAoYUK-ggcvy95IeUxw5LIP6MsOkGzAEQ3zNhWScQqm0M-x-r2k18cH4VGcwYrMEpkvYbBoqK1Crm6c61RbhFaQdAEQPFmtMS7Yw7ANQqMwWN-IasNY_5AT8XPycbTUXr5iojk9n31wku1ssjUl9edbJUysYiIMDXBoWpK_Gloou1UQk0HK7AN0Q0fW2gR4J3a5xHedb0l5As0d_YuX8SQE_gKXqpCTIwu2cuf2MiGZsZDYzZMb65eUfvoiynAS-tqHo6CXBRwYR2norabG9j-3Z3JLCzus1EHny3XZk0ZX2KgVgrWYsz5T69uuCm4Vsmy5guBA%3D%3D) I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win.

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d75645b6e5e043d9b4a2e2e55f5b34f6&_e=C8Xd6d7-AxSOVfuMa-HX48fmD9nVkNQiMUibZSQPSKglIYyiDZhShRDhtO5vDOsH3BtpYWe9jS8q54j2vkcokHUBiJDknRGL4WE1pLtpq20F1U2o_YVBy3WYhkJLkyKfFlwAOVsuI-Hx-jaXAoYUK-ggcvy95IeUxw5LIP6MsOkGzAEQ3zNhWScQqm0M-x-r2k18cH4VGcwYrMEpkvYbBoqK1Crm6c61RbhFaQdAEQPFmtMS7Yw7ANQqMwWN-IasNY_5AT8XPycbTUXr5iojk9n31wku1ssjUl9edbJUysYiIMDXBoWpK_Gloou1UQk0hy96-hBn9TkY30duWSlekH8QIAV9ILJTDrHW7dUn0_4BwPI3fM-XzJC5VJHfMqVFmWb0Ua-lr-tS--5ErNzllWQwT68vDCWxjwa7Ksqs9kSpXWRPUpO9ept2I3-FbY-Ym5bnOYDhQSOFUKLUQRo2lg%3D%3D)
We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats.

We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans.

We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency.

Fellow Patriot - Let me introduce myself. My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans! First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate! We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values. We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration. So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this which will only take a few moments to complete. We hope to receive 700 survey responses to ourTop Issues Survey before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress. We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January. I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win. We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats. subject: There's no compromising on merit.
body:
We either live in a free society based on merit, or we live in a society where we treat everyone differently under the law to achieve an arbitrary sense of equity.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9afefae5f6d149fd921f2aa7068d4717&_e=Ps4yXbG7chLQ8rxcRMS5w3JxsBuqI3ddKZL29etf2JJB32j1p5QqKGTzj1Rr7IhAR9e4VrcY3RjFAUBdCdoaqCh3wx4o7qvjTO2of6WOtkojEC-9sJiCjLHuBOaQcT2Zhz-hsKFz08_k4n0LmLsEJdbmBRBEcYmtwuiH9RQUdbIAyo-2BkJ4qUyVaHNTQ7zt_h1dZhAX71fEatMGVS_9_jJQK4jTxzsI4mpF8FVjdmuLgMJsXvBnO8YeUc-OWrqmdATpeLBccVLbyKTn588ktbj0hOWjFDRT48VL2k31KT0%3D)
Friend,

We either live in a free society based on merit, or we live in a society where we treat everyone differently under the law to achieve an arbitrary sense of equity.

This is the goal of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (D.E.I.) in education.

**D.E.I. is nothing short of a full-blown revolutionary movement to remove conservatives from positions of power and replace them with radical Marxists.**

It was a quiet revolution. No shot was fired. Instead, the socialists and leftists used bureaucratic means to take over. Now, the woke cult of D.E.I. is making the long march through our institutions, particularly our universities.

D.E.I. officers have turned colleges into socialist indoctrination centers. They wield great power on campuses and use it to promote revolutionary Marxist policies.

**If you and I don’t defeat these D.E.I. practices now, they will remove conservatives from positions of power, cementing the leftwing control over our institutions.**

Luckily, the Goldwater Institute is fighting back and WINNING against the spread of D.E.I. in schools.

I’m Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute is the nation’s preeminent liberty organization fighting for education reform in the legislature and in the courts.

**I set a goal to reach 200 new donors to help Goldwater defund D.E.I. in education across the country.** Will you help us remove D.E.I. in the schools and the rest of our institutions? Click any button below to show your support.

Goldwater won our first victory over radical D.E.I. bureaucracies in Texas.

**Our legislation prohibited taxpayer-funded universities from using political tests to screen out applicants.**

The Texas bill completely shut down the entire “diversity, equity, and inclusion” apparatus used by the radical Left to instigate race- or gender-based radicalism on college campuses.

Now, schools can’t discriminate against conservatives because of their ideological beliefs.

Just as school choice is sweeping the nation in the wake of Goldwater passing universal education savings account legislation in Arizona last year, Texas’ bold action against D.E.I. sets a new standard that lawmakers in other states can – and should – follow.

clean_body: We either live in a free society based on merit, or we live in a society where we treat everyone differently under the law to achieve an arbitrary sense of equity. | | | Friend, We either live in a free society based on merit, or we live in a society where we treat everyone differently under the law to achieve an arbitrary sense of equity. This is the goal of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (D.E.I.) in education. D.E.I. is nothing short of a full-blown revolutionary movement to remove conservatives from positions of power and replace them with radical Marxists. It was a quiet revolution. No shot was fired. Instead, the socialists and leftists used bureaucratic means to take over. Now, the woke cult of D.E.I. is making the long march through our institutions, particularly our universities. D.E.I. officers have turned colleges into socialist indoctrination centers. They wield great power on campuses and use it to promote revolutionary Marxist policies. If you and I don’t defeat these D.E.I. practices now, they will remove conservatives from positions of power, cementing the leftwing control over our institutions. Luckily, the Goldwater Institute is fighting back and WINNING against the spread of D.E.I. in schools. I’m Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute is the nation’s preeminent liberty organization fighting for education reform in the legislature and in the courts. I set a goal to reach 200 new donors to help Goldwater defund D.E.I. in education across the country. Will you help us remove D.E.I. in the schools and the rest of our institutions? Click any button below to show your support. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion activities were sweeping through taxpayer-funded universities across the country until the Goldwater Institute stepped in. Goldwater won our first victory over radical D.E.I. bureaucracies in Texas. Our legislation prohibited taxpayer-funded universities from using political tests to screen out applicants. The Texas bill completely shut down the entire “diversity, equity, and inclusion” apparatus used by the radical Left to instigate race- or gender-based radicalism on college campuses. Now, schools can’t discriminate against conservatives because of their ideological beliefs. Just as school choice is sweeping the nation in the wake of Goldwater passing universal education savings account legislation in Arizona last year, Texas’ bold action against D.E.I. sets a new standard that lawmakers in other states can – and should – follow. The Goldwater Institute has defeated D.E.I. before, and with your support, we can pass laws like this one in more states and achieve massive victories for education reform. Please consider donating $10, $35, or even $50 today by clicking below. This huge victory set the stage for additional wins across the country. The Goldwater Institute also won massive victories in Florida, Iowa, Oklahoma, and Texas by eliminating all Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion activities at taxpayer-funded universities. These victories are just the beginning. With your support, we can finally have a higher education system that will reflect the values of the people it serves and shape students into responsible and thoughtful citizens. You can help Goldwater defund and defeat D.E.I in our institutions by clicking any button below. Thank you, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

## Alaska Republican Party is requesting a recount, that’s great news.
---
---
|
---
#### **We are hopeful that this recount will yield great results. We are skeptical unfortunately and need to start planning to start over. Our timeline to make the 2026 ballot is getting shorter and shorter.**
#### **Please sign up by clicking the button below, we have over 530 people signed up to help do petition projects in Alaska. More than 200 have signed up in the last couple days. Be the change you want to see.**
---
[_ _ Click Here to Sign Up _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6744f9e7cad0f6489bf0332a&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6744f7c082f9ab3b982227a5%26ss_email_id%3D6744f9e7cad0f6489bf0332a%26ss_campaign_name%3DAlaska%2BGOP%2Brequesting%2Brecount%252C%2Bsign%2Bup%2Bto%2Bhelp%2Btoday%2Band%2Bmore.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-25T22%253A27%253A58Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6744f7c082f9ab3b982227a5&l=en-US&s=gVLMnB53vBMEgXvoI-Z0G2iJOXc%3D)
---
---
|
---
#### **Petition #2:**
#### **1\. Require Photo ID (Federal Tribal ID with photo counts) to cast a ballot. Currently you do not need a Photo ID to vote in Alaska.**
#### **2\. Require Photo ID (Federal Tribal ID with photo counts) to request and cast an absentee ballot.**
#### **3\. Require all ballots to be received by an election worker on or before Election Day to count.** **This is fix the delays in getting results.**
---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people.
#
**I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.
**People like my husband, Andy.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241125-1?refcode=em20241125-1575&amount=5&refcode2=1575_21716_R6PCSA&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)
When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away.
I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky.
Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him.
Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.
My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities.
But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country.
That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate.
[**I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please pitch in $5.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241125-1?refcode=em20241125-1575&amount=5&refcode2=1575_21716_R6PCSA&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241125-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241125-1575&refcode2=1575_21716_R6PCSA&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241125-1&t=1&refcode2=1575_21716_R6PCSA&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1575%2E21716%2ER6PCSA)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A hopping holiday season kick-off in Detroit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)

Friend,
I had the pleasure of kicking off my holiday season with a hopping Friday night full of holiday cheer in Detroit this past weekend!
First up, I stopped by Hob Nobble Gobble – the annual fundraiser that supports Detroit’s Thanksgiving parade.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241125-1-15&t=2&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)
Our parade is the second oldest in the country, alongside that ‘other’ parade in NYC -- so it’s great to see so many people support such a cherished Detroit tradition. Plus, we got to see some of the parade balloons, and my favorite...
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241125-1-15&t=3&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)
...the biggest shrimp tower I’ve ever seen!
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241125-1-15&t=4&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)
Then, it was time for another Detroit tradition -- the lighting of the downtown Christmas tree in Campus Martius.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241125-1-15&t=5&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)
It was an explosion of amazing lights, figure skaters, and community members out celebrating.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241125-1-15&t=6&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)
Happy holidays, friends. I hope you’re entering the season in good health, surrounded by family and friends.
Wishing you and yours the best,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2211%2E135344%2EP4hOOK)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Help Fix the Supreme Court
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97663603/514162006/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThkOTEwMTMtODFhYi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i2Uq1oBWgQDK2k-aFM6Cg8-mHN7WmoL6SAdFKekO9h4=&emci=c5e5b51b-74ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e8d91013-81ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
**We Need a Fair Supreme Court — Here's How We Can Fix It**
The Supreme Court is supposed to be the guardrail of our democracy. But under the current MAGA majority, it's failing. From stripping away women’s rights to granting immunity to Trump, to Clarence Thomas accepting lavish gifts from billionaires, this Court is broken.
But there’s something we can do about it.
I'm Alan Cohn, and I’m leading Term Limit the Court, a national campaign working to end lifetime appointments for Supreme Court Justices and establish 18-year term limits. Over 70% of Americans — including a majority of Republicans — agree: the Court shouldn’t be a lifetime job.
We’re working with leaders like Hakeem Jeffries, Adam Schiff, and 75 members of Congress to push the TERM Act, which will limit Justices to 18-year terms. We’re also raising funds to support candidates who will back this vital reform.
The stakes are high — with Trump possibly appointing more MAGA Justices. If we want a Supreme Court that serves the people, not political interests, we need your help.
Join us in this fight for a fair and just Court that lives up to its promise of “Equal justice under law.”
**Support the TERM Act today!**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97663604/514162007/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThkOTEwMTMtODFhYi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i2Uq1oBWgQDK2k-aFM6Cg8-mHN7WmoL6SAdFKekO9h4=)
Thank you for standing with us.
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

clean_body: Hi Friend, We Need a Fair Supreme Court — Here's How We Can Fix It The Supreme Court is supposed to be the guardrail of our democracy. But under the current MAGA majority, it's failing. From stripping away women’s rights to granting immunity to Trump, to Clarence Thomas accepting lavish gifts from billionaires, this Court is broken. But there’s something we can do about it. I'm Alan Cohn, and I’m leading Term Limit the Court, a national campaign working to end lifetime appointments for Supreme Court Justices and establish 18-year term limits. Over 70% of Americans — including a majority of Republicans — agree: the Court shouldn’t be a lifetime job. We’re working with leaders like Hakeem Jeffries, Adam Schiff, and 75 members of Congress to push the TERM Act, which will limit Justices to 18-year terms. We’re also raising funds to support candidates who will back this vital reform. The stakes are high — with Trump possibly appointing more MAGA Justices. If we want a Supreme Court that serves the people, not political interests, we need your help. Join us in this fight for a fair and just Court that lives up to its promise of “Equal justice under law.” Support the TERM Act today! = Thank you for standing with us. Alan Cohn Term Limit the Court The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court. Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court. =** = SPONSORED BY TERM LIMITS YES, INC. 7903 HAMPTON LAKE DR. # FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

| Hi Peter, my name is Charlie and I help run the political operations for Mark’s team.

**I wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s post-election email** – I know all of us are still reeling from the 2024 election, but while the dust is settling and the outcomes of the remaining uncalled races are declared, we felt it was necessary to chart our course forward.

clean_body: Please take just 30 seconds to respond: | Hi Peter, my name is Charlie and I help run the political operations for Mark’s team. I wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s post-election email – I know all of us are still reeling from the 2024 election, but while the dust is settling and the outcomes of the remaining uncalled races are declared, we felt it was necessary to chart our course forward. We’re not asking for money or anything like that, we just legitimately would like to know where you think Democrats should go from here. Our survey is quite short, with several opportunities for you to share longer form thoughts on what issues matter the most to you, how you think Democrats should move forward from here, and the strategies we should use to regain our footing. | We can’t thank you enough, Charlie (You can read Mark’s original message below) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark Takano Date: Sun, Nov. 17, 2024 at 12:00 PM PST Subject: staggering To: Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, it’s Mark. The election was a painful setback for many of us. I know you feel rudderless. I know you are angry. And I know you feel unsure of how to combat a second Trump presidency and the already growing list of outrages. The only way forward is through. And the only way through is with a cohesive messaging strategy that prioritizes what working class folks want to fight for. That’s why I need to hear from you, Peter. This isn’t some clickbait engagement situation, we’re not trying to shepherd you along to a donate button, and we’re not going to ignore what you say. \-- 2024 POST ELECTION SURVEY -- | | The Economy Immigration Affordable Housing Reproductive Rights Foreign Policy Climate Change Social Security & Medicare Other Thank you for taking time to share your thoughts Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Files Supreme Court Petition on Post-Election Day Counting of Ballots
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

### [Majority of voters back Trump declaring national emergency to address immigration crisis ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71262&L=34009&F=H&&hash=21b14f083f8a2cb2e5ae4c933ede895abf2c01c85059443a39083c5b1e9fb98b) VOX A majority of voters support President-elect Donald Trump declaring a national emergency to address the immigration crisis. So revealed a Napolitan News Service poll conducted online by Scott Rasmussen.

According to the poll, 55% of voters favor the GOP president-elect’s plan. Meanwhile, 38% oppose the measure. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71262&L=34009&F=H&&hash=21b14f083f8a2cb2e5ae4c933ede895abf2c01c85059443a39083c5b1e9fb98b)

### [Conservative group asks US Supreme Court to reverse ruling that allows Illinois mail-in ballots to be counted after Election Day ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71262&L=34010&F=H&&hash=a780a76d1d37ac0726a7f55400f3c6850d54a409c9c0767ccb8edb839296c2b1) Chicago Tribune A conservative legal organization is ratcheting up its opposition to the requirement in Illinois that mail-in ballots be counted for 14 days after Election Day by calling on the U.S. Supreme Court to reverse federal court rulings that upheld the law because three Republican plaintiffs lacked the legal standing to challenge it.

The appeal, filed Tuesday by the organization Judicial Watch, also asks the nation’s highest court to clarify rulings about who has the right to appeal post-Election Day challenges, after many lawsuits contesting individual state results of the 2020 election filed on behalf of Donald Trump were tossed for lack of standing. Judicial Watch was among several groups that assisted Trump in seeking to halt the counting of mail-in ballots after Election Day four years ago when Trump lost to President Joe Biden. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71262&L=34010&F=H&&hash=a780a76d1d37ac0726a7f55400f3c6850d54a409c9c0767ccb8edb839296c2b1)

Judicial Watch sued the U.S. Air Force for records related to Byrd’s stay at Joint Base Andrews. Costs for his accommodations at the Presidential Inn totaled more than $35,000 from July 8, 2021, through Jan. 28, 2022, according to records obtained in 2023 by Judicial Watch. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 25, 2024 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | “It is a scandal that the courts would deny a federal candidate the ability to challenge an election provision that could lead to illegal votes being cast and counted,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Illinois’ 14-day extension of Election Day thwarts federal law, violates the civil rights of voters, and invites fraud. The Supreme Court should take up this case and reaffirm the right of federal candidates to challenge unlawful election schemes.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 274 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that through the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA), after almost 19 years, the Department of Defense produced 62 pages of records out of hundreds of previously withheld documents regarding the U.S. intelligence program “Operation Able Danger.” The Defense Department identified hundreds of pages of responsive records but withheld them, claiming the overwhelming majority are still classified to this day. ---|--- | | | | | While it allows thousands of migrant children to be exploited working brutal jobs inside the United States, the Biden administration is spending $5 million to reduce child labor abroad, this time in Latin America as well as the Caribbean. Adding insult to injury, the millions of American taxpayer dollars will go to an offshoot of the famously corrupt United Nations that claims to be devoted to promoting social justice and the international recognition of human and labor rights. It is known as the International Labour Organization (ILO) and its African-born Director General, Gilbert F. Houngbo, says his life mission is to improve the prospects of the world’s most vulnerable people. ---|--- | | | VOX A majority of voters support President-elect Donald Trump declaring a national emergency to address the immigration crisis. So revealed a Napolitan News Service poll conducted online by Scott Rasmussen. According to the poll, 55% of voters favor the GOP president-elect’s plan. Meanwhile, 38% oppose the measure. Chicago Tribune A conservative legal organization is ratcheting up its opposition to the requirement in Illinois that mail-in ballots be counted for 14 days after Election Day by calling on the U.S. Supreme Court to reverse federal court rulings that upheld the law because three Republican plaintiffs lacked the legal standing to challenge it. The appeal, filed Tuesday by the organization Judicial Watch, also asks the nation’s highest court to clarify rulings about who has the right to appeal post-Election Day challenges, after many lawsuits contesting individual state results of the 2020 election filed on behalf of Donald Trump were tossed for lack of standing. Judicial Watch was among several groups that assisted Trump in seeking to halt the counting of mail-in ballots after Election Day four years ago when Trump lost to President Joe Biden. Blaze Media The U.S. Capitol Police officer who shot and killed Ashli Babbitt on January 6 once fired his service weapon at fleeing vehicles near his home while his neighbor was in the line of fire, a congressional oversight committee reported. Judicial Watch sued the U.S. Air Force for records related to Byrd’s stay at Joint Base Andrews. Costs for his accommodations at the Presidential Inn totaled more than $35,000 from July 8, 2021, through Jan. 28, 2022, according to records obtained in 2023 by Judicial Watch. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3b32926dea&e=5bd167f239 "Is Chuck Rocha Running for DNC chair? | The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 65 #DNC #latinovote #podcast")
---
Is Chuck Rocha Running for DNC chair? | The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 65
| Chuck Rocha returns from his mission in Mexico with tales of tagging marlin, eating like kings, and exploring the intersection of Mexican-redneck fun and Democratic values. Along with Mike Madrid, the two of them take a hard look on the future of Democratic Party's leadership, **as Chuck considers a run for DNC Chair**.

He discusses his vision to return the party to its roots, **focusing on workers and the working class** , and shares why he believes his unique experience—having run campaigns, worked for state parties, and represented the Latino community—could bring the change the party needs.
---
|
---

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Understand different ways of living
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_t=iUKyMUbTsA9AQ1dkzmtFWbf249cmhzfngv79o1-q3VTypH0_XU55Kn0rvOea6ZvpYVyTxTL7ux5JQ5wNfhZwKvnmanfXoD4-cQskR4d4sVc9fLQOoJdTXV0eldkGKMi2)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_e=3wUzxbXmj_IApdmdAukU3sweUElVAkoXo7lTs6TwkImUH2YGFI7Zd6ATbKxoYkZOdJFjF_RrSVFKbBko399E2EQC3aXdDNGlrdv-3aH2_W7_wCTBD3FfB5hEs-SpqPrxn3A3TBBzria1kRQxsqKs9zeWCLDbnHJlGKY0W8-OlDUBUJ4y7MvN7YlwAZ4bKbA1yXMzpu21ziUKeebh4PCQphRov_JXvySCxdJ2Q4WznPWDBVy1jOgpbpkAkdDzTL7UiCixQ37WQYCdM99i5KA-NBQ1cYfr5mdXykiMIOfMXJmiSC5EXyUj_MLZ1aF1SwAB7Bg2r-ZldwXd4tpUHDTgpGhCY4f4_Hsw4rA3xfm8H96KlixyxmpuueonoXB0fzqOQjla1gfYc7X_9yFmt2wIf469yS9Lg9ShMklAChEAKVA%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_e=3wUzxbXmj_IApdmdAukU3sweUElVAkoXo7lTs6TwkImUH2YGFI7Zd6ATbKxoYkZOdJFjF_RrSVFKbBko399E2EQC3aXdDNGlrdv-3aH2_W7_wCTBD3FfB5hEs-SpqPrxn3A3TBBzria1kRQxsqKs9zeWCLDbnHJlGKY0W8-OlDUBUJ4y7MvN7YlwAZ4bKbA1yXMzpu21ziUKeebh4PCQphRov_JXvySCxdJ2Q4WznPWDBVy1jOgpbpkAkdDzTL7UiCixQ37WQYCdM99i5KA-NH6K5NZKgxWMgZ1o2WZXDxBHKp8mYipekdpQEcP7bIIMAbbdxGOZjNDehRB3Gpw7UXNFMnaha6PwzmjlDvmeZGUldqPtW7dj_mSb8gSWQ1kePj4s1zCrPdUyG3AnImqrmso0sw4bafRzxXd9xB1tZvI%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_e=3wUzxbXmj_IApdmdAukU3sweUElVAkoXo7lTs6TwkImUH2YGFI7Zd6ATbKxoYkZOdJFjF_RrSVFKbBko399E2EQC3aXdDNGlrdv-3aH2_W7_wCTBD3FfB5hEs-SpqPrxn3A3TBBzria1kRQxsqKs9zeWCLDbnHJlGKY0W8-OlDUBUJ4y7MvN7YlwAZ4bKbA1yXMzpu21ziUKeebh4PCQphRov_JXvySCxdJ2Q4WznPWDBVy1jOgpbpkAkdDzTL7UiCixQ37WQYCdM99i5KA-NGW_Gn6MlJkyARWCNWITCNDCpakOfUlk7YiZGgzEOY-RAAtqMVK0PVZmR2atTl9z6BJuXjASAnzlyJX_MMPvNSn74s65LY18jY6ZgucCo0vhpqUoR71qwqqZSqlbJi52yzlmJYjzP0XWfxV4m-eQIrA%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_e=3wUzxbXmj_IApdmdAukU3sweUElVAkoXo7lTs6TwkImUH2YGFI7Zd6ATbKxoYkZOdJFjF_RrSVFKbBko399E2EQC3aXdDNGlrdv-3aH2_W7_wCTBD3FfB5hEs-SpqPrxn3A3TBBzria1kRQxsqKs9zeWCLDbnHJlGKY0W8-OlDUBUJ4y7MvN7YlwAZ4bKbA1yXMzpu21ziUKeebh4PCQphRov_JXvySCxdJ2Q4WznPWDBVy1jOgpbpkAkdDzTL7UiCixQ37WQYCdM99i5KA-NJEQdzgbPWFI8aDnoHez4jSN36dk3NYsxh-BVbIT0gIob4LimCEBYkf5VMTtOtiontXV6bp12ckVMMGbHnuEgcwWlyb0YkcZuG97fwY8JcXYgIY27zHhnXlCIfvtxfSlXRmGG0zgXcZFQuUlmRCDEps%3D) for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=62f3f892061447fdb74a78ff7b6cb515&_e=3wUzxbXmj_IApdmdAukU3sweUElVAkoXo7lTs6TwkImUH2YGFI7Zd6ATbKxoYkZOdJFjF_RrSVFKbBko399E2EQC3aXdDNGlrdv-3aH2_W7_wCTBD3FfB5hEs-SpqPrxn3A3TBBzria1kRQxsqKs9zeWCLDbnHJlGKY0W8-OlDUBUJ4y7MvN7YlwAZ4bKbA1yXMzpu21ziUKeebh4PCQphRov_JXvySCxdJ2Q4WznPWDBVy1jOgpbpkAkdDzTL7UiCixQ37WQYCdM99i5KA-NJ4l6unpIuwkuywtLVi4t5sTQf_mQz91pj7xhT_hSvACn3EWYd_cs_AMfAN10aIgWhJDUJqJW9n8fGYPIEbmiOvggAkLqwGuhCEJmyqAZs60oQVB9mTqO3RmO7dIMhdIOQboGGY94-n2phEVnT9ZeHw%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. clean_body: I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to The New York Times ' "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. That 's why we've turned our online course, into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy. " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" is a powerful counterweight to The New York Times ' "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of for your home library or give it as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Despite what The New York Times ' "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. | .

body:
I need you to take the Post-Election Survey.

| |

| | |
Hi,

I'm Mike Pompeo, former CIA Director and Secretary of State.

**First and foremost, we did it!** President Donald J. Trump has been re-elected, defeating Kamala Harris and the Radical Left. Republican candidates across the country achieved historic victories, and it's clear that our message of freedom, prosperity, and security resonated with the American people.

But our work is far from over, and as we celebrate our victories, we must also take stock of what worked and what didn't. **[That's why I'm asking you to take my Post-Election Survey.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c44b11fd3d5d46b7a96bc7c29decf2e3&_e=KRmK6VaU87NWCd01Nt512gZtqwhm4iVmDyOmeO9bR-aShXwBupIKxBfGMCcm7FaGztT8ANsVxy_zEa7TOcNqArYWBWZhSzBMvMG7ESYMoiysikOShwQCvDu95ojjpd7a1XPZE09hk1zwlXafCmn0MW28oWz6HBZKWbGJxQgCw80RWw-j7Skg2LpQ82FIdGbN81We8RW2rFHaj2mPk6ymUpPqq2jOAY6zz5zjPUYB2sBP8vW1JzHwcaMtoMSM0Y5XNYWlhbG110t07dcH__FaKhljptJFPxCw_9iOG5Y7L-dk_f9-rlAe0_oIE919lRkRz3G4LP7V02CDVo7gPgq_B5frP5g6pRzZDYfy6owx5SnRWHDOqt54f_CDZPJ9iPcA6Co0NluEOYYqszuDRMdRwugdPnC4rcUKLf1EW90x3PaQslFdNqHFjcHS7RGk0H006gjOGgI0UFyL47ISqa-tbR1OgkHWZHmFe2EDAmNN9F6WfPtqk4rH-KKjt6Zp7-4G "That's why I'm asking you to take my Post-Election Survey.
